name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: This is why I introduced the Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251215-5711-footer&t=1001&akid=5711%2E420207%2EzINE4m ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter,

So far in Trump’s second term, ICE has locked up an unprecedented 66,000
people — the vast majority of whom have no criminal record at all — in
what has become the largest for-profit incarceration system in America:
the immigrant incarceration industrial complex, sometimes called immigrant
“detention.”

People are being kidnapped off the streets, disappeared into for-profit
detention centers, and shuffled from facility to facility so their
families and lawyers can’t find them. The for-profit companies that run
these jails donated tens of millions of dollars to Trump’s campaign, and
now are reaping huge profits from the unprecedented flow of $45 billion of
taxpayer dollars to expand mass detentions.

These immigrant incarceration facilities dehumanize immigrants with
subhuman unsanitary conditions, freezing temperatures and no access to
medical care or even lawyers. At least 225 judges across the country
(including 23 appointed by Trump) have already ruled that these tactics
violate due process. Don’t let anyone tell you that these are “criminals”:
ICE’s own statistics show that over 73% of those incarcerated have no
criminal record and the remaining 27% have committed minor infractions
like traffic violations. Research shows that over 170 US citizens have
even been abducted and detained.

This year alone, 23 people have died in ICE custody — a record high. One
man died with his hands and feet tied together, and ICE claimed it was a
suicide. This administration continues to lie about it all.

This has to stop.

Recently, I introduced the Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act along with
124 original co-sponsors and a powerful coalition of immigrant rights
advocates. My bill would finally overhaul this abusive system from the
ground up by:

* Ending the use of private, for-profit immigration detention centers
and instead utilizing alternatives to detention that have been shown
to work and don’t waste taxpayer dollars
* Prohibiting the detention of children and families
* Making it harder to detain primary caregivers and vulnerable people,
including pregnant people and people with serious medical issues
* Imposing meaningful penalties for failure to comply with civil
detention standards
* Requiring unannounced congressional inspections so ICE can’t hide
abuses from the American people

As an immigrant, as the Ranking Member on the Immigration Subcommittee,
and as someone who knows these stories could have been mine, I cannot and
will not accept the cruelty that’s happening right now as normal. That’s
why I have held five shadow hearings to draw attention to what is
happening. That’s why I developed a brand new Immigration Justice
Resistance Lab training on what regular people who hate what is happening
can do, right now, to push back.

But I need your help now,
Peter. Building the momentum to
pass this bill will take all of us. If we’re going to overcome the
dark-money machine behind mass detention and organize a national movement
strong enough to protect people from these abuses, then I need you in the
fight with me.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251215.FUJGCM&refcode=em20251215-5711&amount=3&t=1002&akid=5711%2E420207%2EzINE4m ]Can I count on you to pitch in $3 — or anything you can
— to support our work to pass the Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act and
build the grassroots support we need to end these inhumane conditions?

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251215.FUJGCM&amount=3&refcode=em20251215-5711&t=1021&akid=5711%2E420207%2EzINE4m ]Contribute $3

This is about reclaiming our values, refusing to accept cruelty as policy,
and building the people-powered movement capable of taking on the
for-profit detention industry and winning.

We can stop the lawlessness and abuse happening in our name. We can create
an immigration system rooted in dignity, justice, and humanity. But we can
only do it together.

Thank you, truly, for being part of this fight.

In solidarity,

Pramila Jayapal

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251215-5711-footer&t=1022&refcode2=5711_420207_zINE4m&akid=5711%2E420207%2EzINE4m

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5711%2E420207%2EzINE4m

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: longer email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I need your support.
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email -- but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can't read the whole thing, I'll cut to the chase:**

**[The GOP wants to use their majority to implement ALL of Trump's most extreme policy goals. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before tonight's mid-month deadline to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22312?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251215-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251215-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=22054%2E9716520%2EWn_4sN)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE WORKING HAND-IN-HAND WITH TRUMP TO PASS HIS PLANS INTO LAW.**

Now that they have the majority, they're doing whatever it takes to cater to Trump's desires -- even if it means cutting key programs like Medicaid and Social Security!

_It gets worse:_

**EXPERTS ARE SAYING TAKING THE SENATE BACK WILL BE TOUGH.**

If we want to stop Trump's agenda, we'll NEED to take back the Senate -- but the analysts are saying it'll be an uphill battle. Factor in the Republican megadonors willing to spend hundreds of millions to keep the Senate red, and it's clear we won't have much margin for error.

_As a result:_

**WE'LL NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK TO DEFY THE ODDS AND TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!**

It'll be a tough fight, but I know it can be done. We can only beat the odds if grassroots Democrats like you step up. **So please:**

**[We _NEED_ to fight back and act with urgency, so before today's mid-month deadline, will you give $5 _(becomes $15!)_ to win back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22312?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251215-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251215-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=22054%2E9716520%2EWn_4sN)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: 78 days. No regrets.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
The primary will be here before we know it.
We have 78 days. That’s it. We have to give our all every single day.
**The sooner we can invest in getting James’ message in front of voters, the better our chances of flipping this seat.[If you understand the stakes, please consider making a donation today to make sure we can reach the millions of voters we need to take back Texas.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251215-1-ak&t=1&akid=318%2E1347274%2EpaBDYc)
James is going to give everything he has to take back Texas and take back power for working people.
Our campaign has held dozens of events and put thousands of miles on his pickup truck as he travels the state to meet face-to-face with voters.
James knows how to win tough fights. He won his first race by less than 2,500 votes — flipping a Trump district that no one thought was winnable.
The reality is that the data shows this primary will be close. A small number of votes could make all the difference.
We cannot wake up with any regrets on March 4. Now is the time to give this everything we’ve got.
[**Will you make a donation to our campaign to send James to the U.S. Senate? Please don’t leave it to chance. We all have a role to play today.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251215-1-ak&t=2&akid=318%2E1347274%2EpaBDYc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-launch.3s2pDp&refcode=em251215-1-ak&t=21&akid=318%2E1347274%2EpaBDYc)**

The sooner we can invest in getting James’ message in front of voters, the better our chances of flipping this seat. James is going to give everything he has to take back Texas and take back power for working people. He won his first race by less than 2,500 votes — flipping a Trump district that no one thought was winnable. The reality is that the data shows this primary will be close. name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hey Peter, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
[**I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Ruben Gallego, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-mek-em-mar25.qIyu4X&refcode=em251215-1-160&t=1&akid=4047%2E734936%2EA76GMv)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: Tell Congress: No More Fossil Fuel Handouts!
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMzMDcxNDAS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM2MDE5MjgyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Trump’s EPA wants to weaken the rule that delivers clean air for parks, which
will make our air dirtier and put the health and enjoyment of park visitors at
risk. Sign your name and tell the EPA to keep our national parks safe and beautiful and our air clean. https://links.messages.lcv. Peter, It's the EPA’s job to ensure that we have good air quality, including in our
national parks. To protect the health of people who visit our parks and ensure
that they can enjoy incredible places like Yosemite, Glacier, and Acadia
National Parks, Congress required the EPA to use the Clean Air Act to deliver
cleaner air for parks, through what is known as the Regional Haze Rule. Last month, the Trump EPA announced it would continue its pro-polluter agenda by
reconsidering this important rule. Weakening what could be called the “Clean Air
for Parks Rule” will lead to dirtier air and lower visibility in national parks
from pollution that drifts in from dirty coal power plants and industrial
facilities. Big polluters will be off the hook for haze pollution, and our
national parks and public health will suffer. We need to step up and make sure this doesn’t happen. Sign your name and tell Trump’s EPA: Keep clean air in our parks. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f0Y_ The Clean Air for Parks Rule has already delivered significant benefits since
its implementation 15 years ago, including reducing 1.4 million tons of
visibility-impairing and asthma and heart-attack triggering pollution and over
171 million tons of climate pollution. This rule works, and weakening it will make air quality worse while giving corporations and
polluters another corrupt handout at our expense. We can’t allow the EPA to weaken this time-tested and highly effective rule that
allows federal and state agencies, land managers, and stakeholders to work
together to clean up air pollution so we can breathe clean air and enjoy our
national parks and wilderness areas. Join us in demanding that the EPA stop the rollback of the Clean Air for Parks Rule. Everyone deserves access to clean air, and it’s our responsibility to keep our national parks and wilderness areas safe, visible and accessible for all. https://links.messages.lcv. Thanks for being with us, Peter. Matthew Davis
Vice President of Federal Policy
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13307140&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDE5MjgyMAS2&spReportId=MjM2MDE5MjgyMAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13307140&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDE5MjgyMAS2&spReportId=MjM2MDE5MjgyMAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

Last month, the Trump EPA announced it would continue its pro-polluter agenda by reconsidering this important rule. Weakening what could be called the “Clean Air for Parks Rule” will lead to dirtier air and lower visibility in national parks from pollution that drifts in from dirty coal power plants and industrial facilities. Big polluters will be off the hook for haze pollution, and our national parks and public health will suffer. We need to step up and make sure this doesn’t happen. Sign your name and tell Trump’s EPA: Keep clean air in our parks. The Clean Air for Parks Rule has already delivered significant benefits since its implementation 15 years ago, including reducing 1.4 million tons of visibility-impairing and asthma and heart-attack triggering pollution and over 171 million tons of climate pollution. This rule works, and weakening it will make air quality worse while giving corporations and polluters another corrupt handout at our expense. We can’t allow the EPA to weaken this time-tested and highly effective rule that allows federal and state agencies, land managers, and stakeholders to work together to clean up air pollution so we can breathe clean air and enjoy our national parks and wilderness areas. Join us in demanding that the EPA stop the rollback of the Clean Air for Parks Rule. Everyone deserves access to clean air, and it’s our responsibility to keep our national parks and wilderness areas safe, visible and accessible for all. Thanks for being with us, Peter. Matthew Davis Vice President of Federal Policy League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information here to unsubscribe from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, Suite 700 Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 DONATE

body:
#

Here’s the situation, Peter.
Jon Ossoff has the most important fundraising deadline of his campaign so far at the end of the month. Shortly after, our campaign will have to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC, and everyone from National Republicans to far-right Super PACs will see the strength of this team.
We’ve set an important mid-month fundraising goal to stay on track and report the strongest possible numbers once our deadline expires, but fundraising has drastically slowed and we’re in real danger of falling short.
[**If defending Jon’s seat is important to you, can you contribute $10 — or whatever amount feels right — to his campaign today ahead of our mid-month deadline?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251215-2-f-b&t=1&akid=1278%2E5691347%2Esr5ZF-)
This race will likely be the most competitive and expensive in the nation because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator defending a seat in a state Donald Trump won last year.
Republicans know that if they play their cards right and unleash their war chest in Georgia, they could defeat Jon and send a MAGA extremist to the Senate in his place.
That means if we show _any_ signs of weakness they’ll know their plan is working and increase their spending and efforts against Jon.
That’s why this upcoming deadline is SO critical. We can’t afford to come up short and send a message to MAGA that Georgia is ripe for the taking.
[**So please, chip in $10 to Jon Ossoff’s campaign so we can crush our mid-month goal and get back on track ahead of our FEC public fundraising deadline. $10 — or any amount you’re able to give — will be put to good use defending MAGA’s top target next year.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251215-2-f-b&t=2&akid=1278%2E5691347%2Esr5ZF-)

body:
I’m willing to bet you’re not exactly thrilled to receive it either.

name: Ashley F.
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
This is important.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251215-918&t=1&akid=918%2E294397%2EcQ5Fky)
Hi there, it’s Ashley, Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign manager.
I hate to bug you on a Monday evening, but this is important.
Our fundraising has slowed down a bit these past few days — and with right-wing special interests gearing up to spend _millions_ to buy a seat on our Supreme Court, we can’t afford to hit a slump.
Our opponent, Maria Lazar, has already made it clear she’ll side with extreme interests over Wisconsinites every time. From abortion access to workers’ rights, the stakes of this election couldn’t be higher.
I know this team has what it takes to defeat Maria Lazar and elect Judge Chris Taylor, but only if we all step up.
[**If you’re able to pitch in a few bucks today, it would make a real difference. Thanks in advance.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251215_2_ak.cLWeWL&amount=10&refcode=em20251215-918&t=3&akid=918%2E294397%2EcQ5Fky)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251215_2_ak.cLWeWL&amount=10&refcode=em20251215-918&t=22&akid=918%2E294397%2EcQ5Fky)**
With gratitude,
Ashley
Campaign Manager
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251215-918&t=23&refcode2=918_294397_cQ5Fky&akid=918%2E294397%2EcQ5Fky)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=918%2E294397%2EcQ5Fky)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=918%2E294397%2EcQ5Fky)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Happy Hanukkah
body:
| | |
---
| | Happy Hanukkah! As a Jewish member of Congress, this holiday holds deep meaning for me. It's about resilience, hope, and the light that persists even in dark times. It's about standing up for what's right, even when the odds seem impossible. Those themes feel especially relevant right now. When things feel overwhelming, when the work seems endless, when it's hard to see progress - we light a candle. We gather with family. We remember that small acts of courage can change everything.To all celebrating: Chag Sameach. May your Hanukkah be filled with light, joy, and time with loved ones.Appreciate you,Greg
---
| | Landsman for Congress
PO Box 413
Cincinnati, OH 45201
United States
---
| |

Peter, it’s been a big year.

In the Senate, we’ve delivered President Trump’s agenda, cut your taxes, and secured our border.

clean_body: Will you stand with me one more time?| | | Peter, it’s been a big year. In the Senate, we’ve delivered President Trump’s agenda, cut your taxes, and secured our border. I’ve officially filed to run for re-election and I’m proud to be endorsed by President Trump, Governor Sarah Sanders, and conservative leaders across the country. We’re in for a fight come 2026. Democrats have their eyes on Arkansas. They’re running the same playbook they always do: Pick a far-left fraud and send their campaign millions to dupe voters about their record. There’s no path to keeping the Senate Majority without keeping Arkansas red. So that’s why it’s so important we earn as many grassroots endorsements as we can, before the attack ads even get started. Thank you for standing with me before in defense of our conservative values and the fight to make America strong again. In service, Tom Cotton | | Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE.

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: I’ve got some not-so-great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
The Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega warchest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress.

|
---
Patriot,

**I have some not-so-great news to share with you.**

I won't beat around the bush - I know you're busy.

_**We're about to miss our most important deadline to date. Apparently, we're only a few hundred bucks away**_ _**from meeting our goal, but it looks like we're going to come up short. **_

This fundraising deadline has a lot of purpose behind it. Ever since conservatives won the House Majority, we've been targeted left and right by Democrats looking to unseat us at any cost.

My team anticipates meeting this goal and beginning our counterattack plan against the Left. I hope it pans out.

**And get this - the Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega war chest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress.**

I've asked my finance team, and after some back and forth, they say we have one chance to get it right.

clean_body: The Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega warchest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress. | Patriot, I have some not-so-great news to share with you. I won't beat around the bush - I know you're busy. We're about to miss our most important deadline to date. Apparently, we're only a few hundred bucks away from meeting our goal, but it looks like we're going to come up short. This fundraising deadline has a lot of purpose behind it. Ever since conservatives won the House Majority, we've been targeted left and right by Democrats looking to unseat us at any cost. My team anticipates meeting this goal and beginning our counterattack plan against the Left. I hope it pans out. And get this - the Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega war chest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress. I've asked my finance team, and after some back and forth, they say we have one chance to get it right. | To make sure we hit our target, I've offered to email every single conservative I know to try and help out. Listen, I'm asking for even just $1 to make things right here. Everything helps. Thank you, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Bear with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
My team asked me to reach out one more time tonight, so I appreciate you taking the time to read this. |
#
---
Bear with me, team: I know we’ve been sending you a lot of emails, but that’s only because we rely on support from people like you to power everything we do. We’ve got big plans for next year, and we’re catching up to where we need to be tonight to hit our fundraising goal. Washington Republicans have no idea what this grassroots team is capable of. But I do. And I know how powerful we are when we’re organized and focused on winning. **My team asked me to reach out one more time before midnight tonight. Will you pitch in to help us hit our goal? name: Roy Cooper
subject: about our 1 million dollar goal for December
body:
| Hello Peter, After receiving an update from our finance team on the progress toward our mid-December goal, I had to reach out with another humble request for help. We set our highest online fundraising goal yet in the face of our most important deadline to date: We need to raise $1 million before we file our public report. But as of today, we’re about halfway through December — and not yet halfway to our goal. Falling behind in a toss-up race like this is not an option, so I am personally asking grassroots supporters to step up. Here is a link where you can give (please do so before midnight): **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2700?t=2&akid=173%2E124072%2ElZz29Z)** We’re up against a lot right now, not the least of which are the big-money groups my opponent has lined up, ready to spend any amount of money against me. If we fail to meet our own targets this month, we’d provide our opponents with an opportunity to take the momentum away. It’s a toss-up race right now, Peter. We need to keep it that way. We need the resources to take on anything the far-right throws our way. Please — invest any amount that is right for you before midnight tonight. I can’t do it without you. **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2700?t=3&akid=173%2E124072%2ElZz29Z)** Thanks so much, Roy Cooper
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=1&akid=173%2E124072%2ElZz29Z) Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 | Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=173%2E124072%2ElZz29Z)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=4&akid=173%2E124072%2ElZz29Z)

body:
all eyes are on our gubernatorial race in New Mexico

all eyes are on our gubernatorial race in New Mexico
| | | Do you have a second, friend? I’m reaching out because there are only a few hours left until our campaign’s mid-month deadline at midnight — **and[your support](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2524?t=1&akid=6270%2E400544%2ENS67K3) couldn't be more urgent.**
---
You see, all eyes are on our gubernatorial race in New Mexico as the GOP prepares to spend big to flip this seat. _And we cannot back down without a fierce fight._

I'm in this race to lower costs, invest in education, and make healthcare more accessible and affordable. **But I can't win in 2026 and deliver on these promises without your support.**

**Friend, I'm running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support from folks like you, so please:[Will you chip in whatever you can spare before tonight's deadline so we can win this race and deliver progress for New Mexico's working families?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2524?t=2&akid=6270%2E400544%2ENS67K3)**

# [Effed-Up Friday Goes Completely Off the Rails--and Even the Winner Loses](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181438126&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxNDM4MTI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU4NDc0MzAsImV4cCI6MTc2ODQzOTQzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.QjGUfmd_w8gvpN0F0C5X4162V_CEdvREiZ2bz2scDp8)
### Poop crimes, propaganda wine, and why this show's community actually matters
| | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge), [Lawrence Winnerman](https://substack.com/@lwinner), [Dana DuBois](https://substack.com/@danadubois), and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---

Well, my friends, I had the absolute pleasure of crashing _**The Daily Whatever Show**_ on Friday with Dana Dubois and Lawrence Winnerman! These two smart, funny, slightly unhinged--in a fun way! Not a _Trump Smash because my wang shrivels when queried by tough female reporters_ way)--voices are exactly what **Blue Amp Media** needs more of!
So luckily, I went ahead and hired them and as well as doing this great show, they're now helping us grow Blue Amp! Sometimes, my friends, the world works out.
Dana and Lawrence aren't just great hosts--they're builders. What they're creating with _**The Daily Whatever Show**_ is the kinda community that doubles as group therapy for people who read the news while possessing a functioning conscience. Sure, they (we) swear a little too much, and we all still _must_ laugh while democracy is on fire, or we'll just cry.
But that's not an easy balance. And damn, my friends, they pull it off!
It was **Effed-Up Friday** , which means each of us brought with us our pick for the most deeply deranged news story of the weeks. Folks, this competition was fierce!
Sure, not _Stephen Miller 's wife running away to join the Elon Musk circus fierce_, but nonetheless, there was tension in the air.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9dcefa7a-ab36-4375-a27e-64a3d5dabb9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Eeeeeeeewwwwwah!
So, yes, we had to discuss the requisite stories of Pete Hegseth The Pirate of the Caribbean, Donald Trump getting better sleep during meetings than Mel Brooks' 2000 year old man--and looking older too!--and Trump completely prostrating himself before Vlad Putin's moobs....but I decided to step out of the usual story for my F-ed up edition.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3bac6e0f-33a8-4d38-ba29-c278e7747a3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
##### Some serious moobage here
So I went with a...let's call it _more easily digestible_ story. At least for those of us listening, not doing. I'll explain.
A man in New Zealand, based on seeing the film _Octopussy_ (great flick, btw! My hot take? Roger Moore was outstanding as James Bond) stole a Faberge egg, swallowed it whole. He then was arrested--you know, thievery and such are illegal--_and spent six days under police supervision while officers waited for him to, uh_ ... _make it reappear_!
Diamond-encrusted! Fully digested! A crime, a medical emergency, and a workplace HR violation for those cops, all rolled into one. Bet those cops loved telling their friends and/or significant others what the main case they were pursuing was for six days...
Lawrence followed with something far darker--and scarier: The Heritage Foundation openly threatening the entire state of Indiana after Republicans there refused to ram through extreme-gerrymandered maps. Roads, funding, military bases--basically a mob boss ransom note, but on really pretty letterhead. It was a sobering reminder that authoritarianism doesn't always whisper. These days it tweets.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9dcefa7a-ab36-4375-a27e-64a3d5dabb9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Eewwwwwwwwwah!

And then Dana dropped the hammer.
Her story--about the grotesque martyrdom-industrial complex springing up around Charlie Kirk, including a literal bottle of "I Am Charlie Kirk" red wine--wasn't just absurd. It was revealing. The instant myth-making. The monetization of death. The way propaganda is packaged, sold, and swallowed whole by a right wing media complex.
Really right wingers in general since they took a guy who hung with lepers and thought rich people sucked and turned him into an supply-side, AR-15 Jesus.. It was sharp, unsettling, and par for the course with this cultish crew.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9dcefa7a-ab36-4375-a27e-64a3d5dabb9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Eeeewwwwwwwwah!
The audience agreed. Dana's story took Effed-Up Friday honors, and honestly? For very good reason.
What made the whole episode work wasn't just the stories--it was the chemistry. Dana's clarity, Lawrence's instincts, and a shared refusal to treat insanity as normal. That's corporate media's job.
Not treating any of this shit as normal? That's our secret sauce. That's this community.
I laughed. I swore. I learned new phrases I will never unlearn and more about the gastrointestinal system than any human shouldever learn. And I walked away even more convinced that _The Daily Whatever Show_ isn't just fun--it's necessary in these times.
Welcome to the family, you two. This is what building something real, constructing an actual edifice for sustainable independent media, looks like.

clean_body: Watch now (74 mins) | Poop crimes, propaganda wine, and why this show's community actually matters | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | Poop crimes, propaganda wine, and why this show's community actually matters | | , , , and | Dec 16 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Well, my friends, I had the absolute pleasure of crashing The Daily Whatever Show on Friday with Dana Dubois and Lawrence Winnerman! These two smart, funny, slightly unhinged--in a fun way! Not a Trump Smash because my wang shrivels when queried by tough female reporters way)--voices are exactly what Blue Amp Media needs more of! So luckily, I went ahead and hired them and as well as doing this great show, they're now helping us grow Blue Amp! Sometimes, my friends, the world works out. Dana and Lawrence aren't just great hosts--they're builders. What they're creating with The Daily Whatever Show is the kinda community that doubles as group therapy for people who read the news while possessing a functioning conscience. Sure, they (we) swear a little too much, and we all still must laugh while democracy is on fire, or we'll just cry. But that's not an easy balance. And damn, my friends, they pull it off! It was Effed-Up Friday , which means each of us brought with us our pick for the most deeply deranged news story of the weeks. Folks, this competition was fierce! Sure, not Stephen Miller 's wife running away to join the Elon Musk circus fierce, but nonetheless, there was tension in the air. | | ---|---|--- Eeeeeeeewwwwwah! So, yes, we had to discuss the requisite stories of Pete Hegseth The Pirate of the Caribbean, Donald Trump getting better sleep during meetings than Mel Brooks' 2000 year old man--and looking older too!--and Trump completely prostrating himself before Vlad Putin's moobs....but I decided to step out of the usual story for my F-ed up edition. | | ---|---|--- Some serious moobage here So I went with a...let's call it more easily digestible story. At least for those of us listening, not doing. I'll explain. A man in New Zealand, based on seeing the film Octopussy (great flick, btw! My hot take? Roger Moore was outstanding as James Bond) stole a Faberge egg, swallowed it whole. He then was arrested--you know, thievery and such are illegal--and spent six days under police supervision while officers waited for him to, uh ... make it reappear! Diamond-encrusted! Fully digested! A crime, a medical emergency, and a workplace HR violation for those cops, all rolled into one. Bet those cops loved telling their friends and/or significant others what the main case they were pursuing was for six days... Lawrence followed with something far darker--and scarier: The Heritage Foundation openly threatening the entire state of Indiana after Republicans there refused to ram through extreme-gerrymandered maps. Roads, funding, military bases--basically a mob boss ransom note, but on really pretty letterhead. It was a sobering reminder that authoritarianism doesn't always whisper. These days it tweets. | | ---|---|--- Eewwwwwwwwwah! Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. And then Dana dropped the hammer. Her story--about the grotesque martyrdom-industrial complex springing up around Charlie Kirk, including a literal bottle of "I Am Charlie Kirk" red wine--wasn't just absurd. It was revealing. The instant myth-making. The monetization of death. The way propaganda is packaged, sold, and swallowed whole by a right wing media complex. Really right wingers in general since they took a guy who hung with lepers and thought rich people sucked and turned him into an supply-side, AR-15 Jesus.. It was sharp, unsettling, and par for the course with this cultish crew. | | ---|---|--- Eeeewwwwwwwwah! The audience agreed. Dana's story took Effed-Up Friday honors, and honestly? For very good reason. What made the whole episode work wasn't just the stories--it was the chemistry. Dana's clarity, Lawrence's instincts, and a shared refusal to treat insanity as normal. That's corporate media's job. Not treating any of this shit as normal? That's our secret sauce. That's this community. I laughed. I swore. I learned new phrases I will never unlearn and more about the gastrointestinal system than any human shouldever learn. And I walked away even more convinced that The Daily Whatever Show isn't just fun--it's necessary in these times. Welcome to the family, you two. This is what building something real, constructing an actual edifice for sustainable independent media, looks like. | | ---|---|--- Thank you , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , a, , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , a, You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: What grade would you give the economy right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We want to hear from you.
#
**First** , they said it was "extreme" to demand that we have the right to afford our lives, our homes, and our families.
**Now** , Trump is calling our country's cost of living crisis a hoax.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/2025-affordability-survey-v2/?source=em20251215-10408-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC)
We must remember in times such as this: **we are not the crazy ones**. We are not the outlandish ones.
To demand affordable housing, a decent wage, the right to healthcare, that we pay to care for our people instead of the flattening of oppressed people abroad is not a radical act — **it is basic and core humanity**.
[We want to hear from you. What grade would you give the economy right now? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/2025-affordability-survey-v2/?source=em20251215-10408-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC)
**[Take Survey](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/2025-affordability-survey-v2/?source=em20251215-10408-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC)**
We will not be gaslit. We will not be silenced. And we will not stop working around the clock to prevent this country from becoming a slush fund for Donald Trump and his billionaire donors.
Thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251215-survey-v2?refcode=em20251215-10408-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=4&refcode2=10408_2526796_vTlYdC&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251215-10408-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=5&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=9&akid=10408%2E2526796%2EvTlYdC)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Three bucks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
No one knows how essential a good cup of coffee is like Sarah.
#
No one knows how essential a good cup of coffee is like Sarah. For Sarah, it’s Wawa coffee that keeps her going — especially on the long drives from Delaware to D.C.
But you don’t take it from us:
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251215-1.XY1EwB&refcode=em20251215-2586&t=1&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)
That’s why today, we’re asking for a small “coffee break” contribution from you. Just $3 to help us hit our big mid-month fundraising goal before midnight tomorrow night.
[**What do you say? Will you pitch in $3 — or anything you can — right now?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1340?c0=mcb-em-20251215-1.YHMxoP&refcode=em20251215-2586&t=2&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)
**[Donate $3 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1340?c0=mcb-em-20251215-1.YHMxoP&refcode=em20251215-2586&t=3&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)**
**[Donate other amount »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251215-1.XY1EwB&refcode=em20251215-2586&t=4&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)**
This is an important moment for our movement.
The next few days will determine whether we stay on track to meet our overall goal for the year, and what our message to Donald Trump and Republicans will be when our fundraising report becomes public. We want our numbers to show the people are fed up with the lies, theatrics, chaos, and corruption.
That’s why we’re asking for a small contribution — just three bucks, about the cost of a cup of coffee — to help us hit this important goal.
[**If you're with us, pitch in $3 to help us stay on track!**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1340?c0=mcb-em-20251215-1.YHMxoP&refcode=em20251215-2586&t=5&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)
Thanks!
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251215-1&t=6&refcode2=2586_21716_I6ngCp&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=7&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=8&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2586%2E21716%2EI6ngCp)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: So much we can do with your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We know that sometimes fighting the Supreme Court feels hopeless. But we don't have to just sit around waiting for their decision. All the recent election results show how, when we have the time and resources to organize, we can elect pro-voter candidates who will enact pro-democracy policies and protect our right to vote.
We need to organize, register voters, get them information on the election, and get them to cast their ballot in whatever way they can. RUSH $25 or more and help us make every vote count in our 2026, 2028, and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121525_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Axios - Scoop: GOP expects SCOTUS boost [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121525_3&amount=25]
Straight from Axios , Team: " President Trump's political team privately told big donors that the Supreme Court will soon issue rulings on voting rights and contribution limits that could tilt future elections their way. "
Two main cases are making the MAGA movement feel like things are going to break their way ahead of the 2026 elections:
➜ In Louisiana v. Callais , the court is set to decide whether to gut Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) and return to a time of racial gerrymandering. This would be the capstone of Chief Justice John Roberts career, as he's been working to neuter the VRA since he worked for Ronald Reagan.
➜ In National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) v. the Federal Elections Commission (FEC) , the court is tackling a case that could eliminate a federal law capping how much big-money party committees can spend in direct coordination with favored candidates. This could be the most consequential campaign finance case since the Citizens United decision opened the floodgates of corporate spending in our elections.
To be clear, these cases boil down to a simple idea: do voters get to make the decisions, or can politicians choose their voters and pump unlimited cash into their campaign coffers?
Team: We have to spread the word about these cases and the consequences we would face in the worst comes to pass. Fuel our work to defend voting rights with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121525_3&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_3&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121525_3&amount=35]
The potential consequences of these cases are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Section 2 of the VRA requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters.
In the NRSC case, there are limits on how much political parties and outside entities can coordinate financially with certain candidates. Removing these FEC limits would make it easier for the uber-rich to direct spending and influence elections , limiting the value of voters and making it harder for challengers to enter the political process.
Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters and protect our fundamental right to vote? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121525_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121525_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121525_3&amount=20]

| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Some people are saying: **This is SAD!**
I’m sitting here. Alone. In the war room. Fighting for you. The rest of the staff went home hours ago. It’s just me, one dying laptop, and a countdown clock to my urgent mid-month deadline.
**[We are going to have to ACT FAST!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
[HOLD THE LINE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
If we don’t crush my urgent mid-month deadline TONIGHT, the radical Left flips the House and Senate in 2026 and finishes what they started:
* **Open borders forever**
* **Your guns confiscated**
* **Your kids brainwashed**

**_And worst of all, your favorite President (ME!) might just go through another FAKE impeachment!_** **__**

They’re already spending BILLIONS (Dirty Money, I bet) to bury US and bury YOU! I need a small sacrifice from every red-blooded American who wants to save the country!

If you rush $47 RIGHT NOW (in the next 30 minutes), I’ll personally send you my limited-edition Red MAGA Hat Christmas Ornament — but that’s nothing compared to losing the country.
[This is it. No second chances.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
****We have been fighting for years.. And I fear the end is near. The woke mind virus is infiltrating more and more Americans every day. This could be our last chance!

[HOLD THE LINE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Do it for America, show them MAGA is strong!
THANK YOU,
President Trump

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: Standing up for patients and providers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
Senate Republicans voted down a bill that would extend Affordable Care Act subsidies by three years.

| Hi Peter,

Senate Republicans voted down a bill that would extend Affordable Care Act subsidies by three years. This bill would’ve prevented health care premiums from dramatically jumping for middle-class families, small business owners, and seniors under 65 at the start of the new year.

**The consequences of this are severe and far-reaching.

In California, over 2.3 million people are set to see soaring premiums — and here in California’s 6th District, the benchmark plan for a 60-year-old person is set to increase by 205%!**

This is a manufactured crisis and the blame lies solely with President Trump and his Republican allies in Congress.

[**Peter, f you support affordable healthcare, will you please sign onto my petition today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121351989/589202078/-495559034?source=EM_NBI_AB_20251215_EN_Healthcare_0_6MO_Bera_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTkwYmMzNi0xY2RhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mB3g9zrDndNs3iF30ZOM18--uUTB01PTDQBZVgyOeyo=&emci=639ac130-1cda-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&emdi=fa90bc36-1cda-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&ceid=32394541) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121351990/589202079/1628059965?source=EM_NBI_AB_20251215_EN_Healthcare_0_6MO_Bera_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTkwYmMzNi0xY2RhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mB3g9zrDndNs3iF30ZOM18--uUTB01PTDQBZVgyOeyo=&emci=639ac130-1cda-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&emdi=fa90bc36-1cda-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&ceid=32394541)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: this will only take a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52412?t=1&akid=10484%2E434096%2EZq7qtf)
Derek, this will only take a minute – but it’s critical.
Republicans just voted to BLOCK the renewal of the Obamacare subsidies. Now, 24 million people who buy insurance through Obamacare are facing 26% premium hikes.

These games gotta stop, and we need to deliver actual relief.

I wanna be straight with you, Derek. Every time it’s come up for a vote, I've voted YES to extend the subsidies.

**And I'm going to keep doing all that I can in Washington, D.C., to fight for more affordable health care, but for REAL change, we need to fight for this at the ballot box.
**
_We need to kick these senators out of office and replace them with folks who will work for us and protect our families._

name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation.
#

Folks, Mark Kelly here.
They are escalating.
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251215-3-1mil&t=1&akid=6297%2E6688874%2EX2vesE)
We hadn't heard anything significant since last Wednesday. Tonight, they dropped this.
Honestly, we're learning about this at the same time you are. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again.
Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them.

subject: What President Obama thinks about gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
“Politicians don’t get to cherry-pick their voters."
|
---

President Obama is speaking out in this urgent moment for our representative democracy — and you need to hear his message, Peter:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121352147/589207672/-915636940?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ObamaDTC_email_20251215-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaDTC_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251215-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaDTC_&utm_campaign=ObamaDTC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjMTBmNmMxLTFlZGEtZjAxMS04MTk2LTAwMGQzYTFkNWFmZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GjArMFf8sMbYP_0pigR5dNaZ1YPeOnHbtPdFZ1y5Jmg=)

This year has proven beyond a doubt that we are in the midst of a redistricting crisis like we’ve never seen before. Maps are being manipulated by extreme politicians who care only about entrenching their own power and silencing voters.
**As President Obama says, “it’s a desperate, cynical move. And it’s not how democracy is supposed to work.”**
Here’s the good news: We were built for this unprecedented moment. That’s why All On The Line is now Redistricting Action — because this isn’t just a policy fight. It’s an ongoing struggle for representative democracy, and it’s on people like us to meet this moment with action.
It requires each and every one of us to get engaged, organized, and ready to fight.
[**Join President Obama’s call by supporting Redistricting Action with a donation. name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: a surge of support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5]

Peter, I was hoping I wouldn’t have to reach out again this late, but we’re falling short of our goal, and I’m worried.

We’re just hours away from our crucial mid-month deadline, and we’re still 11% short of our $35,000 goal.

December has been tough for fundraising so far, so I hoped Democrats like you would step up ahead of this urgent deadline.

I’m grateful for the many who have done their part, but the truth is we need a SURGE of support to have ANY hope of hitting our goal in these last few hours.

The MAGA Machine is prepared to spend MILLIONS to crush us, so I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back.

I need at least 3 more donations from 18326 to hit our goal, so can I count on you to be one of the FINAL supporters I need to flip the Senate and close this fundraising gap before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q42025?amount=25&amounts=250,100,50,25,10,5]

Thanks for your support,

Raja

I need at least 3 more donations from 18326 to hit our goal, so can I count on you to be one of the FINAL supporters I need to flip the Senate and close this fundraising gap before midnight? [] Thanks for your support, Raja Sent from my iPhone These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, click here. If you'd prefer , you can unsubscribe here [] . If you'd like to donate, please click here [] . name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is how we can win in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Let’s do this again
#
North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, Peter. I should know.
I won both my elections for Governor in years that Donald Trump carried the state. It wasn’t easy, but with a groundswell of grassroots enthusiasm, we prevailed.
In the last few weeks, we’ve begun building out a team that can win here again – this time for a seat in the United States Senate. We have a plan that we know can provide Democrats with success here in NC. And it’s only been possible through your support.
**[I have to ask for that support again today, Peter, because we’re preparing for this to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. With your help, we’ll engage with voters from every corner of this state and prove that our vision for the future is right for North Carolina. Please split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98486?refcode=em20251215-9835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9835%2E614464%2ESmkl2G)**
Statewide elections here are competitive and expensive. Republicans are already planning to spend hundreds of millions against us because they know this seat is the key to the Senate majority.
But as we begin sharing our message with North Carolinians — a message rooted in respect for the values we share and the fundamental rights we’ve spent so long fighting for — I am confident that we’ll be able to bring voters onto our team.
We can succeed here in North Carolina if we work together.
**[If I can count on you to stand with me in the fight, please split a contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98486?refcode=em20251215-9835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9835%2E614464%2ESmkl2G)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98486?refcode=em20251215-9835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9835%2E614464%2ESmkl2G)**
Thanks so much,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98486?refcode=em20251215-9835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9835%2E614464%2ESmkl2G)

Friends, Millions of Americans – including 2 million people right here in California – just saw their healthcare premiums go up because Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress refused to extend the Obamacare subsidies that were helping keep costs down. **For some families, their premiums have doubled! It’s outrageous.** As California’s next Governor, I’m going to fight back. I believe that healthcare is a human right and no one should have to choose between a doctor’s visit and buying groceries for their family. That’s why I’m running. clean_body: I’m running to make healthcare affordable. | = Friends, Millions of Americans – including 2 million people right here in California – just saw their healthcare premiums go up because Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress refused to extend the Obamacare subsidies that were helping keep costs down. For some families, their premiums have doubled! It’s outrageous. As California’s next Governor, I’m going to fight back. I believe that healthcare is a human right and no one should have to choose between a doctor’s visit and buying groceries for their family. clean_body: What I wrote cannot leak. | | | | | It’s Mike Rogers. I’m writing to you directly because I don’t know who else I can trust right now. I just left a series of meetings that shook me: the kind of conversations that never make it into press briefings or fundraising emails. I’m not supposed to tell you what I heard. I’m not supposed to share anything written. Please understand: I’m asking you humbly to read it immediately. Quietly. I wouldn’t come to you like this if I had any other choice. — Mike Rogers Michigan U.S. Senate Candidate | | | Text JOIN to 22033 | |

name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: We Need Common Sense Gun Laws
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=4d190ff657&e=395a33a3d2)
| | | | | |
# We need common sense gun laws.
---
| | This weekend, two mass shootings occurred on opposite sides of the globe, devastating two disparate communities.
On Saturday afternoon [a gunman opened fire ](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=c15867add7&e=395a33a3d2)[at Brown University](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=579b84d4e7&e=395a33a3d2), killing two students – [Muhammad Aziz Umurzokov and Ella Cook](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=16becd692b&e=395a33a3d2) – and injuring nine others during finals week.
And on Sunday, [two antisemitic gunmen ](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=b79f33860e&e=395a33a3d2)[opened fire on a Hanukkah celebration](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=1176424644&e=395a33a3d2) at Australia’s Bondi Beach – killing 15 people including a Holocaust survivor, a 10-year-old, and two rabbis – and [wounding a Texas A&M rabbi’s son](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=7f7f9fdc2c&e=395a33a3d2).
The Australian government immediately pledged to eradicate growing antisemitism in the country and vowed to overhaul their gun laws in the face of such a horrific act of violence.
Meanwhile, in response to the attack at Brown,Trump’s response was [“things can happen.”](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=087a1d1c6f&e=395a33a3d2)
No, these things don’t just happen. These are policy choices that cause harm to families and communities.

Some of you may remember my former staffer, Tez, who worked with me on our campaign the summer before he started college. Tez is now a sophomore at Brown University.
---
[|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=13fa803e9d&e=395a33a3d2)
| | I don’t have kids, but Tez is like the kid I never had.I check in on him often to make sure he’s doing okay and to talk about the state of politics and the world. We just spoke last week when he was studying for finals and ready for the holiday break.
When I saw the news late on Saturday night,I texted him but didn’t get a response. This is a kid who usually responds right away, (even at parties on a Friday night)!
I was very worried but got relief when he texted me back at 4:30amto tell me he and his friends are safe.
_My heart aches for all of the mothers_ _and fathers who aren’t so lucky._
Our kids and families deserve better.The Jewish community deserves better.
**The gun violence epidemic is curable –****with basic gun safety laws,****health access for all, and political will.**
As the first Congresswoman of TX-21,you can count on me to lead that fight.
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=09944c676a&e=395a33a3d2)
