name: Katie Porter
subject: No BS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I’m writing a message directly for you.
Hi Peter, it’s Katie Porter.
We only have a few hours left until our mid-month fundraising deadline. My team and I set a goal of raising $10,000 by midnight tonight. I’ll explain why, but first can you chip in at this link?
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251215_2_ak?refcode=em20251215-40573&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251215_2_ak.YVkCp8&refcode=em20251215-40573&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=40573%2E3422442%2EaTy4eR)**
An extra $10,000 would do a lot for our campaign. It lets us run more ads online, host more events across the state, and produce more high-quality content that gets our message in front of voters.
As I talk to voters, I see that our message of bringing down costs is truly resonating with people. Working-class Californians are struggling to get by, and are rallying behind our campaign because we are the ones speaking to their needs.
But if we’re going to win, we need to extend who we can reach with our message. I wouldn’t ask for money if we didn’t need it, so here is a no BS ask for you:
Can you chip in $5 to help us reach our $10,000 goal and scale up this campaign quickly? You can donate through the link our campaign made just for you below.
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251215_2_ak?refcode=em20251215-40573&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251215_2_ak.YVkCp8&refcode=em20251215-40573&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=40573%2E3422442%2EaTy4eR)**
Thank you so much. I’m so grateful that we can count on you.
—Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40573&t=3&akid=40573%2E3422442%2EaTy4eR)

Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: Team DNC
subject: One last time:
body:
---
Derek, Our mid-month fundraising deadline is approaching fast — so we’re asking one last time: [**Will you chip in $7 to the DNC before midnight to help us reach our goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251215_5524_fr&refcode2=5524_22930333_wof43a&akid=5524%2E22930333%2Ewof43a) $7 because this is one of our last deadlines of the year and 2026 is just around the corner. $7 because a donation _now_ will go further than a donation later — the earlier the funds come in, the earlier we can execute and expand our plans to win big next year. $7 because we have a real chance to flip Congress and stop Trump’s disastrous agenda in its tracks — but only if we all step up and do our part. Derek, our fundraising goals aren’t arbitrary. They’re carefully calculated by our team to ensure that Democrats up and down the ballot and across the country have what they need to run, organize, and win — because the DNC is the organization best-positioned to distribute funds and resources to the candidates and organizations that need them most. My parents left the hospital with a 100 page medical bill. If it weren’t for my dad’s health insurance, our family wouldn’t have made it. When my local Republican Congressman voted to take away healthcare for people like my brother, I decided to run for office. And I won. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121352754/589210329/1563783990?&refcode=E16753-20251215-Healthcare-Image-HealthCare&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc5NDg5ZGUtMmVkYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtMDAwZDNhMWQ1YWZlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3vyxAt8y1MHb_GcLmYOdAf5-8YTBgGhWIvfzYZ1ouHM=) **That is why I am so frustrated with the healthcare crisis we’re in right now.** Millions of Americans are going to see their healthcare premiums DOUBLE in January. All because Republicans won’t extend tax credits to make coverage affordable. This is quite simply, politics at its worst. Donald Trump and his cronies would rather people lose their healthcare coverage, than admit the Affordable Care Act is working. Republicans would rather people _die_ than admit that they don’t have an alternative plan. It’s terrible. I write this today, during Congress’ last voting week of the year. **Republicans have no plan to fix this impending crisis.** Instead, on Friday they are going home. I wonder how many will even think about the families about to lose their coverage. I doubt many will. _[**I believe healthcare is a human right. I will never stop fighting to make it more affordable and accessible for every American. body:

Check this out Friend:

After years of research and development I’m super pumped to announce our most accurate and most advanced red dot sight ever.

Using holographic technology -- once reserved for military and police use exclusively --
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2e3cf6b3b11f2393d4005c1e429e0c073c500c6789ab972f5501ec09b4e2ec1266feeeb58c9a2ff3b3601d60c7825d4deead13beaa18cd70e739985ae2c11e09
The Stinger Combat Sight by MCG Tactical can put a bullet through a dime at 300 yards without breaking a sweat.

With a precision laser reticle measuring in at one MOA, the stinger projects a target picture with holographic clarity... achieving long distance precision like never before.

This bad boy is not just similar to the technology used by US special forces... it's identical.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2e3cf6b3b11f2393d4005c1e429e0c073c500c6789ab972f5501ec09b4e2ec1266feeeb58c9a2ff3b3601d60c7825d4deead13beaa18cd70e739985ae2c11e09

Through an exclusive manufacturing agreement MCG Tactical is proud to offer this elite sighting technology to you at a fraction of the cost.

Sights like this one typically sell for over $600. And that’s not just defense companies ripping off the government either. Plenty of discerning shooters have paid that and counted themselves lucky to do so...

But YOU are much luckier than even them.

name: Unite4Freedom
subject: Light the Way - Expand the Skills to Secure Valid Elections
body:
This holiday season, we’ve been reflecting on the extraordinary growth of our Thursday Training Sessions
|
---
Dear Peter, This holiday season, we’ve been reflecting on the extraordinary growth of our Thursday Training Sessions—something that wouldn’t exist without supporters like you. When we first launched these weekly trainings, we hoped a few dedicated volunteers would show up. Instead, we’re grateful for hundreds of volunteers engaging, learning, and taking real action to save our elections and save our country. Thanks to that momentum, we’ve offered:
* Digital Army Training & Activation
* Marketing & Messaging Workshops
* How to Understand the U4F Data
* How to Present the U4F Data and Message Effectively

These sessions are building skill, clarity, and a national capacity – a powerful voice that can’t be ignored. We want to do more training, starting in January. To continue—and expand our offerings—we need your help.
---
| [ **Contribute to Our Efforts** ](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWjbXz4Bdv7kW62MJpn5jpFZPW8hW1h35H6_LfN1PJbtM3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3mDN687nqVyFzVjMbY7jNBQ_2rW1vY-yz7d0qrHW8fNl3q8XXx78W2kddRX6cd5zfW8N-zhy4Q4bR0W92qfts7q5PhWN5_Ytd0gCTp-W3CWDc27L_ck2W8hWTGQ3ZG86HW6zc50N4f-phPT4qgg4pq_sCW2N9my-3rCyJPW5mk5N14VWxcRVB-jm-9lx_7FW2BD9mH3t6kLbW1MJ3lf3k6byJW6lhBgP88c-ntN35l0xywlrJkW3nhl2S1L71YcW1-k6WW5jyyJlW7R0KFl73-1ZpW5zGz-94FfzNmN7hLD8ypfz96f8kDrr204)
---
This season help light the path forward for truth and unity. Together, we’re building the movement America needs. We’d also love your feedback. What training topics do you want in 2026? What guest speakers would you like us to invite to our training sessions? After you [donate](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWjbXz4Bdv7kW62MJpn5jpFZPW8hW1h35H6_LfN1PJbtM3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3mZW64CcTZ8WVR9CW2MYcGX4GlnWcW5XxS775QBl6QW8LTVxZ1McWVXVD38Mk238cg1VScDh08m054jW5NMlnW2vxLh7N6SDTf1v6ZBXN5K99vPHYgD6W2KCk873Bh2F5W125xCH8bXG86V_5P2k1pZQynW72rr7N4dGQJdW5MqxNK2hysvlN6VKbLTZrW6WW1xMfZX5455y3W6DP_Zp8K9TdsW8NfsqR5p7GqDW26RrLC9gPszdW3qjC0W7hMrnsW6-R4c65nsCsLW1C5xKF7t8cN5W9cPqLx6SbxhyW4kf7NP7Xm5KXd3Y5F004), please reply to this email to share your ideas.
---
|
---
Thank you, Peter! Your gift allows us to train more volunteers and bolster federal efforts to stamp out election fraud. Please keep a look out for future emails as we report back to you on the progress we are making to restore our elections. Unite4Freedom wishes you a very merry holiday season!
---
With Gratitude, Sheila Coombes, Director, [Unite4Freedom](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWjbXz4Bdv7kW62MJpn5jpFZPW8hW1h35H6_LfN1PJbts3m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3mGW1_YtDX6PZWqnVhtRDP4FPqb2W6zKyyr50dWzZW6xsn3y1cF1zHW11L3Wj32j9XnW1nTm9Y1q90c5W7pX2zK21jC4GW1b6ySt7jX9_XN4Cpl742cX64N6yc2VZRQzbvV-cmzh21XFCxW4JP7bW5qBq8mW6H6z5W5F7sL7W5YJ4RL5FwYdRW6X_RqV4bFN9rW7G2R465GZfHNW753-w_1DqF8LW3kJ2Mk67LgnfW30H9112dDzG0W4tGGzH82xL4JW4qPmzw7Yk1cxW70BSTC6-F2Zcf1r7hdH04)

name: Team Trisha
subject: Boebert did something immoral to see alleged lover Kid Rock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
While she was busy lighting her donors' money on fire at the concert, a tornado hit two towns in her district, Elizabeth and Bennett.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m-NUu3ZdI2tf9XRhJVrpxdZw3rtEnHX1ManOlINn3BvxAPxO-JW3uI7xZ-TZ3XbJ69v8GcTyMaBxXAqiLh3uFhFhsBMAllY_lbGJi_rFIckCBKX0IbWriMhAEf1YA11LzqcVftSLZ9rGxHgDpbC6xZ0W-D7FHW34ve2ilbkeqY8gmyN4xy_MWM3YGDjKFkzMhfbPZSfDQinaC4RR1mcp_aAp1uFx4dM6&c=EuO0XCVkSxqxnFUhUPtnJvMHvzqyfkhDxeN-VyR_LM5Xp2YhU33Dcg==&ch=Ls4MUcfi_zjzfjP7c7jYnoIZfKR3h1zM9YJjVbCRScb9nFc_yIu_jg==)

|

Peter,
Congresswoman Lauren Boebert has once again broken the internet for doing something immoral.
Recent filings with the Federal Election Commission show that she spent over $6,000 in campaign donor funds on traveling to and attending a Kid Rock concert. Many speculate that the two are dating.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m-NUu3ZdI2tf9XRhJVrpxdZw3rtEnHX1ManOlINn3BvxAPxO-JW3uI7xZ-TZ3XbJ69v8GcTyMaBxXAqiLh3uFhFhsBMAllY_lbGJi_rFIckCBKX0IbWriMhAEf1YA11LzqcVftSLZ9rGxHgDpbC6xZ0W-D7FHW34ve2ilbkeqY8gmyN4xy_MWM3YGDjKFkzMhfbPZSfDQinaC4RR1mcp_Z34QLYFahSV&c=EuO0XCVkSxqxnFUhUPtnJvMHvzqyfkhDxeN-VyR_LM5Xp2YhU33Dcg==&ch=Ls4MUcfi_zjzfjP7c7jYnoIZfKR3h1zM9YJjVbCRScb9nFc_yIu_jg==)
---

While she was busy lighting her donors' money on fire at the concert, a tornado hit two towns in her district, Elizabeth and Bennett. She couldn't be bothered to leave Texas and help coordinate the response to the disaster.
While she left the survivors to fend for themselves, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese was on the ground doing what she could when our Congresswoman wouldn't.
It's no surprise that Boebert's campaign just reported its lowest ever fundraising haul. Her donors know that this money isn't going to anything political, they know she doesn't care about the district, and they've stopped giving.
Boebert was only reelected by 546 votes, or less than 0.5% of the vote. In 2024 when Trisha and Boebert went head to head, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts, whereas Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
All the signs are here -- Colorado's 4th is ready to reject Boebert by a landslide and we will make it happen but only if we can continue growing this campaign. [Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us fire Boebert, flip Colorado's 4th, and reclaim the House? ](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m-NUu3ZdI2tf9XRhJVrpxdZw3rtEnHX1ManOlINn3BvxAPxO-JW3uI7xZ-TZ3XbJEfnEgqUMJt--cnbt-32eFY55SvU31hzYp_KN7n1vW43IU_r_LcEXzEpp9Q6oopVkGduMU-lJN-yMmlEtN635zxAa6lpp6bu46k0UC_IvO7kUzNs-Aox_bUNWooEhhPKVADGnVHiHMzAxBtPse7wZI6RV2kvu2R8CJMcCP87ypQiTRug7ClaRJw==&c=EuO0XCVkSxqxnFUhUPtnJvMHvzqyfkhDxeN-VyR_LM5Xp2YhU33Dcg==&ch=Ls4MUcfi_zjzfjP7c7jYnoIZfKR3h1zM9YJjVbCRScb9nFc_yIu_jg==)

clean_body: While she was busy lighting her donors' money on fire at the concert, a tornado hit two towns in her district, Elizabeth and Bennett. | | | | | == | Peter, Congresswoman Lauren Boebert has once again broken the internet for doing something immoral. Recent filings with the Federal Election Commission show that she spent over $6,000 in campaign donor funds on traveling to and attending a Kid Rock concert. Many speculate that the two are dating. | == While she was busy lighting her donors' money on fire at the concert, a tornado hit two towns in her district, Elizabeth and Bennett. She couldn't be bothered to leave Texas and help coordinate the response to the disaster. While she left the survivors to fend for themselves, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese was on the ground doing what she could when our Congresswoman wouldn't. It's no surprise that Boebert's campaign just reported its lowest ever fundraising haul. Her donors know that this money isn't going to anything political, they know she doesn't care about the district, and they've stopped giving. Boebert was only reelected by 546 votes. In 2024 when Trisha and Boebert went head to head, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts, whereas Boebert underperformed Trump in every county. All the signs are here -- Colorado's 4th is ready to reject Boebert by a landslide and we will make it happen but only if we can continue growing this campaign. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | We have a once in a decade chance to flip this seat and beat Boebert. We can't let it pass us by. body:

---
| MAGA judges just tore Democracy to shreds in Arkansas.
In a jaw-dropping ruling, the Arkansas Supreme Court detonated 74 years of precedent and handed the state Legislature a loaded gun to use against voters. With this decision, the court blessed a system where lawmakers can erase the will of the voters and undo any constitutional amendment.
The people speak, and MAGA politicians hit delete--hell on earth.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014PSdlq6Wud12jiFy_0W1dLghvQPib-rhne_s8uQ4eIj7fKaKeiStT9GMiEj1nwtx0Zni38r5cPld75t5FpX_wudv5Mr68QYCZBMYxDvFcFLw8nHSZcdFmjX-1QHWg4Q4mYPgCel3Xn0sLa1H-D0_IVHh88wAqBXcsUpuIfeJ1hJEMqObHPL88BKnYIs3tP5uAZZd0Kc7Zdwtpm-LcxDRSw==&c=2rp2aCxh9oI0MPQ0V8Mn94l2Mk4JI_UNCFxQ8SP-adIgrHh6HZzVDQ==&ch=a7014HnzbojICimt0t5SWqI7qZ-GWf_QDP35K4FmI8oJg6vL99STmA==)
---
This is the MAGA playbook. When they can't win elections, they capture courts, install judges, and use them to crush democracy and lock MAGA rule into law. Arkansas is the proof.
And if we don't stop this now, it will spread.
In November, Defend Our Courts helped protect Pennsylvania's Supreme Court from a MAGA takeover. MAGA didn't just lose that election, they got wrecked. It was a blowout. Voters showed up, the court held, and democracy survived.
Now we're taking that same winning strategy to Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan in 2026, where control of the courts could decide abortion rights, fair elections, and the future of our democracy.
But here's the hard truth: we're facing three court fights at once. To hit MAGA with the same force we brought in Pennsylvania, we need three times the resources, and we need to start now.
[Arkansas was the warning shot. Pennsylvania showed us the path. Now we fight, or we watch democracy get erased in plain sight. name: Bushra
subject: Does school board = enough experience to run for Congress?
body:
How does experience serving on a school board, an unglamorous and often overlooked position, equate to effective leadership at the federal level?
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GLGgEtO-icAmXy0HuY-mQcnCmgMZR_cbbUnVDV9r7pNyjDjboUm8V8oPUKb7ACxNv6bsAd4uDKVVQQkRp18NIAR8ZrfYHWbPy9kzaGnQxWGEaKiWguHMXvMTQkbWYEdHzpIZ1MNWd_YIV2Lzt5L0BkkCwyVRClRnuMNdxnQj5LifJXPecGAhfRZdlJpbmeH7uNoYaa2-ZJi3ypDZEgBtC8OHEWFycjTdRl40vG13l4w=&c=k3ouH0Tr-s2K-ndWfV-c_6jiBgNnmJIzIK-vqr7e6FAXbL6jRrOaLw==&ch=-WO7mh7bIAXyo6JFkvrXngza25wY8Dak1KYLWrYpbXNh3gkNlKxfJg==)
---
|
Hello Peter,
As a 27 year old, when I talk to people about my campaign, one of the first questions I often get asked is do you have enough life experience to run for office?
As the first woman in my generation to win an election to public office, a highly contested school board seat - a role which I've continued to serve in for the past seven years, my response to that question is a resounding yes.
But how does experience serving on a school board, an unglamorous and often overlooked position, equate to effective leadership at the federal level?

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GLGgEtO-icAmXy0HuY-mQcnCmgMZR_cbbUnVDV9r7pNyjDjboUm8V8oPUKb7ACxNv6bsAd4uDKVVQQkRp18NIAR8ZrfYHWbPy9kzaGnQxWGEaKiWguHMXvMTQkbWYEdHzpIZ1MNWd_YIV2Lzt5L0BkkCwyVRClRnuMNdxnQj5LifJXPecGAhfRZdlJpbmeH7uNoYaa2-ZJi3ypDZEgBtC_1au-5ew-ctwS9zffL9O1g=&c=k3ouH0Tr-s2K-ndWfV-c_6jiBgNnmJIzIK-vqr7e6FAXbL6jRrOaLw==&ch=-WO7mh7bIAXyo6JFkvrXngza25wY8Dak1KYLWrYpbXNh3gkNlKxfJg==)
---
Time Magazine featured me on their cover back in 2018 for my historic run. That's me circled on the bottom left.
---
One of the accomplishments I'm most proud of from my tenure on the school board has been ensuring that Jewish and Muslim students in the schools I oversee could receive kosher and halal food options in our district.
I attended the same schools that I presently oversee on my school board and I remember the lack of food options that met my dietary needs growing up. So, upon getting elected to the board of education in 2019, one of my first initiatives was to mandate halal, kosher and vegetarian options in every school I oversaw.
This initiative proved so successful that I was able to advocate for an equivalent at the state level, the Faith by Plate Act, which offers the same accommodations in every state funded facility: schools, prisons and hospitals. I testified in front of the Illinois General Assembly in favor of the bill and my schools were used as a case study to convince legislators of its feasibility. The act was ultimately signed into law by Gov. Pritzker in 2025.
This is a diverse district made up of Jewish, Muslim, Hindu, Catholic, and so many more families, and providing children food they can eat at school is indicative of the coalition building I plan to continue at the federal level.
[As we head into the 2026 midterms, we need Democrats with more than just a D next to their name. To win we need people with proven track records of leadership in their communities. I've fought for IL-09 students for eight years and this district knows I have their back. Can I count on you to make a donation to help us build the campaign we need to win and take this leadership to the federal level? ](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GLGgEtO-icAmXy0HuY-mQcnCmgMZR_cbbUnVDV9r7pNyjDjboUm8V8oPUKb7ACxNFCx89ZdvxAiOm6xwkDJ198f4wKlD3PlZVoLu_D6P2FXkSvUhyvxicbX3PNGm9EJxX5Y54Dk2l2rw0EmyvV2BoPdVfer1rW7pr80HYJw4NSp1Yro5i7UeCRBoddFAyGiVLQPdmIRgnr8GImGjdPp4Uvc81IQOTj6ctup1wMV1F3itCWWr2e7zAQ==&c=k3ouH0Tr-s2K-ndWfV-c_6jiBgNnmJIzIK-vqr7e6FAXbL6jRrOaLw==&ch=-WO7mh7bIAXyo6JFkvrXngza25wY8Dak1KYLWrYpbXNh3gkNlKxfJg==)

I attended the same schools that I presently oversee on my school board and I remember the lack of food options that met my dietary needs growing up. So, upon getting elected to the board of education in 2019, one of my first initiatives was to mandate halal, kosher and vegetarian options in every school I oversaw. This initiative proved so successful that I was able to advocate for an equivalent at the state level, the Faith by Plate Act, which offers the same accommodations in every state funded facility: schools, prisons and hospitals. I testified in front of the Illinois General Assembly in favor of the bill and my schools were used as a case study to convince legislators of its feasibility. The act was ultimately signed into law by Gov. Pritzker in 2025. This is a diverse district made up of Jewish, Muslim, Hindu, Catholic, and so many more families, and providing children food they can eat at school is indicative of the coalition building I plan to continue at the federal level. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Thank you in advance for your support. | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Craig Riedel for State Senate
subject: Riedel Campaign Endorsement Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel
body:
| | | | |
---
Riedel Campaign Endorsement Update | December 16, 2025
---
| Riedel Endorsed by the Associated Builders and Contractors of Ohio
---
|
---
|
On Monday, December 15, the Associated Builders and Contractors of Ohio (ABC of Ohio) announced their endorsement of Craig Riedel's candidacy for Ohio Senate District 1. ABC of Ohio is a professional association of commercial contractors and affiliate members who promote the merit shop agenda of free enterprise, limited government and fair and open competition.

Mick Given, President of ABC of Ohio, issued the following statement:
"ABC of Ohio is all-in for Craig Riedel in Senate District 1. With 27 years of experience in the steel industry and a proven record of cutting taxes and red tape, Craig is a battle-tested conservative who will fight tirelessly for merit shop fair and open competition. Thoughtful, experienced, and 100% pro-growth - that's Craig Riedel."

Craig is honored and grateful to be endorsed by ABC of Ohio as the Riedel campaign continues to build momentum. As your next State Senator, Craig will work tirelessly everyday to ensure that Ohio has a strong, free-market economy.
---
|

| | |

That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGu3CAQRb8Gd17BsGBcuIiyspTivTYlGsN4jZ4NDuD170dONh-QbjTnzpFG9-eH_cCwhvj8xI0G9wo2F1sXWmmuM2EmX5dQppS-LHBQrYBW6CsjGj84ryU0NIhOK2PASNMsA4LinAQBiHvfA1edARJmFm7uScPchOEyCRBaCM6luink0gkzo6YZvUJ258fusVK5uRQL5RfW8KIQY7qmFG8ubc06LLXuhclvDEYGYyF3ZLphJJ_qlWAw1iPHEJ_tnkKs7VGQwUhGAU3T1Iquh_beTbztZSdbmh2ayWnpwDM5lnRkR9YlT0w-vv_47IwCxUAfdbMb-XBsTD5ow7C-l38vmHwsmD2WL4vu1xs53HYMz3jBdNqT7BniP5ZipViZfGCTB7-fYV1D0R278-dl__Ns_b9qXgP8DgAA___bzJt3)

Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history. And long before he left us... he wrote How We Win -- the playbook that lays it all out. Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward. Friend, this isn't just a book... It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to: 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states 🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists 🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. He showed us HOW WE WIN. Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you. How We Win is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up." Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth. The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. # Tuesday, December 16, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1773, a mob organized by the Sons of Liberty raided three British ships and threw all the [tea they were carrying into Boston Harbor](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQRk9jdyD_gMGFizR0mzYlMma8ODIYjSeLuH20uULKT_reK97XY374lNPx_PQ7OIplPuCqGYgA559KELZYMAABYsEzF6Lt8rMSqm-kaqSZV5_yPXd8dRFAgebg5GD6cdRKG765AEs0VvbW2yUOdhRiATGOxtjQr1FbntzbJpU0UopBdm0ctQYPUgRhQVvNOgFrooLtd0kHbRDzXV6AbSg7z24jOivTH0xNTE3XdbV-B0zBH1uqVPAOcBD6_L4zNb1HgsrUtJRK5WgIfHN6pJupiaNbzyvlnKoZWCeeu09_IKd_xXk59RsAAP__Hcx68A) in a revolutionary-era protest that came to be known as the Boston Tea Party. It turns out spreading holiday cheer might actually be good for your health. As we report below, studies show that [singing Christmas carols](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb2O3DAQg59G7mZhSf7ZK1xskBhpLkVSpDQUaWRNoB9Dmj1j3z7wvUIqFh9BgOTv9-3dUKS8_zAJF_Zly3i2iMxYt2djtMGXapGx1lKPWJjDaTbVqxGkAjltzlB8bUPnFo-oUHe4yHka73et9NSFZUbd94Mb3ay9RufGQU6TsbP1-i6nETtarjSp5CRlP8vh5u9ao0HZ2_4N9ZsWQ4-OuNTb30KZA_r4Kh9Yb7akLi6B-WhCP4RahVrP87ylli8m1IoZKH8qY2VDOWFmodb0bGSFWjkgMCWE4sGGSo2TaWBNLRGoQcCKcHn-YGM4TGVolHfK-0X3Uhz4UuFVnhUCmsgBmnlB46cjbEKtpsLjIX9-S99XoddiyQn99cs1N57tF9ajq4s7ToqR2jSLod-TofhZjP_rjY9F_QsAAP__JduiLg), especially in a group, can release endorphins, improve circulation, and even strengthen your lungs. Which Christmas carol is your favorite? Reply to let us know. The weather is getting colder, but the [Amazon Prime Deals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQhU9jOpB_wEDhIhKi27QprVl7AEcGs7ZZtLePSCLlAGlnnj69933c9A2cd9v8DiuqPAW94Zk85oxRHymjWaYQDWaMMcTdh5yXEzSnvCkZL5nUFpx_6bqwakLkKApUrJVN1wkuZLGovkewCLRtqLnzrjUomsk0traNRGSicOqiMc4kY7RldTV1QiAgo4b2KHpBaorW5RCrz-C2vODkX-GJsTJhLbxact4TEW-Ej4SP53lW9wg2WQSfrgjhI5gH4aOHzbptJmI88qpTOKJBIoY_YGkzEC6v74rWHSsRg3Vp9_D6PRtYd3DzRsQw44YRfAnm8WOivGYQLo12loiB0Z43RVR2P533LsmW1HRewfnv3vlfsp-KfwUAAP__klmUFQ) are still heating up. Be sure you're taking advantage of them with advice from today's sponsor [Brad's Deals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQhU9jOpB_wEDhIhKi27QprVl7AEcGs7ZZtLePSCLlAGlnnj69933c9A2cd9v8DiuqPAW94Zk85oxRHymjWaYQDWaMMcTdh5yXEzSnvCkZL5nUFpx_6bqwakLkKApUrJVN1wkuZLGovkewCLRtqLnzrjUomsk0traNRGSicOqiMc4kY7RldTV1QiAgo4b2KHpBaorW5RCrz-C2vODkX-GJsTJhLbxact4TEW-Ej4SP53lW9wg2WQSfrgjhI5gH4aOHzbptJmI88qpTOKJBIoY_YGkzEC6v74rWHSsRg3Vp9_D6PRtYd3DzRsQw44YRfAnm8WOivGYQLo12loiB0Z43RVR2P533LsmW1HRewfnv3vlfsp-KfwUAAP__klmUFQ).

## Government Launches New 'US Tech Force'
The Trump administration has launched a [new federal initiative](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuuozAUheGnMZ0RvoRL4SKjEV2mmBRTIsdsg0fGm2PvBOXtj8grnHpJv5a-f7fpZkMMafljNzDkcUpwlAhEkKdnIXCrx-yAIGfMe0Si9bCTbOSFC8lFO802xPekq9l4AAmqAiO69tL3Sqq2Wg3oWcNDit7Li-3h0Qydd07pwQov-tZVwZw1IUUrRNMJXfteKbAgGtcMoAbFdANzIMz1fwyJVvDxjS_ItcOtimYl2gtTVyZHJsfjOOqtpHNjcoTEnWVy3DDBm8mRcC-EOUBhcnwWvpydtEEiHu0zuRUKd3bbbVgSJ-RryMAhLSEB5MI9Zm4DP1V4xvip2MyvV3HHr7-aqRFdmJn6_esUhaPcIe9VNvN-hBhDaTumm2WzIX6-04_AX0Z-BwAA___MU5gZ) called the U.S. Tech Force, aimed at hiring about 1,000 engineers and tech specialists on two‐year terms to work on upgrading federal technology. The projects include artificial intelligence, digital modernization, cybersecurity, data analytics, and related technology projects. The effort, part of a broader push to modernize outdated federal systems and accelerate AI adoption, will be based largely in Washington, D.C., with salaries expected to [range from $130,000 to $195,000](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbGOpDAMQL8mdB7FCTBMQTGnO7rdZosrUSBmklVIUGIW8fcn5heutJ78JD___Rg_jA8-vj7NSj0vaYx0lEDMlMe9MM1uSXkmppxT3kJidocZlVQNoAJsR2t8OMe6sv1CpEhX1OO9bbpOK91Wrq91vUwtoewmZVtscZLY3OWD7KRl0-nK95cNFbaI8o71bem0JkMoZ_kg_dCilmQ9p3z7Tj6yoyWc6YfybU5rFXrHvBWhn0INQg3HcdzWEi8m1EAR9iLUsKZIp1DDbDJRLiZasvts2Kd47TjPBC7thSCYPc6OCig4yWS4CsA7ATiffXxdA-S0v1w4AaWU8J2mAuwMw-FDgM2cgFpehBPgo5FSCjWYDM8nfqXt84_QQ5q9Ffr3r6s8HeWL8lbl3m6XwZf2Lmr5Wo0P7xv5vx7z06t_AQAA__-wm6Js). Tech Force collaborators include more than two dozen major tech companies, such as Apple, Google, Microsoft, Nvidia, OpenAI, Meta, Amazon Web Services, and others, which have pledged to consider participants for employment after their service.
## Son Arrested in Murder of Rob Reiner, Wife
Hollywood director [Rob Reiner and his wife of 36 years, Michele Singer Reiner,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb1jwcGwyMFSqvKVLVXW0CDzbVNgvgpdY-fsq_YXOV7o653xfpotPOe3Lh9_Q8UzTjkfNyIxlulfGsM5UAjKWQuWWiXk9_AQKTlKD1P0UfcrPqWuimxEBTYNOD_3JWgOmb1Y3Q0B7PUcFYP0pGNQ-DMFY32HUsYcmudebBt1rrQbdtbM1Bj1qFdQZzdmITmFMTKX9obTzinN-0gNLG2hrsluZb1WYNwGjgNFfw8ugXeg1Cxi_PgWMIGe671FG9FFmqtLvC2ascqUNJR07RhlTwcBUBIyVqTyFGVMU5l2D7ZSxfdcUF29HyjnVfhCdWjaf8h8E_6vcw8FvAAAA__8-SYJH) were found dead with stab wounds Sunday at their Brentwood home by their daughter Romy, who immediately told police to look at a "dangerous" family member. Their son Nick Reiner, 32, who struggled with drug addiction and homelessness for years, was [arrested and charged](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM1uwyAQhJ_GvmHB4r8cOPTiW3rt0SJ4iWkJRMsmKG9fuWqfoLdPmtFoZj7O69mGGNL13d7QsM9rwloiMiOtj8Lodp_JISNRpnvMzHu1K0gYhAKhxnWzIb7Wvt2MRwTULRo1jcM8a9BjuxslRytnN_QwIDo1XXAeB-ud1npycpBtMEeaAjUqJSfVd37WGi0q6eQJ9Uk3vcQtcKbuM4fEO_r4yk-kzuVbG83OfC-NfmtgaWCptXbp4o4Vh97AcmADy6OIX0rBfQnCkJCEJcLCuAmXU0LHISexoeW9CMqXP1cNHgW5ZKE_wTC1ZLZ7DTGGMk5NL683G-JPG_7XhU8D3wEAAP__briHbA) with murder and is being held without bail after allegedly attacking his parents during a heated argument. Nick had been seen [arguing with his father](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQAJ8Guo38FzCFi2vSfddeiQyswSfjRevNF-XtT7lX-OqRRqP58zV_xVxy3X_HE4Mkmiu-WkER5PnZBNcjEa8oyEx8FRI5XnE2ytxBG9DDvMVc3rPrt5AQDdoegx6Hu_fW2KE_grN-mqJWd-X86qxO0SVv4uKUR22s6nP42LTRg9Zq1O6WvLUYUatVTWgn2zmFWxbi21_KVQ5M5U3fyLeVzr6EQ-Rqnf3VmUdnHhfSVfCDOvNgWoAxV2RoVGEngVwhwpJ3SHk_BFaqsQItnLHCFVnesGAiRjifvCE3aPTkFRto7YfJjKbnsF2vXEpuw9g5tZ8xl_8p8qN_38H8CwAA__8E1IVb) at comedian Conan O'Brien's holiday party just 24 hours before the murders and co-wrote the 2015 film _Being Charlie_ about his addiction struggles, which his father directed. Reiner, who first won fame as an actor on the hit TV show _All in the Family_ , went on to [become a major director](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkE1v1DAQQH-Nc8vKHudrDzkssAEhSkGI7TFynHE9rROnzuym4dcj9i9wf3p6ek8P_YOhQPPzdzNhyy72M25rQGZM_XVltN7FZJExpZiWEJn9ZnqQUOYKclX1o6Gw90U2tg4RUGfYqroqm0aDrjLfNg6kdFaiHQAVGDc0qh6PVXMcSmlrk1H7z6ZAVUrJWhUH12iNBpW08oj6qEUhcSSO6fASaWaPLuzxhulg45SF1jMvq9AnAZ2Abtu2w83MxLszdEcEdD6GsG8xjgK6xUeOq4AuxSFPSDOmPJDDnOZ8IcvXhKvQ3ZrWwDQK_enkpg-PcVk-8-X0pbDvZ_yTX87D9QLnj-XL66-Rv5bvlfePbz-mJ3z77b-pn-lVbllqx2WjEGitalHI58lQuDfzf42-tfA3AAD__0AZlVM) on popular movies such as _The Princess Bride_ and _When Harry Met Sally._
## Financial Scams Against Seniors Skyrocket
Older Americans reported losses from financial fraud [that were four times higher](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtuhDAQAL8GOiN7zesKF2noLm1KtGfWhyNjI3s5wt9Hl19IPxqN5us-39EHH5-fuJFhl-ZIZwnETHk-CpNdXcqWmHJOeQ-JeT1xBgmdUCBUPy_owzW39WIcEZCuyaih78ZRg-7r1SzD6JTSTpMkSd0DRrCgpaUeyPaEtTdvmwLVKyUH1TZu1JqQlLTyRvqmq1bS4jnl5jv5yCu5cKUX5camrQ5mZd5LpT8qmCqYzvNsXPp5HMVHKuXNVDBtKdJVwZTCQlngRtlbjEWEVFgcuxiV6B5ix8LiIszC-YjRegzCZTwW4diKTHvKLApepc5m2U8fgi_9ULXyuaEPfzn8r4cvA78BAAD__-bHiR4) in 2024 than in 2020, according to a new report from the Federal Trade Commission (FTC). The report shows that reported fraud losses for adults 60 and older totaled about $2.4 billion lost to scams in 2024—up from about $600 million in 2020. Investment schemes caused the most damage, with $744 million in reported losses, while large losses exceeding $100,000 drove the surge and now account for 68% of all dollars lost by seniors. The FTC warns that actual losses could be far higher due to underreporting, and the actual amount of fraud could run as high as $81.5 billion. Experts offer [these safe practice tips](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAYRZ_GbCD_gAODhy5s6doROfZ1cGswsr8E5e2r9BU6XunqHOl8XZerjSnu90-7wVDIy46zJhChLI9KcGvIxYFQSi5HykTraRfJ5dAK2Qq9eBvTa-kbbwIgoRoYcdHDOCqpdLMawSdne6lVCG7QdhC-t-PkvPIa2mk00bxpQgotBL-IvgujUrAQ3PEJalKs5_CRcum-c9xpRUiv_ETpXN6aZFaiozL1weTM5HyeZ3dL1v1gJ5SjxIr3j8kZyaO0dkOJzu5tKPbh25RrRW1vMaWY98rk3BTjj_O9q76wnt83G9Ofiv7V52nkbwAAAP__vEZ8TQ) to help avoid financial fraud.

On this day in 1773, a mob organized by the Sons of Liberty raided three British ships and threw all the in a revolutionary-era protest that came to be known as the Boston Tea Party. It turns out spreading holiday cheer might actually be good for your health. As we report below, studies show that , especially in a group, can release endorphins, improve circulation, and even strengthen your lungs. Which Christmas carol is your favorite? Be sure you're taking advantage of them with advice from today's sponsor . | Government Launches New 'US Tech Force' The Trump administration has launched a called the U.S. Tech Force, aimed at hiring about 1,000 engineers and tech specialists on two‐year terms to work on upgrading federal technology. The projects include artificial intelligence, digital modernization, cybersecurity, data analytics, and related technology projects. The effort, part of a broader push to modernize outdated federal systems and accelerate AI adoption, will be based largely in Washington, D.C., with salaries expected to . Tech Force collaborators include more than two dozen major tech companies, such as Apple, Google, Microsoft, Nvidia, OpenAI, Meta, Amazon Web Services, and others, which have pledged to consider participants for employment after their service. Son Arrested in Murder of Rob Reiner, Wife Hollywood director were found dead with stab wounds Sunday at their Brentwood home by their daughter Romy, who immediately told police to look at a "dangerous" family member. Their son Nick Reiner, 32, who struggled with drug addiction and homelessness for years, was with murder and is being held without bail after allegedly attacking his parents during a heated argument. Nick had been seen at comedian Conan O'Brien's holiday party just 24 hours before the murders and co-wrote the 2015 film Being Charlie about his addiction struggles, which his father directed. Reiner, who first won fame as an actor on the hit TV show All in the Family , went on to on popular movies such as The Princess Bride and When Harry Met Sally. Financial Scams Against Seniors Skyrocket Older Americans reported losses from financial fraud in 2024 than in 2020, according to a new report from the Federal Trade Commission (FTC). The report shows that reported fraud losses for adults 60 and older totaled about $2.4 billion lost to scams in 2024—up from about $600 million in 2020. Investment schemes caused the most damage, with $744 million in reported losses, while large losses exceeding $100,000 drove the surge and now account for 68% of all dollars lost by seniors. The FTC warns that actual losses could be far higher due to underreporting, and the actual amount of fraud could run as high as $81.5 billion. Experts offer to help avoid financial fraud. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Terrorist Attack Hits Home, Paxton Sues TV Makers, and Wingsuit World Record
body:
Among the victims of a Sunday [terrorist attack](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHV4C4WXGNsCorXuMtrp0R8XMcoOERwFSez-pFnC1Mf6Sed_9fVXl3K6XH773Y09F6LfeDRMhJhtYS1lpoaOSIX7luitpUdn84Ch_Ei4CKUjS7lj5VdNJ5HLTo0YlLjPKtR8G4zfoguRo4TH1cX9Ky0HNeoOKyT4l4PXTInJkAoAVzIoUce9DQI7SWglrNjkmNMVGpPGxK-XVvzp7yw9qHsXTYb0bOx4R-DhcFyHEfvfTg3Bst5hsGS0wsZLOF-uw9afL73ibpq4vNIOaemJib5bXcp_4r0tw4vAz8BAAD__8vTccs) that targeted a Hanukkah celebration at Australia's Bondi Beach are friends and relatives of the Jewish communities in San Antonio, Houston, and College Station.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O5CAUBODT4KwtwBjbAcFKK2e96YYIw8N-Gmxa8Prv9iO35gYTfhWUSvX_aq8OEx7rP7eDoVfM9oBnTUAExRKUkgtWckTOf21Idcs73JyVXPYXIS9C2-Awva1qgll4mEQDRgy6H0fdC95sZuqHJYSwxGWJ3nV8mBbFey4HFbxT49SgOcuEFFpILlTXAvfT0IlpURImNTqmOASkXFragODlakzv_IDS-rw3yWxEt8q6P0zOTM4BXGrx8Hk9sMXM5OxitJ51c44RisXAur-aSX3GH4huOH0v6cdM6prvxcOJAivmwyUhhWiKCbcnpoRVD0zxdXeYPivod989jPwOAAD__50ggYg) | |
# Tuesday, December 16, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1863, Confederate colonel and future Texas governor [Sul Ross](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2SgyAUxfGnwU4Hrh9AQbGNXbbd0rnKNTKLkoE7Mb79TvIKW_2r8yvOz226YYjhuH_jTo5fa5oOOkskZsoTU84ph8LIjMvvFrhsaacHTiChrxXUapg8hnhNXeXdLL1VFTmlh96YoVey2hyubW-0wVnjsoBGa1ffmqUFLdfe4FoF98YUqEGBVF3bkFysbpWdOyDbGRSdJB845YY3YnphWeOVnpSbJe1VdBvzo4j2S8AoYDzPs-GyYTpiOKhJ-S5g_Kxqj1c9X-8IGOng_G5vZZWdf5whxlAGLTp53zHED87_u-Tp4C8AAP__L4l2OA) assumed command of a brigade formed from the Third, Sixth, Ninth, and 27th Texas Cavalry regiments, which thereafter became known as Ross's Brigade. We enjoyed featuring some of our readers' most memorable Thanksgivings last month, and we're doing the same thing for Christmas. Reply to this email with a story about one of your favorite Yuletides of yore, and it could show up in an upcoming edition! (Be sure to include your first name and town.) After being deployed for more than a year, Abiram and Brandon Lozoya of San Antonio surprised their mother during a recent shopping trip. Check out the heartwarming story [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu2zAMRb9G3hRYjK3Eg4Yu3l7XjgYtMTHxJCuQ-OL47wv1F7oQBAjw3HP_fC1fyJH3529M5OTzyMtOR40kQmURKiUXroIi6L83lrrlRC9coIdRG9DGLgE5nsvQBbf2YTIdOXOz4_1uR9N3m1vHCUOw43CdvFkt3j3ejO0JpnUNYIaOXXtmwFgDvRmuF-r9dLuaaR2ApuGOaugpsORykY2EPlgf8cxvKhefUxfdJvKq6vpLwaxgPo7j8l1R2lHB3GwUzDF7jArmhlIwG2ijbRV3jbvknbNOOeknSdVbjhzw1E3W58T7U9ef8ipcST9KThq98Jt0-JFTJ44sWE5d895QXXHhdXCMXO1NDf0zIcd_UeX_Cn47-BsAAP__KImRNw). ## Son of A&M Rabbi Injured in Bondi Beach Attack
Among the victims of a Sunday [terrorist attack](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHV4C4WXGNsCorXuMtrp0R8XMcoOERwFSez-pFnC1Mf6Sed_9fVXl3K6XH773Y09F6LfeDRMhJhtYS1lpoaOSIX7luitpUdn84Ch_Ei4CKUjS7lj5VdNJ5HLTo0YlLjPKtR8G4zfoguRo4TH1cX9Ky0HNeoOKyT4l4PXTInJkAoAVzIoUce9DQI7SWglrNjkmNMVGpPGxK-XVvzp7yw9qHsXTYb0bOx4R-DhcFyHEfvfTg3Bst5hsGS0wsZLOF-uw9afL73ibpq4vNIOaemJib5bXcp_4r0tw4vAz8BAAD__8vTccs) that targeted a Hanukkah celebration at Australia's Bondi Beach are friends and relatives of the Jewish communities in San Antonio, Houston, and College Station. The Jewish Federation of San Antonio told a local news outlet that the uncle of a local preschool teacher was among those killed in the attack. "_It’s even more important to gather together without fear, and not to let ourselves be intimidated_ ," [said Rabbi Chaim Block](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ymzAQhZ9GdPJoF4FNQZGG7qZNyaxBWBvrxyOtzeXtM-QVbnOaM3N-vj9f8xdx4PT4TdGN8r3lObm9BifiyiyulFy4ConQ8vQs1efoXjSjwU4DaujnlTgcs23W8W7WARo3wrXvbre-A9P40aywwdYiAEFrht5QZ9cOLawGbt21a3g8wwChBzRg24szy3BtYbhbdIO9kbLGrSy5XMQ7cd9Ut3DkjyuXJccmjF7kVVX7S-GkcNr3_fKsJKepcDrfKJxCXigonM4qhRPgKVbhVClpSpITZ_3X7Vy9XnKM78Ry6JjfJVW9UeRw6Oji3ZWqP7wIx6rzpj2l9_NJXlefs3B6aE6a3lUKBSaFU1PG9bVzCFz7q7LmEYnD_93yM9qfEf8FAAD__19VlSg). Rabbi Yossi Zaklikofsky of The Shul of Bellaire said his friend and colleague, Rabbi Eli Schlanger, helped organize the event and was one of those killed in the shooting. "_As far as I’m concerned, I don’t waver, I don’t cower, I don’t retreat_ ," [said Rabbi Zaklikofsky](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuuqzAQhldjOiN7MK_CxW3octtTIoMNjGKYyJ6EZPdHZAunGU3x6_sfP7fx5jDisf53e7D8Xmg8wpljYA5p5JASJczsmN1835DzRnt4uBEU1FKD1M3oHcbPaApvJ-V7XQSr26buuqbWqtjs5FWt9QTGAxjoOphq3wZTLe1SKa2aAu0F06AbDUqbqgxq7ttK95OB0JvOCaOCR6ZU8hY4vF1e4odeIZUz7UW0G_Mji-qfgEHAcJ5nOUec77DRMzMdl0rAcNUSMESaXRQwXJ4CBg3Xub4vWCY3TZhlpkPiIXF-yoVipBOPVbpn5uQiOpk3IsZjFTAUyfrHiTFiblph1Lo7jN9g_Lc5XxZ-AwAA__85RYlp). Rabbi Yossi Lazaroff of College Station is traveling to Australia to be with his 20-year-old son, Leibel Lazaroff, who is [in critical condition](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAUBODT4A4LXoDggmIbd9l2SwvMS8wGmwjexvHtV84V_maakb6R5s9tuvmU0_b47Vd09LmXacO9ZSTCOhHWWmpq5In8_FwStaWs-PITCNBcApdmij7lY1JddEHEQXbo5NVoa42WolucDnc7ayuFEWrWqIVQXlthBwwoZDBdcicmQRoJQqpLj2Ierhc5BAU4KOuZEhgTldrTgoQf3-75KG-s_VzWLruF6NXY5ReDkcG473v_DPQ5SwbjaTMYJZyhGIxfgPuVVx9CaryVjaft77-Kkbcjbnjw1bfG21IKpe3BYOyqi6895ZyauTIlHqtP-TtOP7vs7eB_AAAA__-5oX9x) but expected to survive. "_Whenever there's an attack, it's always personal, but this is a little more personal_ ," Rabbi Yossi Lazaroff said. His uncle, Rabbi Chaim Lazaroff of Chabad of Houston, shared his resolve with a local reporter at a menorah lighting in Sugar Land. "_When we have people that are trying to extinguish the light of the Jewish people, we will just burn bigger and brighter_ ," [he said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQRL_GzhhBGxsTEFzibC-90GpDe0CLzQh61rt_f_L9wsVPVap6fz7WD0w5nc_feJDj772sJ10tEzPVlanWUlNjZEb_GRO3WA564QoSRqFAqGkNmPLPqvvgNhms6skpM43zPI1K9tGhHSjYzU6jsSaEMO3BjgpMUMOGm6c-ubtMgZoUSKWHB0lvzaDspoGsnrHTkkLiUh8ciekb255_yhfVhy9Hn11kfrVu-NXB0sFyXdfjM5b3DTtYsHLymTpY7l8dLLl4zDd4N66YE4oDWxMtlsLpfIpY3o3LKQ46S8UoPFU6ypnoDsM8itFCUJvRwkgjhVZ2FxYnEtoDmZF82O3WVxdeV8o5tcl0Wj4PTPnfXP4_yV8O_gYAAP__9gSRMg).
## DPS Revokes Thousands of CDLs
The Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS) has [revoked thousands](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0b2upDAMBeCngS4jbMJfQbEN3d12S2QSM1gTyCjxDHfefsV2W9_Wn-Sjo_Pna_4iCXLcf9POo36vcT74zIFVOc3KKcUkWUmV3GMTzVvc-UkzVtgYQAPt7EnCZ7alH5fKD1DyCF3b9H3bQFVuIzEDOGpbYPC01AN2th48DeiZKqhLGa9ngNACVmDrG1du6GoYFos82J4KW7EXjemmGyt_U17DJ7453VzcyzBuqs9c1L8KnAqczvO8nSvRhQVOlFRc4AKnq1eBkxxvzip3UonHddD0cg857uY_ueCKMonf8cHZ6BZfmQ6fjfMhG1qVk1nZc6Jg6OVFzSoX509W3sWZZ4pL4P3KwL4zfcMdu6E3XQfe2Bobs4BjQ1AvZBH9SkuZRv88JQTJbVfY6r6ThH819WfjvEf8GwAA__-rAKbk) of commercial driver’s licenses after a federal audit uncovered "systemic" failures in how they were issued to drivers who are not U.S. citizens or permanent residents. Auditors found that nearly half the licenses examined [did not comply](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGP3CAQBeBfgztWgFlsFxRJ4e7SpEhpjWHWHgWMBXO7t_8-cv7C1U96eu_787F8ACU6tl-Q0fPXoywHvlpCZqwLY62lUmNghvB3J257yXjCYpS5S22kdksESu_FdtGvKk66Q68Hdx9Hd9eq2z04jKCU7u_gJoiDDqOF0aKdwMbBmo78VaaNdtoobfsbqjANvZ5Wa3CyIwirMBKXeuMdGb-gPdK7PLHeQsld8jvz2UT_Q5hZmBnWcD24beWKhZl_fjY6sDVh5hdV_M2lvoWZz1rWhLnJUHLGGgiSjJWeWJtMFPBo2CTlTFuFg5t8lM8jylFeGNikNmPvemtsV308X5QSNTcIq7YMlP4v4-95Pr35FwAA__8DvYxa) with federal standards. Some licenses did not expire until years after the drivers' work visas did. The department also "erroneously" issued a regular CDL to the non-domiciled truck driver responsible for a deadly crash on I-35 in Austin earlier this year. An October letter from the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration warned the state could lose $182 million in federal funding if the problem was not resolved. DPS Director Freeman Martin said the agency would "immediately pause" issuing non-domiciled CDLs and learner permits while the agency reviews the program. In a statement, a spokesperson for Gov. Greg Abbott [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unTAQhJ_GdHtkGzBQuDgNTXTTpEiJDF4Oq_gH2XsP9759RF4h3e6MZjT6fn8sH44CpddPF9Hy156XhFcNyIxlYSwlF6rsmN325yCuR454ukVL3YPSoMziHYXvpWu8XaWfVINWDaYfR9Mr2RzWtabXbjXaoxlXP_i-HeTUjdO-D-OwYkP2LlNaGaWl6toHym0aWjWtncapG53oJHriXB58IOOXq3v4zm8sjy3HJtiD-ayifQo9Cz1f1_WINd2e0DMm-KxCz2cOxLTd5-uOpoiJb73kNWCscBEfsOUYsWzkAvhCbyxQIdCGqWKFPRegGOlVXOL7_UweKMEINx-sUDPsrgg9uwLPp_q1__C1KdafF4VA1Qyik6_oKPzbzf9H-2313wAAAP__ZseXsA) "_public safety is the Governor’s top priority, and we must ensure that truckers can navigate Texas roadways safely and efficiently_."
## Dyess AFB Prepares for B-21's Arrival
Dyess Air Force Base in Abilene is preparing for the arrival of the next-generation B-21 Raider stealth bomber with 24 [ongoing construction projects](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp_GdF7ZAxgoXKShu2lTosEeLs6aNRrP_r19tHmFW3_Sp3POn6_lC1NOt-_feJCX11aWGz1rJhHiRYi5cKqCIhiue5K6l4NOXMBAry1o65aIKb-Xrol-NXGyDXk7uH4cXW9Ns_uwtavpLfRg3EBosDfjGAO5GFrjpqFJ_nNmwToLxnbthUyYhtZOawc0dSOqzlBMUvgiOwm9sG75XR7El1COJvtd5Kyq_aVgVjBf5VU_g4L5Y6JgziVgVjDHN9WqcVv1yXQiU9VbYb1qsJoxRWL9TLJr61adbhtjFb4HuTPpk8tfClIb9vF8ppxTdYPqzPeBKf_HkJ_Fe3j4FwAA__9ChYVl) totaling $1.6 billion. Dyess was [designated](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3u4yAQQPHT4A4LxviDguLfuEvaLa2xGWK02EQwGye3X2WvsBf46en9ui03jCmejzse5Pgd8nLSVRMxU1mYSsklVkZm3H7vkeueD3riAgp6qUHqYfEY02cxjXer8lY35PQ49NM09Fo1u1MTUDBK9X0Iw2pxnMB7FWjsTD8EPzbRfTENetCgtOlaUpsdO21XA2TNhMIo8pFzaXknpjfWkD75RaXd8tEktzM_q-h-BMwC5uu6Wv-hWlsM7RGTgPlOVxUw_xSOWyIBc2eVsdoKmDEWGXLZSOJ55j_nRlVW2vLpJZ5e8h6Ll6sELQtGT0WuWOmLNcX55xVTinUYhVGPA2P6F8T_t_Hl4G8AAAD__4r9hrE) the third operating base for the new bomber last year, and the U.S. House version of the 2026 National Defense Authorization Act provides $120 million in federal funding for the installation—four times the amount allocated last year. Contractors were [given a look](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ9GO4wgg1pQbGM3225pLnBRMigG7ozj22_cfYS_Os3JyXe-P8_5CSGGffkNG2r6-jTveJaIRJhnwpxTDoWACOxrDVTWtOEBs2jFg3HBuJodhHjNsnbatG7kNWreq8cwqAdv61VbrzovzdCNYNCj4EqhdAbVAB6hl3XQ9xgXXHHRctk12Nqx7_hopMBRDlDJFl2glBtakfALxccrfTA3Nm111CvRUaruVyWmSkzneTYmLDa9d8rXf9wF72olpvvbHW8bETI7EY60FwYZmU1b2BdmwL6YXWEzmFnyPtgAkRW4CgNi7sJSmGGCM_zgTpWY6qzdcYYYQ1F9JdtlgxD_kdHPfH60-BsAAP__kqCN-Q) at the projects on tap to get the base ready for the bomber's arrival, a date for which has not been announced. Among those projects are upgraded runways and new maintenance and storage buildings. U.S. Rep. Jodey Arrington (R-Lubbock), the chair of the House Budget Committee, [hailed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOpDAQRU9jMiPbGAOBg07QJrPJBhOiAhdgjbFbdk0z3H5FX2GiV1JJT___z4_pA3zwcfsLB1r6WdMU8SwBiTBPhDmn7AsBESxfu6eypwOfMCmhWi4Vl2Zy4MM16crZWbhBVmhlZ9q-N60U1W6lFK5ZnTadWqVo3DK3xszYGA1Db0BX3t4yqaSRSkjd1CiWoWvkMGuFg-6BaYHOU8o17Uj4A2UNV3phrpd0VMHuRM_CmgdTI1PjeZ71UeL9Y2rEyL8LU-NdiqnxfbsLS-GwzrwQRFc4JZ5xQf_Cmyk7PmeELx83vn5HdxNy9nGjFHmB65ZA5o-H_Lf-0Z9Vtu55-hB8MR3TYjvAh3c2-t2iL6v-BwAA__9NiYxP) the proposed federal funding as "_the largest authorized investment in the history of Dyess Air Force Base—a testament to its enduring role in service to our country and the brave men and women who embody the best of West Texas_."

clean_body: Among the victims of a Sunday that targeted a Hanukkah celebration at Australia's Bondi Beach are friends and relatives of the Jewish communities in San Antonio, Houston, and College Station. | | | | | | Tuesday, December 16, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1863, Confederate colonel and future Texas governor assumed command of a brigade formed from the Third, Sixth, Ninth, and 27th Texas Cavalry regiments, which thereafter became known as Ross's Brigade. We enjoyed featuring some of our readers' most memorable Thanksgivings last month, and we're doing the same thing for Christmas. Reply to this email with a story about one of your favorite Yuletides of yore, and it could show up in an upcoming edition! (Be sure to include your first name and town.) After being deployed for more than a year, Abiram and Brandon Lozoya of San Antonio surprised their mother during a recent shopping trip. Check out the heartwarming story . If you’ve ever wished you could take back control of your online privacy without jumping through a dozen technical hoops, today's sponsor, , offers a simpler path to a more anonymous digital life. Abilene ☁️ 66/41° | Amarillo ☁️ 62/33° | Austin ☁️ 60/41° | Brownsville ☁️ 74/53° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 69/52° | DFW ☁️ 61/40° | El Paso ☀️ 68/38° | Houston ☁️ 61/38° | Laredo 🌧️ 67/54° | Lubbock ☁️ 67/34° | Midland ☁️ 72/40° | San Antonio ☁️ 60/42° | Tyler ☁️ 58/35° | Waco ☁️ 56/38° Take The Flyoverwith you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Son of A&M Rabbi Injured in Bondi Beach Attack Among the victims of a Sunday that targeted a Hanukkah celebration at Australia's Bondi Beach are friends and relatives of the Jewish communities in San Antonio, Houston, and College Station. The Jewish Federation of San Antonio told a local news outlet that the uncle of a local preschool teacher was among those killed in the attack. "It’s even more important to gather together without fear, and not to let ourselves be intimidated ," . Rabbi Yossi Zaklikofsky of The Shul of Bellaire said his friend and colleague, Rabbi Eli Schlanger, helped organize the event and was one of those killed in the shooting. "As far as I’m concerned, I don’t waver, I don’t cower, I don’t retreat ," . Rabbi Yossi Lazaroff of College Station is traveling to Australia to be with his 20-year-old son, Leibel Lazaroff, who is but expected to survive. "Whenever there's an attack, it's always personal, but this is a little more personal ," Rabbi Yossi Lazaroff said. His uncle, Rabbi Chaim Lazaroff of Chabad of Houston, shared his resolve with a local reporter at a menorah lighting in Sugar Land. "When we have people that are trying to extinguish the light of the Jewish people, we will just burn bigger and brighter ," . DPS Revokes Thousands of CDLs The Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS) has of commercial driver’s licenses after a federal audit uncovered "systemic" failures in how they were issued to drivers who are not U.S. citizens or permanent residents. Auditors found that nearly half the licenses examined with federal standards. Some licenses did not expire until years after the drivers' work visas did. The department also "erroneously" issued a regular CDL to the non-domiciled truck driver responsible for a deadly crash on I-35 in Austin earlier this year. An October letter from the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration warned the state could lose $182 million in federal funding if the problem was not resolved. DPS Director Freeman Martin said the agency would "immediately pause" issuing non-domiciled CDLs and learner permits while the agency reviews the program. In a statement, a spokesperson for Gov. Greg Abbott "public safety is the Governor’s top priority, and we must ensure that truckers can navigate Texas roadways safely and efficiently." Dyess AFB Prepares for B-21's Arrival Dyess Air Force Base in Abilene is preparing for the arrival of the next-generation B-21 Raider stealth bomber with 24 totaling $1.6 billion. Dyess was the third operating base for the new bomber last year, and the U.S. House version of the 2026 National Defense Authorization Act provides $120 million in federal funding for the installation—four times the amount allocated last year. Contractors were at the projects on tap to get the base ready for the bomber's arrival, a date for which has not been announced. Among those projects are upgraded runways and new maintenance and storage buildings. U.S. Rep. Jodey Arrington (R-Lubbock), the chair of the House Budget Committee, the proposed federal funding as "the largest authorized investment in the history of Dyess Air Force Base—a testament to its enduring role in service to our country and the brave men and women who embody the best of West Texas." | Flying together with our sponsor Tired of scam calls or scared of identity theft? Time to go anonymous. Becoming truly anonymous online is hard—. Experts say there are several steps you can take: ➤ Use a VPN all the time ➤ Buy a burner phone instead of a smartphone ➤ Use a secure email service instead of Gmail or Yahoo ➤ Delete your social media accounts and associated data . Incogni helps you disappear online by erasing your personal data from brokers, search engines, and any site where it leaks. Build a private digital presence, layer by layer. Hide what should stay hidden—start with Incogni. () ➤ Attorney General Ken Paxton is suing five TV manufacturers, accusing them of collecting data on Texans' viewing habits and selling it to advertising companies. The defendants include Sony, Samsung, LG, and Chinese manufacturers Hisense and TCL. () ➤ The Harris County Democratic Party approved a resolution to withhold future endorsements from Houston Mayor John Whitmire, citing his participation at a fundraiser for U.S. Rep. Dan Crenshaw (R-Humble). () ➤ Dallas: The city council approved $10 million in federal relief funding to help 400 homeless residents find stable housing. A member who voted against the spending asked what the city would do when the funding expired, suggesting it was "FIFA cleanup money." () ➤ Bexar County: Federal agents arrested a man suspected of placing pipe bombs next to the ATMs of two San Antonio banks in September. A "home explosives lab" was found at Dustin Ammons' house on Friday, according to the Department of Justice. () ➤ Shelby County: Avian influenza was discovered in a commercial poultry flock last week, marking the first confirmation of the disease in a Texas commercial facility this year. Several bird deaths have been reported. () ➤ Austin: The University of Texas is soliciting bids for a new 6,000-seat arena for its volleyball team. The Longhorns currently play most of their home games in the 4,000-seat Gregory Gymnasium. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. We would like to emphasize that we do not offer tailored financial advice. This email does not serve as financial guidance, and you bear full responsibility for your investment decisions. body:
We can’t sit by and let extremists destroy the core tenets of our democracy
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121365571/589222431/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxNjQzMTI2LTdmZGEtZjAxMS04MTk2LTAwMGQzYTFkNWFmZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zHtbp2nb5STaI6W_Doc8eP8np00LhC-aPY7Ktha2zJA=&emci=61f8a0aa-04da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&emdi=f1643126-7fda-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&ceid=8431045)

Peter, 2025 has taught us that redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade fight. It’s happening every day. And every second counts when it comes to protecting fair maps and ensuring our democracy is truly representative. Right now, the NDRC is preparing for several threats next year, from the highest level at the U.S. Supreme Court to redistricting fights in state legislatures across the country. In some way or another, these attacks could cause long-lasting harm to voting rights and jeopardize fair representation as we know it. **[Your support is crucial to keep us ready to respond to these attacks. # Round Two of Primary Recommendations
---
| |

| TFVC continues to vet candidates for the **2026 Primary Election** so that you can head to the polls on March 3rd with confidence! These candidates and incumbents have proven themselves to be **committed to our cause through their steadfast support of TFVC's mission** to protect and advance informed consent, medical privacy and vaccine choice. If you don’t see the name of someone running whom you know would help us defend medical liberty, be sure to share [our survey](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTczOTQ5MjIyODM1NDU1NDEzLFwiclwiOjE3Mzk0OTI2OTc3NzA1Nzc0Nn0iLCJzIjoiMzMxODc5MWI5MGE0MGQ1NCJ9) with them! **Our second round of recommendations includes:** Jon Bonck, CD 38 David Cook, SD 22 Chris Spencer, HD 1

subject: [New Report] SCOTUS is Poised to Decimate Fair Representation in State Legislatures
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Here’s what can happen at the state level if the Supreme Court guts Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121366712/589224510/1793776944?refcode=emm_ffa_20251216_T1_VRAreport_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM3OTc4MS04MWRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38zSTozZ1QjljEt70W1SYUC8gOa_7I7bbS4yfaIINC4=&emci=23ebb635-21da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&emdi=1a379781-81da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&ceid=1037277)

| | Our latest report exposes a new dimension of the threat posed by a pending Supreme Court decision. The right-wing justices seem likely to gut Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, our central safeguard against racially discriminatory redistricting. We’d already found that such a ruling could secure 19 new safe Republican seats in the U.S. House. Enough to cement long-term control even if Democrats win the popular vote. But the damage wouldn’t end there. **[Our new report](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121366713/589224511/325450178?refcode=emm_ffa_20251216_T1_VRAreport_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM3OTc4MS04MWRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38zSTozZ1QjljEt70W1SYUC8gOa_7I7bbS4yfaIINC4=&emci=23ebb635-21da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&emdi=1a379781-81da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&ceid=1037277), co-released this week with Black Voters Matter Fund, details the additional, sweeping consequences at the state legislative level. As a result of the ruling, lawmakers could:**
* **Eliminate approximately 191 state legislative seats** currently held by Democrats across 10 Southern states — the vast majority of these are Black representatives for majority-minority districts
* **Decimate fair representation and minority political power** at the state level
* Lock in GOP supermajorities for a generation
* Block progress on healthcare, civil rights, education, criminal justice reform, and more

**This would represent a massive erasure of fair representation for people of color, silencing millions of voices and undoing the gains in political power that communities of color fought for and built over generations.** [**Click here to read the report, and share it with five people you know. Tell them what’s at stake: core American principles of fair representation and protecting people from discrimination.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121366715/589224512/325450178?refcode=emm_ffa_20251216_T1_VRAreport_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM3OTc4MS04MWRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38zSTozZ1QjljEt70W1SYUC8gOa_7I7bbS4yfaIINC4=&emci=23ebb635-21da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&emdi=1a379781-81da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&ceid=1037277) We’re raising the alarm with this new report right now because the window to protect Black and Latino political power and fair representation is closing. The fight ahead requires immediate action, sustained organizing, and strategic investment. As soon as the Supreme Court releases a decision gutting Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (if they do), state lawmakers will likely move quickly to draw new maps. But with this team’s support, we’ll more than match their urgency. Our pro-democracy movement will:
* Fight back against any proposed racially discriminatory maps
* Work with partners to redraw fair maps wherever possible to offset map rigging
* Advocate for pro-democracy reforms at the state and federal level to ensure fair representation
* Push Congress to investigate and expose unfair maps that silence minority voices
* Demand transparency and accountability from the Supreme Court

**Through grassroots mobilization, public education, coalition building, and public pressure, we can keep up the fight for fair representation, and for our democracy.** **And we must.** [**Power our movement to protect free and fair with a donation today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121366716/589224513/-1580673587?refcode=emm_ffa_20251216_T1_VRAreport_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM3OTc4MS04MWRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38zSTozZ1QjljEt70W1SYUC8gOa_7I7bbS4yfaIINC4=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121366717/589224514/-1580673587?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ffa_20251216_T1_VRAreport_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM3OTc4MS04MWRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38zSTozZ1QjljEt70W1SYUC8gOa_7I7bbS4yfaIINC4=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121366718/589224515/-1580673587?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ffa_20251216_T1_VRAreport_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM3OTc4MS04MWRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38zSTozZ1QjljEt70W1SYUC8gOa_7I7bbS4yfaIINC4=)

Dear USO Supporter,
For thousands of service members, the holidays are a stark reminder of the family they left behind to serve our country far from home.
So as you search for truly meaningful gifts to give your loved ones this holiday season, please consider a gift that can help a service member who may be missing everyone and everything they love this Christmas.
**When you make an honor donation to the USO, we will send an electronic greeting on your behalf to your honoree to let them know that this gift can help support our nation 's heroes.**
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~Cy74KZfLY/c3JsOU96STJkK1F1T1hsSTArNVpWZ0VXM0dXbE4vR2NFeU54RVFraDhWNk8rWXBrMnphemRtUVg4WGhUVEJVbXZZSk5aSVB5WVd2OERXc1gwT1JhYlU4aEFQbzJORmVoUEh2Qmxrd3o0Nk09S0/OTRoYnlTcW80TjJUL3BLMGFiM1NJaWNWdUtqSHZ6ZjJBWFIxcGd0NFhJYjkwM3F1V0Jwa1huYWNTMkNyd0oyMEdUbVNrcUdkWGxTQ1BpSlNDMnFFUnlwVnQ1dDl6UjRPS0)

spirits of those serving far from home**](https://links.e.uso.)
| **[GIVE NOW](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
**[Please make a tribute donation today, and we'll send a holiday greeting that reminds a loved one that connection still reaches across any distance. ](https://links.e.uso.)**
Your gift helps the USO provide a lifeline of home when many of our service members need it most. Your support can help fund USO Centers to host holiday events and serve festive meals that forge connections and bring a taste of home to deployment locations around the world. And the USO Canine Program offers comfort and companionship to help ease loneliness and stress.
**[Honor someone you care about and lift the spirits of those serving far from home by making a gift in honor of someone you love today.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/pKbLQd4wR-Q6/c3JsOU96STJkK1F1T1hsSTArNVpWZ0VXM0dXbE4vR2NFeU54RVFraDhWNk8rWXBrMnphemRtUVg4WGhUVEJVbXZZSk5aSVB5WVd2OERXc1gwT1JhYlU4aEFQbzJORmVoUEh2Qmxrd3o0Nk09S0/OTRoYnlTcW80TjJUL3BLMGFiM1NJaWNWdUtqSHZ6ZjJBWFIxcGd0NFhJYjkwM3F1V0Jwa1huYWNTMkNyd0oyMEdUbVNrcUdkWGxTQ1BpSlNDMnFFUnlwVnQ1dDl6UjRPS0)**

# Let’s Celebrate Christmas Together
---
| | Join Kevin Kijewski & Republicans from across our great state of Michigan at the[Historic Redford Theater
17360 Lahser Road
Detroit, Michigan](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=bc4980cfe2&e=4b10910eed)With the season’s classic fan favorite IT’S A WONDERFUL LIFE
Featuring James Stewart Saturday, December 20
2 PM (doors open at 1 PM)Tickets $7, seniors & children $5 (payable at the box office in cash only – advance tickets not required). The Redford Theater is a not-for-profit organization focused on renewing the Old Redford region of Detroit & the historic Redford Theater. All proceeds go directly to the Redford Theater.[Tickets are available online for purchase by clicking here](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=171fdbafea&e=4b10910eed). Online sales end 30 minutes prior to beginning of movie start.Tour this historic themed theater and enjoy their extensive Christmas & holiday decorations and massive model train sets in the front of the theater. This event will be fun for the entire family! The Redford Theater boasts about helping launch the career in the film industry of George C. Scott, legendary actor, Detroit native, whom as a boy served as an usher at this famous theater. Parking: Free parking on the street outside the theater plus complimentary, fenced and secured parking is located immediately adjacent to the theater with the same available immediately across the street. Old Reford is a revived neighborhood in Detroit known for strong community ties and family oriented businesses.

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x) [ **!!️Please read this email and complete our urgent poll below !!️**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=3&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x) **Look, Elizabeth Warren is CALLING OUT the Electoral College: ** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=4&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x) She’s so right! Donald Trump is only President because of the **OUTDATED, UNFAIR,** and **UNDEMOCRATIC** Electoral College.

Remember: Hillary Clinton won the popular vote in 2016 but her victory was overruled, _all because of the Electoral College._

**We’ll be blunt. It needs to go IMMEDIATELY!**

So, we’re launching an urgent poll for Democrats in your area to gauge support for the Electoral College. [ **Team: Do you think the Electoral College is undemocratic?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=5&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=6&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x)

| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=7&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x)

[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=8&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x)
---

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=9&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x)
Here's the honest truth, team.
[ **The Electoral College is a 238-year-old antiquated system that NO LONGER serves the American people.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=10&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x)
BUT, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans know that they will never win another Presidential election if we get rid of the Electoral College!

All they care about is holding onto power and they will do whatever it takes to keep it – even if that means silencing voters...

[**Voting is an ESSENTIAL building block of our democracy and when its integrity is compromised, so is our Democracy.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=11&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x)

[**We need 9,382 more responses from your area before midnight in order to gauge support. If we don’t hit our goal, it will make it incredibly difficult to formulate our strategy moving forward. Your response is crucial.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71039?t=12&akid=23735%2E4449941%2EDO0F8x)

Thank you for your participation,

Fight for Reform

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I owe you this update, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter - I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later.
I've come to truly appreciate your consistent record.
With everything you've given to our movement, there was no question in my mind that I needed to send you this message ASAP.
I'd hate to see this opportunity pass you by.
That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency!

1. **THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you!**
2. **You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy?**

clean_body: Peter - I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later. I've come to truly appreciate your consistent record. With everything you've given to our movement, there was no question in my mind that I needed to send you this message ASAP. I'd hate to see this opportunity pass you by. That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency! 1. THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you! 2. You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy? I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to upgrade today with this limited time offer! [Because of your proven record, you're just [1] contribution away from a YEAR of PLATINUM STATUS!]( look forward to hearing back from you.
