name: Roy Cooper
subject: It’s time to ban individual stock trading for members of Congress
body:
Are you with me?
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)
Peter, today I’m announcing that as a U.S. Senator, I won’t own or trade individual stocks. During my eight years as Governor of North Carolina, I followed that same policy. In a second, I will explain why, but **[if that’s all you need to hear, then send a contribution my campaign’s way today.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2701?t=7&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)** If not, keep reading. Leaders in the legislative branch like Senators and members of Congress, and leaders in the executive branch like the President, Cabinet Secretaries and other leaders confirmed by the Senate are there to serve the people they represent, not to trade a company's stock on insider knowledge to get rich. The problem is, too many Washington politicians are more interested in using the inside knowledge they gain from their power to enrich themselves and their families. It’s past time to ban congressional and executive leader stock trading. **It’s wrong, it leads to corruption and it has to stop. I’m ready to lead by example.** I will not trade individual company stocks now during my time as a candidate or when I’m elected to serve as the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. I can make that promise because, intentionally, I don’t own any individual stocks now — and I will not buy any individual stocks when I get to Washington. I’m not running for Senate to take the information I learn in private meetings and use it to trade stocks just so that I can make a buck. I’m running to make housing more affordable, bring health care costs down, and end the chaotic tariff nonsense that’s driving up prices on almost anything Americans buy. **[That’s why I strongly support a congressional and executive branch leader stock trading ban. I need to know if you’re with me, Peter. Sign my petition today to join me and call for a ban on congressional stock trading.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/stocktradingpetition/?source=em_RC_PET_RRstocktradingpet_121625&t=8&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/stocktradingpetition/?source=em_RC_PET_RRstocktradingpet_121625&t=9&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)
---
Thanks for taking a stand,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/stocktradingpetition/?source=em_RC_PET_RRstocktradingpet_121625&t=10&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=85%2E124072%2ESJKcB7)

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
National Republicans see this race as their best opportunity to stop Democrats from retaking control of the Senate, and they’ve already spent millions of dollars on ads attacking Jon.
Hey, Peter!
**[If you can afford it, we’re humbly asking you to split a $10 contribution between Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251216-9821&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=9821%2E614464%2EVLnq5k)**
Sorry to be so direct, but Jon is the ONLY Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Trump won. **He is without a doubt MAGA’s number one target.**
The latest polls show this race statistically tied. And experts at the Cook Political Report have officially named this race a “Toss-Up.”
National Republicans see this race as their best opportunity to stop Democrats from retaking control of the Senate, and they’ve already spent millions of dollars on ads attacking Jon.
So we’re asking for your help to ensure we have the resources to respond to the onslaught of right-wing money flooding into Georgia and set the record straight.
**Because the truth is we either respond now or risk losing Georgia to a full-blown MAGA takeover.**
**[Please, split a donation of $10 between Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today. We wouldn’t ask if it was not so important.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251216-9821&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9821%2E614464%2EVLnq5k)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jon Ossoff and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:

This team has won in Georgia before. We know what it takes. And together, we will do it again.
Thanks so much for chipping in, Peter.
We promise, if we all do our part, it will pay off on Election Day.
Gratefully,
Team Ossoff

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Real talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for the People PAC ([fightforthepeoplepac
body:
Peter, let me explain why I decided to form this new PAC and why your support is so critical right now.

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-em?refcode=em251216-b-real&refcode2=831_2563979_Xk0rCt&akid=831%2E2563979%2EXk0rCt)
It’s Kamala. In a moment, I am going to ask you to [**make a contribution to my new PAC, Fight for the People, before our last FEC deadline of 2025.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-em?refcode=em251216-b-real&refcode2=831_2563979_Xk0rCt&akid=831%2E2563979%2EXk0rCt)**
Peter, let me explain why I decided to form this new PAC and why your support is so critical right now.
You may know that throughout my career, I have invoked a consistent mantra: The power is with the people. That idea is from the founders, that “We the People” have the power to shape our own fate.
Today, Americans are skeptical of whether this remains true. They wonder whether hard work alone is enough to ensure a good future for themselves and their families. And they see that so much of our nation’s political and economic power is concentrated in the hands of so few.
So real talk:
People are done with the status quo. They are ready to break things to force change.
Those of you reading this email have not been deterred. All of your support over this past year and Democrats’ victories this November are proof of that.
You have sent a message: You want leaders who _fight_.
For affordability, for health care, for the right of people to participate in their democracy. Americans want people who fight for them.
So together, we must declare that the power does not belong to any king or set of oligarchs. **It belongs to We the People.**
That is what I will continue to do in 2026. And that is why I have created a new PAC focused on fighting for the people.
**Peter, when we know what we stand for, we go out and fight for it. So I am asking you to join me in this commitment by making a donation before our final FEC deadline of the year.**
[**Please contribute $5 or whatever amount is meaningful to you to Fight for the People PAC before our last fundraising deadline of 2025. Every donation shows that we are ready to fight for our future and for the people — because the stakes have never been higher.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-em?refcode=em251216-b-real&refcode2=831_2563979_Xk0rCt&akid=831%2E2563979%2EXk0rCt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-em?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em251216-b-real&refcode2=831_2563979_Xk0rCt&akid=831%2E2563979%2EXk0rCt)**
---

Kamala

name: 6X MATCH EXTENDED (via HMP)
subject: we’re pleading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by HMP, # [#]
body:

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: My thoughts are with the Brown community
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=jCJtyejXp6MwcsRmZngFlR%2B8fW2XWvAF2psvklxVtB8%2BZbXiAJc6F1hhqd2eijn07zxWT%2BNrnCYC2%2BWya3htmrBbsIOrpJA1OHaWhwCaGK5wU79XrnO%2BOuxv%2B72BKE80WVIfZB%2FjKlvIN%2FcHfPBPSnVfBgGbj377l3gryweVqHvQiAaZLL7dyxKu320AK2UdXQe0wpNwfdwauUauVrcVHmgqRbxKITwOLH4c1Fc8lvY06Q17Z46%2FiWP96K6Hmu%2FKek1w7UmBsODJfElk1h3uSJqG3vf5iKWKguBf5UzeLZ1WX7vGleoWtsthyONELb%2FTShYBVTxFKxYq3MdZGADm6FMyf97rahK%2BsOJVJg6Sr7DlArWp7ufOqvHOUfmjKqCJ6s4suFNbjnrSIgxFpdHJMqCjQ4qC3BX9OKM8WcpxU9MvepzP0kUiCMd2KKaiR9pe)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter,

I am mourning with the Brown University community and all of Rhode Island following the horrific shooting on campus this Saturday.

This is a heartbreaking tragedy, and it strikes especially close to home. Brown is a place where students, faculty, staff, and families come together to learn, work, and build their futures. That violence would touch this community, particularly as students were preparing to head home for the holidays, is devastating.

My heartfelt sympathies are with the victims and their families, and I want to express my sincere support to every member of the Brown community feeling shaken or afraid right now.

I am grateful to the law enforcement officers and first responders who courageously responded to the scene and continue working to locate the shooter. While the investigation is ongoing, anyone with information about the incident should contact law enforcement immediately at 401-272-3121 or submit it online [at this link.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121382107/589269670/-1825003385?source=EM_NBI_SM_20251216_FR_BUShooting_0_6MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDdiZTg4Ny04ZmRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvrjXtFTW6OSm4ib8-FBcYZmnFsX0QKEbDvYai8B7Ns=&emci=8057544a-8fda-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&emdi=ad7be887-8fda-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&ceid=15384964)

In moments like this, our community’s resilience and unity are vital.

— Seth
* * *

| PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
---
PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940
---
If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=jCJtyejXp6MwcsRmZngFlR%2B8fW2XWvAF2psvklxVtB8%2BZbXiAJc6F1hhqd2eijn07zxWT%2BNrnCYC2%2BWya3htmrBbsIOrpJA1OHaWhwCaGK5wU79XrnO%2BOuxv%2B72BKE80WVIfZB%2FjKlvIN%2FcHfPBPSnVfBgGbj377l3gryweVqHvQiAaZLL7dyxKu320AK2UdXQe0wpNwfdwauUauVrcVHmgqRbxKITwOLH4c1Fc8lvY06Q17Z46%2FiWP96K6Hmu%2FKek1w7UmBsODJfElk1h3uSJqG3vf5iKWKguBf5UzeLZ1WX7vGleoWtsthyONELb%2FTShYBVTxFKxYq3MdZGADm6FMyf97rahK%2BsOJVJg6Sr7DlArWp7ufOqvHOUfmjKqCJ6s4suFNbjnrSIgxFpdHJMqCjQ4qC3BX9OKM8WcpxU9MvepzP0kUiCMd2KKaiR9pe).

| | , As we head toward the end of the year, I want to be clear with you about where this campaign stands. **We have momentum.**
**We have support from** [**leaders across Texas**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=e2eb2e1f04&e=5d8d80652b).
**We have a real path to winning the Democratic nomination for Attorney General on March 3.** But momentum only matters if we sustain it. [**Make a contribution today >>>**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=1a6ae60894&e=5d8d80652b)

This campaign is about restoring integrity to the Office of the Texas Attorney General and standing up to MAGA cruelty with courage and the rule of law. If you believe in that mission, I’m asking you to help us finish the year strong. [**Please consider making a contribution by December 31.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=6f3d77d6cb&e=5d8d80652b) Together, we can carry this momentum forward and build a campaign Texans can believe in. Onward!

subject: An unusual request…
body:
Secure your 2026 membership! |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121383551/589274931/2025016083?refcode=WUEFEL34_20251216_Fwd2Friends_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057475&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmU5MzJlZC04ZmRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ri2nWvG9XMPmBnO5mKkxCu4A0_rdV1YgRzh7u3L-h-w=) Peter,

Happy holidays and happy membership season!

What better way to show your holiday spirit than by giving your loved ones the gift of supporting Democratic pro-choice women?

Our pro-choice community is at the heart of everything EMILYs List does. When the going gets tough, knowing we have a millions-strong community of pro-choice champions behind us keeps our movement strong. [**So with another big year ahead, will you forward this email to two people, right now, who might want to become official 2026 EMILYs List members?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121383564/589274935/2025016083?refcode=WUEFEL34_20251216_Fwd2Friends_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057475&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmU5MzJlZC04ZmRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ri2nWvG9XMPmBnO5mKkxCu4A0_rdV1YgRzh7u3L-h-w=) And don't think we forgot about you, Peter: tomorrow night is the last day to become an EMILYs List early bird member, so don't wait! | Drama, division, and constant national embarrassment -- instead of solutions, service, or stability.
But now, with Marjorie Taylor Greene resigning, we finally have a chance to change the story.
This district shouldn't have to worry about who their representative is fighting with, what feud they're starting, or which headline they're chasing next. Families here deserve a representative who shows up, listens, and puts people before politics.
And for the first time in a long time, we can build the GA-14 we want -- a district known for community, not chaos... dignity, not division... and leadership that brings people together instead of tearing them apart.
I'm running for Congress because I believe this moment is bigger than a resignation. It's a chance to reset. To rebuild. To prove that Northwest Georgia is ready for something better -- and that we can step into this new chapter with hope instead of fear.
[But opportunity only becomes progress if we organize now. Republicans will do everything they can to keep this seat locked in dysfunction. Grassroots power is how we break that cycle. Will you make a donation today to help us build a new future for GA-14?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tmxF7WipuYOFF_2Vo9jGRIfG-5V00dq21jACN8nZiFl6TWiSrulhgyTFbhAr5Vnzlr4XCydu1dWGOWb7FJIjC_Y3E2kp509tXOtszurDJZWC48-o2EFxxPLp0kq5m32nY6slXRqPz-CGFkHn8YuGrZpwEz0s6_A7EtkeWuEsI1mgblECSdrc5kfLuGnlL7CuVFye2gIYX6FzmbjpQJx994Amz_l_3VOx&c=ABdSdYmQPQm92Yeqiq2eQ4VfgVlR1yQzFjMybS9UOvwWLvCbu0Dx_w==&ch=4l630cn42UJJy8iJxLuSz18HtGInuV8k3_llmEp7jdxTRBOZSDlLjw==)

clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | This is what has defined our district for years: | | == | Drama, division, and constant national embarrassment -- instead of solutions, service, or stability. But now, with Marjorie Taylor Greene resigning, we finally have a chance to change the story. This district shouldn't have to worry about who their representative is fighting with, what feud they're starting, or which headline they're chasing next. Families here deserve a representative who shows up, listens, and puts people before politics. And for the first time in a long time, we can build the GA-14 we want -- a district known for community, not chaos... dignity, not division... and leadership that brings people together instead of tearing them apart. I'm running for Congress because I believe this moment is bigger than a resignation. It's a chance to reset. To rebuild. To prove that Northwest Georgia is ready for something better -- and that we can step into this new chapter with hope instead of fear. == | | | | | == | == | == | == This is our moment. Let's build something better together. -- Shawn Harris | | == | SHAWN FOR GEORGIA | P.O. Box 1688 | Cedartown, GA 30125 US | | | | | |

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Why spending in retirement isn't just about money
body:
| Hi Peter, What are you looking forward to the most when you retire? Traveling and relaxing are at the top of most people's lists. So is having more free time. With that, many people who haven't yet retired expect to have an active lifestyle, jet setting around with less free time than they have now.1 The reality? About 2 in 3 retirees (64%) have more than 40 hours of free time a week. Most of them (83%) spend most of their time watching movies or TV.1 That could be why boredom worries some retirees more than running out of money. The takeaway is that free time is wonderful, but it won't fill itself. If you'd rather thrive in retirement, not drift through it, it can all come down to how you spend your free time and how you make the most of it. And guess what? The happiest retirees have cracked that code. They fill their free time with meaningful activities (and a lot of them).1 And that's not all happy retirees have figured out.
---
|
---
[**Want to see what it takes to live a wonderfully satisfying life in retirement? Click here.**](https://financeinsights.net/ze6jU6v61f3rMJbfJD0m8iW8w3Z?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) To more intentional planning that pays off,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**

name: Representative Jolanda  Jo  Jones
subject: This race is too important to sit on the sidelines.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-jj?refcode=12%2F16_jje [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-jj?refcode=12%2F16_jje]
Friend,
This race is too important to sit on the sidelines.
On January 31, 2026, voters will elect the next Member of Congress in a special election to fill a seat that has been vacant for far too long. I feel compelled to weigh in because this moment matters—and because I owe my supporters a clear answer.
In November, nearly 20% of voters—almost 15,000 people—put their trust in me. Since then, I have been asked one question over and over again: Who should we vote for?
People are not asking whether they should sit this election out. They are asking who to support. And many have told me plainly that if they don’t have an answer, they will not vote. That is unacceptable.
I live in Texas’ 18th Congressional District. I ran a grueling campaign across this district, and when you campaign alongside people, you learn who they are. While I entered the race without preconceived opinions about my opponents, the campaign itself made clear who is prepared for this moment—and who our community needs right now.
That is why I am proud to endorse Amanda Edwards for Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-jj?refcode=12%2F16_jje&refcode2=cc61669c-90da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-jj?refcode=12%2F16_jje [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-jj?refcode=12%2F16_jje]
This race, and this moment in time, demand leadership that understands the district, respects the voters, and is ready to serve immediately.
After everything I have seen and experienced, I am confident that Texas 18 needs Amanda Edwards for this moment in time. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-jj?refcode=12%2F16_jje&refcode2=cc61669c-90da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe]
My supporters deserve clarity. Our district deserves representation. And our democracy requires participation.
For these reasons, this endorsement is offered for the January 31, 2026 special election, and I encourage those who supported me—and everyone who cares about the future of Texas 18—to show up and vote.
Representative Jolanda “Jo” Jones
Texas House District 147
Rush A Donation Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-jj?refcode=12%2F16_jje]
Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. name: Ho Ho Ho
subject: Grandma Boebert parties with felon George “Santos Claus”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
It’s embarrassing, but also points to how Lauren Boebert will lose this election.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00126pkEcod0xTuZVAOlw56zxj2ZJpeWJLhlBRY3T4dSZUPlgHGEdYH8ekOHZLESnqZZYMp8Bk9YAdYoveQk2qgWg7KkIUpQ5BOyxtfYLh05yVrb20-QoAz7IigLfibjV_eEEqPfcvI68LW28NM4hQCryY370cC-ZXMhBxZsFP9BUEhdnkSU2hTff6MWalk24EhbW-D3AJNMlTuyqrKcxn-Bn3NMgdTx-am-Gcfxs7uGow=&c=pdCu34xp79wktNaEvOsYwC0csBnscLpRhM0SVcfcu-vKaW3_CBBzvg==&ch=Wr4Xl6uH9rm96XkLwBhLYLiPoBwUgmTEqS222gGfTR1Rh5uDF5m7jA==)
---
|

Peter,
When Lauren Boebert became a self-described "Gigi" at age 36, you might be forgiven for thinking "Maybe now she will calm down and set a good example for her kids and grandkids."
Nope. If anything, she has doubled down on the crazy, embarrassing, and selfish behavior that keeps her name in the headlines and her reputation in the gutter.
Take Boebert's involvement in one of the more open and shut political scandals of the last few years: unabashed grifter and disgraced former Congressman George Santos.
Santos lied about almost every detail of his personal life in order to appear more attractive to voters. He was convicted of felony fraud, multiple counts of campaign finance violations and lying to investigators.
Santos is a liar, a fraudster, and a cheat--and now, he is a free man thanks to a Trump pardon that Lauren Boebert worked furiously hard to secure. Which is why it must have stung when Boebert and her entourage were hassled at the entrance to George Santos' "exclusive" D.C. Christmas party:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00126pkEcod0xTuZVAOlw56zxj2ZJpeWJLhlBRY3T4dSZUPlgHGEdYH8ekOHZLESnqZZYMp8Bk9YAdYoveQk2qgWg7KkIUpQ5BOyxtfYLh05yVrb20-QoAz7IigLfibjV_eEEqPfcvI68LW28NM4hQCryY370cC-ZXMhBxZsFP9BUEhdnkSU2hTff6MWalk24EhbW-D3AJNMlTuyqrKcxn-Bsz5SNJAYtb9TViN188rR0g=&c=pdCu34xp79wktNaEvOsYwC0csBnscLpRhM0SVcfcu-vKaW3_CBBzvg==&ch=Wr4Xl6uH9rm96XkLwBhLYLiPoBwUgmTEqS222gGfTR1Rh5uDF5m7jA==)
---

But these personal scandals aren't just silly or ridiculous: they erode Boebert's already-thin level of support in this district she barely knows and is not from.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
Voters in CO-04 don't just shake their heads when Boebert acts like this. They write her off. And we work even harder to find them, learn what makes them tick, and win their support.
[But running this campaign the way it should be run is expensive, and Trisha does not accept corporate PAC money or corrupted billionaire donors. You are powering our epic defeat of Lauren Boebert. Can you step up today and help Trisha win more voters with a donation of $5, $25, or more?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00126pkEcod0xTuZVAOlw56zxj2ZJpeWJLhlBRY3T4dSZUPlgHGEdYH8ekOHZLESnqZOxReZsHwSXgbeWWUSRkjnzPN1joklAmPymhhSSVC3gLoFohx1jUXCGv6oKHP4vy-DJr9-1S56aeV2xfdRWwTz5LiM4CLSL74U4UYdbHmEPJUu4UP3Ovvd_E_RiEfR1cSFq4_HjigV8gAr9Y3j1Hn_ULTOD2GFkuOk5IUf_TvDvQF-hzVO0tS4A==&c=pdCu34xp79wktNaEvOsYwC0csBnscLpRhM0SVcfcu-vKaW3_CBBzvg==&ch=Wr4Xl6uH9rm96XkLwBhLYLiPoBwUgmTEqS222gGfTR1Rh5uDF5m7jA==)

body:
It’s embarrassing, but also points to how Lauren Boebert will lose this election.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B2Do_5Xoc0dIh-joMd7XmcOTIKtJbBEzO_JuhuTMyLbrhLFPbtotODQBuvt1wXWL-JogFKnmG3gMjpLPUoCMlyfAuu47GmBmA_LLEh5VNmCB-9j35pOvOgZ2PoJAIc0zmOyvqo1jDokcccSUyrF4pWMvyQFEp0ORXVf-9qauufYvCOruNRrYKRJDcs0oPa-pC3-OIW12YeYn1Rezi-knnM01hQIsthh3&c=gP41vBx3LGqCscUK9Y88ujrvKHa_-eTBUita8LCzciBMx0i_73m81Q==&ch=1zBMWMW0_NH5FbQj5yZmRnX4Pu21ZzbBNKeXepkPfLhSRk12J1wNeg==)
---
|

Peter,
When Lauren Boebert became a self-described "Gigi" at age 36, you might be forgiven for thinking "Maybe now she will calm down and set a good example for her kids and grandkids."
Nope. If anything, she has doubled down on the crazy, embarrassing, and selfish behavior that keeps her name in the headlines and her reputation in the gutter.
Take Boebert's involvement in one of the more open and shut political scandals of the last few years: unabashed grifter and disgraced former Congressman George Santos.
Santos lied about almost every detail of his personal life in order to appear more attractive to voters. He was convicted of felony fraud, multiple counts of campaign finance violations and lying to investigators.
Santos is a liar, a fraudster, and a cheat--and now, he is a free man thanks to a Trump pardon that Lauren Boebert worked furiously hard to secure. Which is why it must have stung when Boebert and her entourage were hassled at the entrance to George Santos' "exclusive" D.C. Christmas party:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B2Do_5Xoc0dIh-joMd7XmcOTIKtJbBEzO_JuhuTMyLbrhLFPbtotODQBuvt1wXWL-JogFKnmG3gMjpLPUoCMlyfAuu47GmBmA_LLEh5VNmCB-9j35pOvOgZ2PoJAIc0zmOyvqo1jDokcccSUyrF4pWMvyQFEp0ORXVf-9qauufYvCOruNRrYKRJDcs0oPa-pC3-OIW12YeYn1Rezi-knnDU4Oh89_uMh&c=gP41vBx3LGqCscUK9Y88ujrvKHa_-eTBUita8LCzciBMx0i_73m81Q==&ch=1zBMWMW0_NH5FbQj5yZmRnX4Pu21ZzbBNKeXepkPfLhSRk12J1wNeg==)
---

But these personal scandals aren't just silly or ridiculous: they erode Boebert's already-thin level of support in this district she barely knows and is not from.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
Voters in CO-04 don't just shake their heads when Boebert acts like this. They write her off. And we work even harder to find them, learn what makes them tick, and win their support.
[But running this campaign the way it should be run is expensive, and Trisha does not accept corporate PAC money or corrupted billionaire donors. You are powering our epic defeat of Lauren Boebert. Can you step up today and help Trisha win more voters with a donation of $5, $25, or more?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B2Do_5Xoc0dIh-joMd7XmcOTIKtJbBEzO_JuhuTMyLbrhLFPbtotODQBuvt1wXWLVbCqCNrcV9X8MBn4FDryEpnB12dubHjkr8-YPuNYRKoCfn24sjh857ESKOruuYZzEPdPNbEif7qAnpWMUqT3PRJkSniFYKOVzTvqHn2oazfHU6TQhibG2sM8iVW6IG-EVe2KPU1r1VUJbsc9oByiU4zYCQ5mJ6_TEUrtrmUkW8U8aKtNisGjiQ==&c=gP41vBx3LGqCscUK9Y88ujrvKHa_-eTBUita8LCzciBMx0i_73m81Q==&ch=1zBMWMW0_NH5FbQj5yZmRnX4Pu21ZzbBNKeXepkPfLhSRk12J1wNeg==)

name: Berrett Gall

body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251216-297&t=1&akid=297%2E34582%2EXetJy1)
Hey Peter,
I can’t believe I’m typing this, but we’re already halfway through December. **That means there are just two more weeks until our campaign’s ONLY public filing deadline of 2025!**
You might be wondering what that means exactly. In Minnesota, we have to submit our fundraising results at the end of the year. Those numbers go public for everyone — including political pundits and our right-wing opponents — to see.
They’ll use our fundraising report to gauge just how strong our movement to reelect Tim is, so we need to go big and hit our goal out of the park!
This race for governor is rapidly heating up: almost a dozen Republicans are vying for the chance to defeat Tim, and **our newest opponent is Trump’s loyal friend, MyPillow CEO, and right-wing conspiracy theorist Mike Lindell.**
Trump and his MAGA cronies would love nothing more than to flip Minnesota’s governorship red next November and wreak havoc on all the progress we’ve made under Tim’s leadership.
**[Meeting our end-of-year fundraising goal is critical to stopping them, Peter. So if you can, please pitch in $5 or more to ensure we put up strong fundraising numbers before the year ends and raise the resources needed to win!](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251216.EeBeUk&amount=5&refcode=em20251216-297&t=2&akid=297%2E34582%2EXetJy1)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251216.EeBeUk&amount=5&refcode=20251216-297&t=21&akid=297%2E34582%2EXetJy1)**
Thank you for all you do,
Berrett Gall
Senior Advisor
Walz for Governor

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251216-297&t=22&refcode2=297_34582_XetJy1&akid=297%2E34582%2EXetJy1)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

* * *
Peter, have you seen the list of 200 words that are apparently too spicy for Head Start grant applications? It's not a joke. According to a recent ACLU court filing, we’ve got a six-page glossary of forbidden language, including "disability," "race," "woman," "Black," and even "mental health." Honestly, what is this, a dystopian novel? They're trying to fund a program for vulnerable kids while pretending that Black children don't exist, women don't lead households, and nobody struggles with their mental health? No, not really. This is an active, sneering attempt to erase marginalized Americans and defund essential care. _This is utterly batsh*t nuts and frankly, it’s disgusting._ They're coming for the language, and if they control the words, they control the policy. **We’re here because we are not taking this lying down. We back progressive candidates up and down the ballot who will not just push back against this garbage, but who will actively legislate for inclusion and reality.** **[Tired of the rage-bait governance? Turn your anger into action. Chip in $10 right now to help elect people who will defend our kids, not erase them for cheap political points.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqul_NKaUAyIKhf_ase_hcJ3dDJFP7bfXBY5kEm7v9pp3PO2v7lFPcWv4LMBbRzljcSAuwfSRrL93VqyYR5dvSD03NJpft0wn1bHxKMXbthQe63QpP-vQCoUeeAIhyKwYPhIZlmVcKwny03UhEQX9Ay5l7pjWxaruK5_cM2vI7nYDTkH-JpP1EPh1PYtPIfcF6bUFzdnlZHQf7GjxQt84M6KD7SuJLdVx3hfTLDSSV4IhHkxC0Ai8gzv7hRsbp00pGONCKR2VQe_8EMBUKrCZ_GC8FCuu2dRO4ViSJ4oWtw5Rh4rFjYYPMd_C360vi5mMyNruB4RmVJgy7a5ufeeU6c3kW0oL81CEfWakJ5_g8sZUr0PCaV8powU7IBkaxeTyZbV-chZ30Wqhmzv-V2WmDolBQ7E_Ot9HE-mAzADh6QC_g/4mh/zofZEt1vSueUXBz-r4-Bxg/h2/h001.PW1OIvnHqfM2m4b57v0pjwId9MptXxh0sx4Nam1jofk)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Before I ran for the U.S. Senate…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

[
---
Peter, Before I ran for the U.S. Senate, I was an investigative journalist leading a team that exposed government corruption, war crimes, and abuses of power worldwide. My team worked in places where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses have to meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution. This _New York Times_ report on our own Justice Department reminds me of those places. [](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251216-1-f-p&t=2&akid=1281%2E5691347%2EE75VsD) More and more, our government under Trump reminds me of places with brazen corruption at the highest levels, and where the justice system is a political weapon wielded by the ruler to crush the opposition. >From the article:
* _[The lawyers] described being asked to drop cases for political reasons, to find evidence for flimsy investigations and to take positions in court they thought had no legitimate basis. They also talked about the work they and their colleagues were told to abandon — investigations of terrorist plots, corruption and white-collar fraud._

**This should chill us to the bone.** Peter — As Trump dismantles checks on his power and purges the government to fill it with loyalists, more and more Americans are too afraid of retaliation or even prosecution to speak up. **This descent into an un-American America must be stopped. We must regain Congressional power before it’s too late. We must restore checks and balances. We MUST win.** I am the only Democratic Senator running for re-election in a state Trump won. That means I’m MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. Help me defeat them again in Georgia, just like we did in 2021. **[Please, use this link to make a contribution to my campaign today.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251216-1-f-p&t=3&akid=1281%2E5691347%2EE75VsD)** Thanks for chipping in if you can. \- Jon Ossoff **[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251216-1-f-p&t=4&akid=1281%2E5691347%2EE75VsD)**
Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=1281%2E5691347%2EE75VsD) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1281%2E5691347%2EE75VsD) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

I recently proving that U.S. intelligence officials were coordinating with Wuhan Lab collaborators YEARS before the pandemic. They then worked overtime to bury the truth once COVID erupted. Here's the timeline the Deep State fears: ⚫️ 2015 : The CIA and ODNI secretly contact Dr. Ralph Baric -- a partner of Wuhan's Dr. Zhengli Shi -- about weaponizing coronaviruses. ⚫️ 2018 : Baric and Shi surface again, seeking DARPA approval to alter coronaviruses with the very genetic trait COVID-19 would later contain. ⚫️ January 2020 : Baric briefs U.S. officials on a potential Wuhan lab leak. Fauci and his allies label it "conspiracy" and shut down all debate. It's the biggest cover-up of our lifetime -- and the same people who buried the truth are still fighting to keep these records hidden. That's why I'm launching a full Senate investigation demanding every email, every document, every secret deal, and every decision that led to this disaster. And I'm calling Dr. Fauci back before the Committee for public questioning under oath. They did not appreciate the question one bit...

Dear truth-seeking American,
This MAHA doctor's **[viral video](https://substack.com/redirect/5ddb6a29-845a-4c77-ac1c-a5d83ff34536?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** not only confirms the COVID pandemic was built on lies...
But he's holding undeniable proof the next "PLANDEMIC" is starting now.
Before it comes for your family **[SEE HIS MESSAGE HERE.](https://substack.com/redirect/5ddb6a29-845a-4c77-ac1c-a5d83ff34536?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
P.S. The new "Plandemic" will kill 600,000 mostly older Americans in 2026. **[View the 2 signs of disease- and how to protect yourself here.](https://substack.com/redirect/5ddb6a29-845a-4c77-ac1c-a5d83ff34536?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/5ddb6a29-845a-4c77-ac1c-a5d83ff34536?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Australian couple heroically tackled Bondi Beach terrorist before being killed**
Boris Gurman, 69, and his wife Sofia, 61, were captured on harrowing dashcam footage **[courageously tackling terrorist Sajid Akram](https://substack.com/redirect/905e3297-491f-4355-99dd-79b412a9b917?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after spotting him emerging from a car draped with a homemade ISIS flag, with Boris wrestling away the gun as Sofia ran to help and pointing the rifle at the mass killer before the terrorist grabbed another weapon and executed the couple at close range.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9f87d0ad-862a-4879-9d17-1dd3f1ecafec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Couple died in each other 's arms weeks before 35th anniversary:** The couple, who had been married 34 years and lived in Bondi, were the first of 15 victims gunned down by Akram and his son Naveed in Australia's worst mass shooting in nearly 30 years, with separate drone video showing them tragically clutching each other where they died, as their family expressed "overwhelming sense of pride in their bravery and selflessness."
* **Multiple heroes attempted to stop gunmen during rampage:** After the Gurmans' courageous attempt, Muslim father of two Ahmed al Ahmed charged one of the gunmen from behind and disarmed him despite being shot numerous times and survived, while Reuven Morrison, 62, managed to hurl a brick at one of the terrorists before he too was shot dead, with his daughter saying "if there is one way for him to go on this Earth, it would be fighting a terrorist."

* * *
# **Nick Reiner fled to hotel room after allegedly murdering parents following Christmas party confrontation**
The 32-year-old suspected killer Nick Reiner checked into The Pierside Santa Monica hotel around 4 a.m. Sunday--just hours **[after a bitter yelling match with his father Rob Reiner at Conan O'Brien's Christmas party](https://substack.com/redirect/c6f4fd97-ca41-47d0-a09d-fe287ab3e54f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**--and when staff cleaned his room after he left, they found the shower "full of blood," blood stains on the bed, and windows covered with bed sheets, with Nick appearing "tweaked out" at check-in but showing no visible signs of violence, the NY Post reports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c6f4fd97-ca41-47d0-a09d-fe287ab3e54f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **LAPD investigates hotel room, suspect arrested without bail:** LAPD homicide detectives investigated the hotel room Monday and interviewed employees, with Nick later arrested and charged with his parents' murders as shown in dramatic footage released by police, held without bail and reportedly on suicide watch after Rob Reiner, 78, and wife Michele, 68, were found stabbed to death in their Brentwood home Sunday afternoon by their daughter Romy.
* **Murders followed party confrontation over drug relapse:** The deaths came after Rob Reiner--director of classics like "When Harry Met Sally," "A Few Good Men," "Stand By Me," and "The Princess Bride"--allegedly had a showdown with his son at O'Brien's party in front of celebrity guests, with sources telling The Post the freakout could have been because Nick was back on drugs and refusing treatment after at least 17 stints in rehab since age 15.

* * *
# Candace Owens announces "productive" meeting with Erika Kirk
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/02bbb37b-29ca-4815-a638-4602030b6153?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Candace Owens announced via X on Monday evening that her and TPUSA CEO Erika Kirk had a **[four and a half hour meeting](https://substack.com/redirect/02bbb37b-29ca-4815-a638-4602030b6153?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday amidst Owens' accusations of foul-play by TPUSA in connection to the September murder of Charlie Kirk.
Owens iterated that more details are to come on Tuesday.
* * *
# **Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson announce engagement**
President Trump's oldest son revealed his **[engagement to Bettina Anderson](https://substack.com/redirect/6354da3a-b525-4768-afbc-b11fb065bf8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a White House Christmas reception Monday night, marking his second marriage after finalizing his 2018 divorce from Vanessa Trump.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7cbe8c1a-cb26-4600-ae78-395ea95ac689?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **White House announcement:** Trump Jr., 47, admitted being "at a loss for words" during the reception after his father invited the couple to speak, thanking Anderson for saying "yes" while the 39-year-old bride-to-be called it "the most unforgettable weekend of my life" and declared herself "the luckiest girl in the world."
* **Relationship timeline:** Following his split from ex-wife Vanessa--with whom he shares five children including 18-year-old LPGA Tour debutante Kai--Trump Jr. dated Fox News host Kimberly Guilfoyle from 2018, announcing their engagement in 2020 before separating last year shortly before beginning his relationship with Anderson.
* **Anderson 's background:** The fiancee graduated from Columbia University in 2009 with a degree in art history, criticism and conservation and is the daughter of the late Harry Loy Anderson Jr., formerly America's youngest bank president and philanthropist who died in 2013.

* * *
# **Trump sues BBC for $10 Billion over alleged Jan. 6 speech edit**
President Trump **[filed a lawsuit](https://substack.com/redirect/7065dbbb-fff6-4bb6-80a8-8811169b0164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/7065dbbb-fff6-4bb6-80a8-8811169b0164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)against the British Broadcasting Corporation Monday, accusing the outlet of defaming him with manipulated editing of his January 6, 2021 White House speech in a 2024 documentary.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0c36765-7cef-4322-9083-45e42d942e46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Editing allegations:** The 33-page Miami federal court filing claims BBC's "Trump: A Second Chance" documentary spliced three separate speech sections spanning nearly an hour to falsely suggest Trump explicitly encouraged the Capitol riot, omitting his call to protest "peacefully" while also misrepresenting Proud Boys footage filmed before Trump's address as instead happening _after_ his remarks.

* **Massive damages sought:** Trump's legal team demands $5 billion for defamation and another $5 billion for violating Florida's Deceptive and Unfair Trade Practices Act, arguing the documentary represented "a brazen attempt to interfere in and influence" the 2024 election despite the BBC's November apology and subsequent resignations of its director-general and news CEO.
* **Standing controversy:** While the BBC maintains the documentary never aired in the U.S. or appeared on its streaming platforms, Trump's lawyers claim jurisdiction because American BritBox subscribers or VPN users could have accessed the content, with the president telling reporters "They actually put terrible words in my mouth having to do with January 6th that I didn't say."

* * *
# **Pelosi says not enough cause for third Trump impeachment ...**
Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi suggested Saturday that President Trump hasn't yet crossed the threshold **[warranting a third impeachment](https://substack.com/redirect/20926ce4-7f72-4c50-a6ed-ad50a5eb0419?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , though she left the door open if he commits future violations.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3a1e9cd4-983c-4524-87c8-615841a7b557?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Conditional position:** When asked by USA Today's Susan Page if Democrats should pursue impeachment upon retaking the House in 2026, Pelosi responded "If he crosses the border again...But that's not an incidental thing...there has to be cause. There has to be reason," emphasizing impeachment requires serious constitutional violations.
* **Past impeachments defended:** Pelosi insisted Trump bore responsibility for his two previous impeachments during her speakership, citing his Ukraine phone call with President Zelensky showing "disrespect for the Constitution" and election interference, plus January 6 as "an insurrection incited by the President of the United States" despite Trump's protests.
* **Recent effort rejected:** Her comments follow Texas Representative Al Green's failed Thursday impeachment push after 23 House Democrats joined Republicans to block his privileged resolution seeking votes on two articles, marking Green's latest in several impeachment filings during Trump's second term that lacked broader party support.

Australian couple heroically tackled Bondi Beach terrorist before being killed Boris Gurman, 69, and his wife Sofia, 61, were captured on harrowing dashcam footage after spotting him emerging from a car draped with a homemade ISIS flag, with Boris wrestling away the gun as Sofia ran to help and pointing the rifle at the mass killer before the terrorist grabbed another weapon and executed the couple at close range. Couple died in each other 's arms weeks before 35th anniversary: The couple, who had been married 34 years and lived in Bondi, were the first of 15 victims gunned down by Akram and his son Naveed in Australia's worst mass shooting in nearly 30 years, with separate drone video showing them tragically clutching each other where they died, as their family expressed "overwhelming sense of pride in their bravery and selflessness." Multiple heroes attempted to stop gunmen during rampage: After the Gurmans' courageous attempt, Muslim father of two Ahmed al Ahmed charged one of the gunmen from behind and disarmed him despite being shot numerous times and survived, while Reuven Morrison, 62, managed to hurl a brick at one of the terrorists before he too was shot dead, with his daughter saying "if there is one way for him to go on this Earth, it would be fighting a terrorist." Nick Reiner fled to hotel room after allegedly murdering parents following Christmas party confrontation The 32-year-old suspected killer Nick Reiner checked into The Pierside Santa Monica hotel around 4 a.m. Sunday--just hours when staff cleaned his room after he left, they found the shower "full of blood," blood stains on the bed, and windows covered with bed sheets, with Nick appearing "tweaked out" at check-in but showing no visible signs of violence, the NY Post reports. | | ---|---|--- LAPD investigates hotel room, suspect arrested without bail: LAPD homicide detectives investigated the hotel room Monday and interviewed employees, with Nick later arrested and charged with his parents' murders as shown in dramatic footage released by police, held without bail and reportedly on suicide watch after Rob Reiner, 78, and wife Michele, 68, were found stabbed to death in their Brentwood home Sunday afternoon by their daughter Romy. Murders followed party confrontation over drug relapse: The deaths came after Rob Reiner--director of classics like "When Harry Met Sally," "A Few Good Men," "Stand By Me," and "The Princess Bride"--allegedly had a showdown with his son at O'Brien's party in front of celebrity guests, with sources telling The Post the freakout could have been because Nick was back on drugs and refusing treatment after at least 17 stints in rehab since age 15. Candace Owens announces "productive" meeting with Erika Kirk | | ---|---|--- Candace Owens announced via X on Monday evening that her and TPUSA CEO Erika Kirk had a Monday amidst Owens' accusations of foul-play by TPUSA in connection to the September murder of Charlie Kirk. Owens iterated that more details are to come on Tuesday. Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson announce engagement President Trump's oldest son revealed his during a White House Christmas reception Monday night, marking his second marriage after finalizing his 2018 divorce from Vanessa Trump. White House announcement: Trump Jr., 47, admitted being "at a loss for words" during the reception after his father invited the couple to speak, thanking Anderson for saying "yes" while the 39-year-old bride-to-be called it "the most unforgettable weekend of my life" and declared herself "the luckiest girl in the world." Relationship timeline: Following his split from ex-wife Vanessa--with whom he shares five children including 18-year-old LPGA Tour debutante Kai--Trump Jr. dated Fox News host Kimberly Guilfoyle from 2018, announcing their engagement in 2020 before separating last year shortly before beginning his relationship with Anderson. Anderson 's background: The fiancee graduated from Columbia University in 2009 with a degree in art history, criticism and conservation and is the daughter of the late Harry Loy Anderson Jr., formerly America's youngest bank president and philanthropist who died in 2013. Trump sues BBC for $10 Billion over alleged Jan. 6 speech edit President Trump the British Broadcasting Corporation Monday, accusing the outlet of defaming him with manipulated editing of his January 6, 2021 White House speech in a 2024 documentary. | | ---|---|--- Editing allegations: The 33-page Miami federal court filing claims BBC's "Trump: A Second Chance" documentary spliced three separate speech sections spanning nearly an hour to falsely suggest Trump explicitly encouraged the Capitol riot, omitting his call to protest "peacefully" while also misrepresenting Proud Boys footage filmed before Trump's address as instead happening after his remarks. Massive damages sought: Trump's legal team demands $5 billion for defamation and another $5 billion for violating Florida's Deceptive and Unfair Trade Practices Act, arguing the documentary represented "a brazen attempt to interfere in and influence" the 2024 election despite the BBC's November apology and subsequent resignations of its director-general and news CEO. Standing controversy: While the BBC maintains the documentary never aired in the U.S. or appeared on its streaming platforms, Trump's lawyers claim jurisdiction because American BritBox subscribers or VPN users could have accessed the content, with the president telling reporters "They actually put terrible words in my mouth having to do with January 6th that I didn't say." Pelosi says not enough cause for third Trump impeachment ... Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi suggested Saturday that President Trump hasn't yet crossed the threshold , though she left the door open if he commits future violations. Conditional position: When asked by USA Today's Susan Page if Democrats should pursue impeachment upon retaking the House in 2026, Pelosi responded "If he crosses the border again...But that's not an incidental thing...there has to be cause. There has to be reason," emphasizing impeachment requires serious constitutional violations. Past impeachments defended: Pelosi insisted Trump bore responsibility for his two previous impeachments during her speakership, citing his Ukraine phone call with President Zelensky showing "disrespect for the Constitution" and election interference, plus January 6 as "an insurrection incited by the President of the United States" despite Trump's protests. Recent effort rejected: Her comments follow Texas Representative Al Green's failed Thursday impeachment push after 23 House Democrats joined Republicans to block his privileged resolution seeking votes on two articles, marking Green's latest in several impeachment filings during Trump's second term that lacked broader party support. * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

There is a renewal in America's faith life happening now. Joining the Moms for America Podcast to discuss it and how President
Trump is making faith a priority is Pastor Ben Graham. He is a Trump-Vance appointee currently serving as the first-ever Faith
Director at the U.S. Department of the Interior. Take a listen to Pastor Graham and Debbie as they talk about Faith in America
and the True Meaning of Christmas.Like, subscribe and share.

Unwrap A Great American Gift This Christmas – Freedom of Religion

This Christmas, it’s worth taking a moment to pause with your family and remember the irreplaceable gifts that come with being a
proud and grateful American. One such national treasure, given to us by our founders, is within the 1st Amendment. It’s our
Freedom of Religion for all citizens. It’s easy to take it for granted. It’s vital today and a foundation of our origin story,
precious then – and to us, much to the chagrin of those who would like it gone along with any cultural vestiges of faith in God.

The hope of this very freedom to worship and live according to one’s conscience was central to many who were drawn to our shores
way before we were a nation.

clean_body: Have you noticed there is a renewal of Faith in America? We're talking to Pastor Ben Graham, our first-ever Faith Director at the U.S. Department of the Interior. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] December 16, 2025 • Newsletter Faith in America and the True Meaning of Christmas Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] There is a renewal in America's faith life happening now. Joining the Moms for America Podcast to discuss it and how President Trump is making faith a priority is Pastor Ben Graham. He is a Trump-Vance appointee currently serving as the first-ever Faith Director at the U.S. Department of the Interior. Take a listen to Pastor Graham and Debbie as they talk about Faith in America and the True Meaning of Christmas.Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Unwrap A Great American Gift This Christmas – Freedom of Religion This Christmas, it’s worth taking a moment to pause with your family and remember the irreplaceable gifts that come with being a proud and grateful American. One such national treasure, given to us by our founders, is within the 1st Amendment. It’s our Freedom of Religion for all citizens. It’s easy to take it for granted. It’s vital today and a foundation of our origin story, precious then – and to us, much to the chagrin of those who would like it gone along with any cultural vestiges of faith in God. The hope of this very freedom to worship and live according to one’s conscience was central to many who were drawn to our shores way before we were a nation. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. subject: Fundamental for our democracy

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Witchita Eagle: Kansas Supreme Court finds Kansans have no ‘fundamental right’ to vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121525_1&amount=25]
We can't forget this, Team: The Kansas Supreme Court ruled that voting is not a fundamental right protected by the Kansas Constitution .
It should go without saying, but this decision likely weakened legal challenges to future voting restrictions in Kansas and makes it easier for opponents of voting rights in their legislature to more aggressively pursue new anti-voting laws.
Hang with us while we explain how they split hairs on this decision, but -- the Kansas Supreme Court said voting is a " political right " and not a " fundamental right ". What's the difference? With a fundamental right, the government has to prove why it needs to pass new voting laws and restrictions. With a political right, the onus is on the voters to prove they are being unreasonably burdened and blocked from voting.
In short -- this decision reads like a " get out of jail free " card from Monopoly, granting a legal wink and a nudge to opponents of voting rights to make it harder to vote.
Voter suppression anywhere hurts us everywhere. Help us defend the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today in states like Kansas where our democracy is under threat >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121525_1&amount=25]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] Witchita Eagle: Kansas Supreme Court finds Kansans have no ‘fundamental right’ to vote [] We can't forget this, Team: The Kansas Supreme Court ruled that voting is not a fundamental right protected by the Kansas Constitution . It should go without saying, but this decision likely weakened legal challenges to future voting restrictions in Kansas and makes it easier for opponents of voting rights in their legislature to more aggressively pursue new anti-voting laws. Hang with us while we explain how they split hairs on this decision, but -- the Kansas Supreme Court said voting is a " political right " and not a " fundamental right ". What's the difference? With a fundamental right, the government has to prove why it needs to pass new voting laws and restrictions. With a political right, the onus is on the voters to prove they are being unreasonably burdened and blocked from voting. In short -- this decision reads like a " get out of jail free " card from Monopoly, granting a legal wink and a nudge to opponents of voting rights to make it harder to vote. Voter suppression anywhere hurts us everywhere. Help us defend the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today in states like Kansas where our democracy is under threat >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: We can’t trust the GOP with your health
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1144%2E181023%2EitEdiE)
Team,
Too many people across Michigan struggle to access the affordable health care they need and deserve.
People are losing their Medicaid or _Affordable Care Act_ subsidies. Folks in rural counties are driving for hours just to see a doctor. And Republicans are exacerbating this healthcare crisis.
I have plans to fix that system and take on any fight to ensure Michiganders thrive as our next governor. I know how to manage large state agencies and revamp them to work better for you. **[Pitch in to help me tackle this problem as our next governor.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251216_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1144%2E181023%2EitEdiE)**
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hVxyII&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251216_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1144%2E181023%2EitEdiE)
---
Team, I have a proven record of making our systems more efficient and accessible — from the DMV to our election administration. I know that if we can fix the DMV and simplify the license renewal process, we can fix our state health agency and make it easier for Michiganders to access health care.
By modernizing DHHS and investing in access to health care in rural Michigan, we can expand access and speed up archaic processes. I’ll also continue to fight alongside Michigan’s Senators and Representatives in Washington for the government to restore healthcare funding that the GOP voted to cut earlier this year _(in a bill my GOP opponent voted for)_.
I believe every Michigander has a right to be healthy. A right to affordable quality health care. **Full stop.**
**[That’s the Michigan I’m fighting for, and I know that’s the Michigan you are fighting for too. Let’s work together to make it a reality for all of us. Can I count on your support today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251216_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1144%2E181023%2EitEdiE)**

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. clean_body: New documents and testimony reveal a stunning pattern of deceit | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, reveal a stunning pattern of deceit: Dr. Fauci instructed NIH employees to destroy public records and emails that could expose the truth about COVID's origins and what really happened at the Wuhan Lab. This directly contradicts Fauci's sworn testimony before Congress, where he claimed he "never deleted any records." But the facts are in. Fauci told NIH staff to delete emails after reading them. A blatant attempt to dodge FOIA, hide the truth, and cover his tracks. And this scandal goes even deeper. I recently proving that U.S. intelligence officials were coordinating with Wuhan Lab collaborators YEARS before the pandemic. They then worked overtime to bury the truth once COVID erupted. Here's the timeline the Deep State fears: ⚫️ 2015 : The CIA and ODNI secretly contact Dr. Ralph Baric -- a partner of Wuhan's Dr. Zhengli Shi -- about weaponizing coronaviruses. ⚫️ 2018 : Baric and Shi surface again, seeking DARPA approval to alter coronaviruses with the very genetic trait COVID-19 would later contain. ⚫️ January 2020 : Baric briefs U.S. officials on a potential Wuhan lab leak. Fauci and his allies label it "conspiracy" and shut down all debate. It's the biggest cover-up of our lifetime -- and the same people who buried the truth are still fighting to keep these records hidden. That's why I'm launching a full Senate investigation demanding every email, every document, every secret deal, and every decision that led to this disaster. And I'm calling Dr. Fauci back before the Committee for public questioning under oath. But the Swamp is already circling the wagons to protect Fauci, the intelligence community, and the Wuhan collaborators who helped orchestrate this mess. I won 't let them bury this scandal, but I can't take on the Deep State alone. This is the moment, Peter. America deserves the truth. Lives, livelihoods, and freedom were destroyed by lockdowns, mandates, and government deceit, and the people responsible must finally be held accountable. MAGA Patriot,

Articles of Impeachment have officially been drafted for Pete Hegseth.

Our hearts are absolutely breaking at this moment.

Pete Hegseth represents the best of America.

He is an incredible, selfless patriot that just wants to keep our great country safe.

_And crime-loving, terrorist-loving Democrats want him to pay the price for it. _

This has nothing to do with anything Pete Hegseth has done (which is nothing wrong!) and everything to do with who he is as a person.

Democrats can't stand that he's a patriotic, God-fearing family man.

**Our country is safer because Pete Hegseth is leading our Department of War, and he needs us now more than ever.

That's why we wrote our _Pete Hegseth Letter of Support_ with the goal of getting 1,000,000 patriots to sign it before TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT.
