---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
Just when it seems Donald Trump has scraped the very bottom of verbal and political depravity, he smashes another nail into the coffin of his own credibility. And this time, the vulgarity is so grotesque, the evil is so clear, that even Trump's most hardened supporters are recoiling.
The occasion? The brutal murder of Hollywood star Rob Reiner and his wife. It's an event that would normally summon at least the barest flicker of human empathy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/177ee32d-6fce-490d-a74e-92bcfb80d050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Instead, Trump delivered a social media rant that managed to make his previous shocking indecencies look almost quaint. Trump blamed Reiner for his own murder. Trump produced a sneering, gloating monologue on Truth Social that blasted Reiner, a progressive activist, for having the temerity to oppose Trump while alive.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/177ee32d-6fce-490d-a74e-92bcfb80d050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump wrote: "A very sad thing happened last night in Hollywood. Rob Reiner, a tortured and struggling, but once very talented movie director and comedy star, has passed away, together with his wife, Michele, reportedly due to the anger he caused others through his massive, unyielding, and incurable affliction with a mind crippling disease known as [TRUMP](https://substack.com/redirect/1ff115c2-ce94-4153-8ac0-b3d0a07eb231?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) DERANGEMENT SYNDROME, sometimes referred to as TDS. He was known to have driven people CRAZY by his raging obsession of President Donald J. Trump, with his obvious paranoia reaching new heights as the Trump Administration surpassed all goals and expectations of greatness, and with the Golden Age of America upon us, perhaps like never before. May Rob and Michele rest in peace!"
To call this graceless would be generous; it is more like moral spoliation. Anyone with a scrap of decency -- might offer condolences, a recognition of pain, a pause in the eternal campaign.
Trump transforms grief into a grotesque political diatribe.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/177ee32d-6fce-490d-a74e-92bcfb80d050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And let's be clear: blaming a victim of violence for provoking their own death is not merely cruel. It is moral rot. It is the logic of the crazed mob, the whisper that _they had it coming_ , the language historically employed by cowards who want brutality to feel justified. When it comes from the mouth of a U.S. President, it is not just indecent. It is dangerous.
* * *
Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.L8PIQB7gxsTququTC6A-mzJpRoLKN5-TUCaihI4I9Pc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=181731402)
* * *
A few of Trump's defenders insist, as they always do, that this is merely "Trump being Trump," as if that were an explanation rather than an indictment. The MAGATs are muttering about free speech, about jokes, about how Trump's critics are too sensitive. But humor requires wit, and wit requires intelligence. This is neither. It is pure spite, stripped of even the pretense of comedy. Trump is celebrating murder.
Thankfully, the reaction across most of the U.S. political spectrum has been swift and damning.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/177ee32d-6fce-490d-a74e-92bcfb80d050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Social media users of all stripes have called the president's commentary what it is--"one sick f***," "psychotic," and an act of unthinkable cruelty. Even some of Trump's own supporters have recoiled, labeling the post "heartless" and urging its deletion. Several lawmakers from Trump's own party can't quite look away either, condemning the tone-deaf performance as disrespectful and inappropriate. Public figures and entertainers have joined the chorus, branding the Trump remarks as corrupt, narcissistic, and lacking shame
[Subscribe & Save 40%](https://substack.com/redirect/177ee32d-6fce-490d-a74e-92bcfb80d050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
What is striking to so many Americans is not merely the absence of Trump's empathy, but the reflexive Trump contempt for ordinary human dignity. A national leader -- even an embattled president -- is expected to toe some line of elementary respect in the face of human tragedy. Trump is not merely ignorant of this expectation; he laughs at it, hoots like a hyena in the petting zoo of human suffering. He seems to believe that every moment of national grief is another chance to remind the world that **he** remains the center of all things, that all pain is a backdrop for his ego's grand parade.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/177ee32d-6fce-490d-a74e-92bcfb80d050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is a form of verbal necrophilia -- the defilement of dead names for the sake of self-aggrandizement. It is the heinous belief that a bloody murder scene or cold cemetery is just another campaign backdrop, that the grief of others is fair game for a rallying cry. One wonders if decency itself has been outlawed in Trump's demented and deranged imagination.
A healthy society would uniformly drop Trump like a bad habit or excise him like a cancerous tumor. A sick society shrugs, notes that 36% of all Americans still approve of Trump, and waits for the next outrage, already trained, already numb. Trump relies on that numbness. He depends on it. He is not trying to persuade; he is trying to degrade--to drag the standards of public life so low that his own behavior seems inevitable, even normal.
It is not.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/177ee32d-6fce-490d-a74e-92bcfb80d050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is the behavior of a man unfit not only for office, but for the most basic obligations of citizenship. It is the sound of moral collapse, typed out on social media in all caps.
And yet, tomorrow, Trump will do it again--because he can, because he has learned that there is always a disgraceful and disgusting floor somewhere beneath the last one.
Trump does not ask whether he should go lower. He just sinks further into his insidious, immoral, toxic stench.
It is beyond horrifying.
* * *

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Children need to know
body:
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values......will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow?The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth:
---
**“I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13**
---
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will take just one simple action today to help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow and God’s word.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbiqci2u2idlt5pego9ba3d1ffnfnbc5bvu8th1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh60or6chh2bs)** With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith.My name is Kirk Cameron.Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me.I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian.When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.But that’s not all they are doing.BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere.And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again.Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message.But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation.In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.”But now that’s not enough.Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation.And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old.More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences.Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfiurv0o4qnopr162afqljq7ahd83rv6pjd48378_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh60or6chh2bs)
---
| That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---

---

---

---

| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.

---
| | Just the thing we need to counteract the evil “Drag Queen Story Hours” and every other leftist lie.And with our TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” we are reaching hundreds of thousands of families with timeless Christian values.Giving parents and kids an alternative to the filth being shown on screens today. As you can imagine, secularists despise our mission. They do not want us engaging the culture with biblical truths. And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, [**then I would like to invite you to be a part of our life-changing mission here at BRAVE Books.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4rrm9l2497clb5re3pkdf9irevcgcuucena7ego_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh60or6chh2bs) Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever?So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through **BRAVE Books** ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. [**Would you prayerfully consider making a gift to BRAVE Books today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlng7vfl20vap4pi0mmsun2n9277fohqhrn3qr3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh60or6chh2bs) America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior.They’re leading our children away from Christ...and toward an empty, godless and hopeless secular doctrine. But **BRAVE Books** is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. Thank you for supporting BRAVE Books – and for helping us protect our precious children and grandchildren!
---

clean_body: Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement. | | | | | Dear Friend,If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values......will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow?The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth: “I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13 Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith.My name is Kirk Cameron.Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me.I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian.When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named BRAVE Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.But that’s not all they are doing.BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere.And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again.Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message.But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation.In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.”But now that’s not enough.Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation.And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old.More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences.Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man. | | | That’s exactly why BRAVE Books started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on. | | That’s exactly why BRAVE Books started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on. | | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids. | | | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids. | | Just the thing we need to counteract the evil “Drag Queen Story Hours” and every other leftist lie.And with our TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” we are reaching hundreds of thousands of families with timeless Christian values.Giving parents and kids an alternative to the filth being shown on screens today. As you can imagine, secularists despise our mission. They do not want us engaging the culture with biblical truths. And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever?So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through BRAVE Books ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior.They’re leading our children away from Christ...and toward an empty, godless and hopeless secular doctrine. But BRAVE Books is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. Thank you for supporting BRAVE Books – and for helping us protect our precious children and grandchildren! | | Sincerely, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite CConroe, TX 77301 | Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Justice Democrats
subject: AIPAC is targeting Justice Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

AIPAC recently launched new ads on Facebook attacking every one of our
Justice Democrats in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251216.-VcX5z&refcode=em20251216-37282&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37282%2E1203867%2EAaPY84 ]Collage of ads being run by AIPAC attacking Justice Democrats'
candidates.

Why? For supporting Justice Democrat Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib’s
resolution to formally recognize the Israeli government’s genocide in Gaza
and push the United States to meet its legal obligations to prevent and
punish it.

This is just the beginning of AIPAC’s war on progressive, pro-peace
candidates in the 2026 election cycle. With less than one month left in
2025, they’re no doubt gearing up to drop millions — like they did last
cycle — to try unseating our sitting Justice Democrat members of Congress
and stop our primary challengers against AIPAC’s incumbents.

They’re scared, on their heels, and are desperate to cling to the power
they’re losing because of the movement we’ve built together to reject
their toxic influence in the Democratic Party. Let’s show them why they
should keep being scared.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251216.-VcX5z&refcode=em20251216-37282&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37282%2E1203867%2EAaPY84 ]We can’t wait, Peter: we
need your support here and now to show AIPAC we have the resources to
fight back. Will you rush $5 or more now to stand up to
AIPAC?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251216.-VcX5z&refcode=em20251216-37282&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37282%2E1203867%2EAaPY84 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

subject: I'd really like to hear from you

body:
Do you have a minute...? Peter,

My team emailed you a couple days ago about our end-of-year survey, and I wanted to follow up personally.

Hey Everyone,
Please join us Tonight, December 16th, at our family home in Golden at 6:30 PM for some festive fun!
We are excited to announce that Congressional Candidate Adam DeRito will be joining us tonight at our party!
Hear him talk about his campaign for CD8 and why he believes we need to retire Congressman Gabe Evans.
Please wear your best ugly sweater for a chance to win a prize, and come prepared for an ornament exchange.
We are thrilled to be hosting you and celebrating the Christmas season with you all.
As always, please RSVP by clicking the image or button below.
*We are transitioning to President Trump's marketing platform, Nucleus, so we have a new RSVP Page.*
If you have issues RSVP'ing, please don't hesitate to reach out.

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m ending my race for U.S. Senate.
body:
Peter,
I officially ended my campaign for U.S. Senate and filed to run for Congress in Texas’ 33rd Congressional District.
I didn’t come to this decision lightly – I’ve put everything I had into my Senate campaign over the last five months, traveling to every corner of the state, talking to as many Texans as I could, building on the incredible grassroots campaign we started last year.
While it was clear that many Texans were ready to support me to the end, it was also clear that the Democratic primary would end up in a bruising and costly runoff in May. And if we want to prevent another MAGA loyalist from representing our state for six more years, that’s simply a risk we can’t afford to take.
So, today I am announcing my campaign to represent the newly drawn 33rd district in Texas. If you’d still like to see me head to Washington in November, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between me and Real Texas to get my new campaign off to a strong start today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Colin Allred and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1&amount=25]
District 33 was racially gerrymandered by Republicans in an effort to further rig our democracy, but it’s still the community where I grew up attending public schools and watching my mom struggle to pay for our groceries. It’s the community where Aly and I are raising our two boys. It is my home.
The threats that our democracy and our way of living are facing right now are real. It’s harder than ever for kids like me to get a shot, and for single moms like mine to afford their basic needs. But I am more confident than I have ever been that together, we can beat these threats. That’s why I am humbly asking for your help to return to Congress to fight for North Texans, our democracy, and the American Dream.
If you can, please split a donation of a few bucks between my campaign and Real Texas to help me get started. Thank you for reading, and for all of your continued support as we fight to get Texas representation we can be proud of. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1]
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=121025_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=121025_1]

1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=4N8OVIxPqm9bgRq1KhYJkmKE8S3%2B8A2uZDmb4mrJD6ahXqd2s5kFZ32Veg6c5AP6NGsYACLaRPq9aJ54EFBEgtZJd4OkBmbpr5XLJgSj1By5dra6H498uJNLVh4x2CSiuaCugfRiBgGPBFpXFukqUReq10YNBZTJAiCjsq4PgvGW3u9KoSQ%2BLs3bKNl7rMLS0Ai15zAXME18ebWJPpULnaERLemgSP4%2BOILstlvm9bawvjF0HWZgTnKp3d4lBLjslpszy8neq9xPzhodS3i4XDteWdUau09D%2FcginTAmwbesgpmmnpUs5Vq89goOpU%2FwepnZuHs%2BbeYWH7vz8gh7B7UkXITELN4vQVD64nJ43oR%2FsMcjtzWrjuP5sLjPQIzIk7FZCXyHI%2FMzy9eibL1vPOaCJIHUWrqjNmQdtYnSIz4%3D .

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Children need to know
body:
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values......will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow?The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth:
---
**“I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13**
---
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will take just one simple action today to help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow and God’s word.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkdid2cqvikbos4b9lc9dsbmsauueoqbpi512cq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh68pb4c9h2bs)** With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith.My name is Kirk Cameron.Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me.I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian.When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.But that’s not all they are doing.BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere.And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again.Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message.But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation.In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.”But now that’s not enough.Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation.And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old.More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences.Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zclrd5d51fgms4bvr8q9tbph7295ic0b2g9gu7mo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh68pb4c9h2bs)
---
| That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
| | That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2avg67ck0gg2bgf575rmbomflp38iehued3ib80_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh68pb4c9h2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z98a0g0ejg5q0g35voprrphii85ks0dkor1kpjcg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh68pb4c9h2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlkgqqlo84f22j7jp9liik8dsv3vg1hp1rdpsplg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh68pb4c9h2bs)
---
| | Just the thing we need to counteract the evil “Drag Queen Story Hours” and every other leftist lie.And with our TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” we are reaching hundreds of thousands of families with timeless Christian values.Giving parents and kids an alternative to the filth being shown on screens today. As you can imagine, secularists despise our mission. They do not want us engaging the culture with biblical truths. And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, [**then I would like to invite you to be a part of our life-changing mission here at BRAVE Books.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp1iu0v10urrg8sprds3o0kc0lgkjssno4lfik8g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh68pb4c9h2bs) Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever?So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through **BRAVE Books** ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. [**Would you prayerfully consider making a gift to BRAVE Books today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhk48oj410vsagjr4i08mbv66jnb2b95rve455do_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh68pb4c9h2bs) America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior.They’re leading our children away from Christ...and toward an empty, godless and hopeless secular doctrine. But **BRAVE Books** is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. Thank you for supporting BRAVE Books – and for helping us protect our precious children and grandchildren!
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zobt0mioc7qmqc4slrrt8j4qpsc5001m9bpc5g68_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjh68pb4c9h2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---

---

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvYWFyb25yZWd1bmJlcmcvcC90aGUtcmlnaHR3aW5nLWRpc2luZm9ybWF0aW9uLW1hY2hpbmU_.fltQCOzIHKiCpqIfzJbgsLX9kp0LLh4HD6ewfZCtU68?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/aaronregunberg/p/the-rightwing-disinformation-machine?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

We're in the fourth day since the [mass shooting](https://substack.com/redirect/cc916487-0d64-47f1-8020-1a3de305b4b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at Brown University, and--as of this writing--we still do not know anything about the shooter's identity or his motives.
What we know is that a man dressed in black walked into a classroom in Brown's Barus & Holley building, just as a study session for Brown's introductory economics course--the most widely taken course at the university--was wrapping up. The gunman shouted something (students who were present [have reported](https://substack.com/redirect/aedd416c-0a93-46fc-9d85-5e0541333c85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that they don't know what he said), and then fired more than 40 rounds at the assembled group, injuring nine students and taking the precious lives of two young people: Mukhammad Aziz Umurzokov, an 18-year-old immigrant from Uzbekistan who grew up in Virginia, and Ella Cook, a 19-year-old Alabaman who was vice president of the Brown College Republicans. This is more or less [all we know](https://substack.com/redirect/52874fb6-8fb6-4431-af94-50c33ba5be9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Into this void of actual knowledge, a rightwing narrative has exploded overnight insisting that Cook was, as the chairman of the College Republicans put it in a [post](https://substack.com/redirect/5d94ad2e-daac-47d6-a52c-385efcc1c2a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on X with nearly two million views, "targeted for her conservative beliefs, hunted, and killed in cold blood."
To be clear, there is zero evidence, as of this writing, that Cook was targeted for her conservative beliefs. It's not impossible, but it's just as likely--or significantly more likely, considering that most extremist-related murders are [committed by white supremacists](https://substack.com/redirect/3b60fa2f-d949-4bb3-bc7e-2193dc9f774f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--that the shooter targeted Umurzokov for being an immigrant. Given that the shooter fired 40 rounds into an _optional_ study session (meaning, as one Brown University student [flagged for me](https://substack.com/redirect/68186b92-9a15-438c-88aa-cc99fb0e070d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), that there was no attendance list or predeterminate way to know who would show up) and hit 11 students in total, by _far_ the most logical possibility is that this attack was not targeted at any one individual--that the shooter wanted to kill as many people as possible at Brown, regardless of what they believed.
And yet, the right's declarations of victimization, honed after Charlie Kirk's assassination, have been immediate and relentless. One right-wing influencer [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/3826d966-df29-4f09-8a0f-2f554e0001e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "The left is going to target and kill every effective Republican they can find." A fellow at the Heritage Foundation with almost a million followers on X [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/950d2913-1175-4ec4-8380-da4daa0042a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "If you don't absolutely destroy left wing extremists, they WILL be emboldened." Republican elected officials joined in, with New York City Council Member Vickie Paladino [writing that the attack](https://substack.com/redirect/14d8cbab-50cd-4a34-8a5e-a6baa18f0d66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "was perpetrated by the leftist activist and targeted Republicans." Another [post](https://substack.com/redirect/4057bfd8-b3e3-4b92-99c3-e74b932527c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) read, "This happened because Antifa (and all the like groups) wasn't liquidated after Charlie Kirk was assassinated.... The time to respond harshly was months ago, but now is better than never." Musk [shared](https://substack.com/redirect/9008aedf-4be9-4e06-bb89-f733cb0692c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that last post, which has more than 30 million views.
At one point, my timeline on X was full--[literally full](https://substack.com/redirect/70d1b134-9167-4053-81a8-1cad41d26fb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--of nothing but these false claims, all from accounts I have never followed. Others have reported [similar](https://substack.com/redirect/00c407be-421e-4685-b89c-54c3c28583ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) experiences. It's hard to imagine such informational dominance not being the result, among other dynamics, of a clear algorithmic push (Musk runs X, after all). And the goal is to exploit this tragedy toward political ends, namely the repression of MAGA's political opponents. This repression is the explicit aim of President Donald Trump's [NSPM-7](https://substack.com/redirect/975fe917-aebf-4ab1-93d2-712a53e37671?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) directive and Attorney General Pam Bondi's recent [memo](https://substack.com/redirect/39bb3ef0-eaf4-43e7-9dc6-f7322f602860?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ordering the FBI to "compile a list of groups or entities engaging in acts that may constitute domestic terrorism," which is targeted toward those expressing "opposition to law and immigration enforcement; extreme views in favor of mass migration and open borders; adherence to radical gender ideology, anti-Americanism, anti-capitalism, or anti-Christianity," as well as "hostility towards traditional views on family, religion, and morality."
Of course, this isn't an isolated example of the MAGA conspiracy machine whirring into action. Increasingly, it seems like every high-profile event with potential political ramifications--certainly shootings but also climate disasters, elections, and more--gets poisoned by the right's toxically mendacious content amplification system. This week it's been occurring on multiple fronts simultaneously, with [Grok](https://substack.com/redirect/f6bb5fac-e6f4-42b6-9100-d3d44828654d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) spreading the lie that the hero in the horrific antisemitic mass shooting at Sydney's Bondi Beach was Christian, despite [media confirmation](https://substack.com/redirect/e5fb98c3-83c1-464e-b8c1-0ea218fee7c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the man, Ahmed Al Ahmed, was a Muslim immigrant originally from Syria.
American politics today are defined by a profound informational asymmetry. The right now controls most of the traditional media institutions, the social media platforms, and the algorithms that shape our attentional ecosystem. They have also built up a [far larger](https://substack.com/redirect/3515f9a1-97b9-43f1-9b8d-d03ed7a0cf85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) network of creators than anything the left has at its disposal. How do you beat opponents who have the informational and attentional firepower to impose deceptive conspiracies on the public and, in many cases, make their lies an accepted common truth? How can we win back the narrative on climate change when they can ascribe every climate-induced [hurricane](https://substack.com/redirect/49ffc7ea-4591-42d4-a921-d2f366385762?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [wildfire](https://substack.com/redirect/717cf787-d03f-43c4-9981-500af0db8813?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to [DEI initiatives](https://substack.com/redirect/a23d0826-0df2-49d1-aa46-1833e17255c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [weather control technology](https://substack.com/redirect/0429f66d-599e-4eb2-8aea-45e7d0f39143?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? How can we address far-right political violence when they can [turn](https://substack.com/redirect/c42da419-a40e-414f-88ed-3dffcfcf5fcf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an evangelical Trump supporter's assassination of a Democratic lawmaker into a plot by radical Marxists? How can we protect free and fair elections when they can just deny the results?
I don't have the solutions to these problems. But if there's one thing I've learned over the last few days--watching the buzzsaw of MAGA disinformation tear through the factual reality of this mass shooting not far from my home--it's that we need to figure them out, and quickly. It's not about finding that oft-discussed "liberal Joe Rogan." What's required is the buildout of a media ecosystem that can challenge the right's extensive informational infrastructure with the full panoply of content creators, revenue structures, cross-platform coordination, amplification systems, and attention-getting strategies necessary to win this narrative war.
Our reality is just what we see in front of us. It can be defined by truth or by lies, by information or disinformation. Ensuring that people start receiving more of the former, and less of the latter, is an incredibly difficult and expensive challenge. But there may not be a way around it. And we've got to start building fast, before MAGA's attentional stranglehold becomes our permanent reality.
* * *
This essay appeared in _[The New Republic](https://substack.com/redirect/4f915b84-5792-4438-8ab1-449a645e7c2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , a truly excellent outlet.

subject: How we stop Trump… –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue.

**[In a moment, I'm going to tell you why we _must_ take back the Senate majority to stop Trump's agenda. But first, I need to ask: Will you donate $5 to the DSCC to make it happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251216-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251216-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=22065%2E9716520%2EeV8EYA)**

Let me make this as plain as possible: **Donald Trump isn't fit to lead.**

We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies -- **if you asked AI to invent a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they probably would look exactly like Donald Trump.**

But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and -- more importantly -- _votes_ to let Donald Trump have his way with our government and continue on his authoritarian path.

**And that is exactly why we _must_ take back the Senate: Republicans will _never_ stand up to Trump, so if _anyone_ is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us.**

**[DSCC leadership, myself included, is counting on this team to raise $50,000 by midnight to keep our plan to flip the Senate on track._Nothing_ could be more important in these early days. So let me personally ask you -- will you rush $5 or more immediately to help fight for a Democratic majority? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251216-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251216-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=22065%2E9716520%2EeV8EYA)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue. Let me make this as plain as possible: Donald Trump isn't fit to lead. We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies -- if you asked AI to invent a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they probably would look exactly like Donald Trump. But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and -- more importantly -- votes to let Donald Trump have his way with our government and continue on his authoritarian path. And that is exactly why we must take back the Senate: Republicans will never stand up to Trump, so if anyone is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us. We need your help to fight for the Senate. subject: Prayers For the Fallen
body:
Prayers For the Fallen | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ec4cf73bbb90/conforti-for-congress-10612308?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter, Please join me in praying for the victims of recent attacks against Americans and their families. It is never easy to lose a loved one, but it is even more difficult around the holidays.

Ella Cook and Mukhammad Umurzokov were the two fatal victims of the Brown University shooting.

Two Iowa National Guards, Sgt. Edgar Torres-Tovar and Sgt. William Howard were killed in an attack in Syria.

Attacks against Americans are increasing, both at home and abroad. Stay vigilant. Those that want to harm America - and all it stands for, do not rest during the holiday season.

Please get out to vote Niki Conforti for Congressional District 6 at the upcoming primary election on March 17th, 2026. Help us spread the word with a contribution. Click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=f06eddc89b&e=25f4fa3311)

Don't stop believing in what we can achieve when we work together!
Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Frankly, this is complete bullsh*t
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth launched a sham investigation into me because I repeated something every servicemember is taught. That should send a shiver down the spine of every patriotic American. They will corrupt any process to make an example out of me.
#

Team, last night we learned that the Pentagon is “escalating” its review of me into an official command investigation.
Frankly, this is complete bullsh*t.
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth launched a sham investigation into me because I repeated something every servicemember is taught. That should send a shiver down the spine of every patriotic American. They will corrupt any process to make an example out of me.
But that is not going to stop me from doing my job, and it is absolutely not going to shut me up.
It’s now or never — and I need you with me.
[**Please, sign on here as a demonstration of your support. I’ll be looking for your name.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-dec25-endorse-2?source=em251216-1-1m&akid=6298%2E6688874%2E8cbq0W)
**[HAVE MARK’S BACK](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-dec25-endorse-2?source=em251216-1-1m&akid=6298%2E6688874%2E8cbq0W)**
Gratefully,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6298%2E6688874%2E8cbq0W).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. subject: I won’t water down our values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121396571/589316183/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVhMzA0ZGQtYTBkYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=377vNi_EQItQTOeFACggcNLS1CtOVXxdMMOwJB7bpKI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121396575/589316188/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.16.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVhMzA0ZGQtYTBkYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=377vNi_EQItQTOeFACggcNLS1CtOVXxdMMOwJB7bpKI=) Friend, If I've learned anything in my career in public service, it's that enacting change is never easy. But this fact doesn’t mean we need to waver on our values or water-down our vision for the future. Too much is on the line for us to go soft – reproductive freedoms, our environment, the economic well-being of millions of Americans, and our very democracy. **I refuse to buy into the narrative that progressives are demanding too much. We've proven that change is possible, but only if we fight for it.** But we need to elect a Democratic majority in Washington to curb the extremism of the Trump Administration, and maximize the good we can do.. **This is the final fundraising deadline of my first year in office. The final deadline before the election year, and our chance to help usher in a blue wave.** A single donation of $3 might sound like a drop in the bucket compared to millions from a super PAC. But when you chip in, someone else reading this email might decide to as well. These contributions add up in a big way. clean_body: | = = Friend, If I've learned anything in my career in public service, it's that enacting change is never easy. But this fact doesn’t mean we need to waver on our values or water-down our vision for the future. Too much is on the line for us to go soft – reproductive freedoms, our environment, the economic well-being of millions of Americans, and our very democracy. I refuse to buy into the narrative that progressives are demanding too much. We've proven that change is possible, but only if we fight for it. But we need to elect a Democratic majority in Washington to curb the extremism of the Trump Administration, and maximize the good we can do.. This is the final fundraising deadline of my first year in office. The final deadline before the election year, and our chance to help usher in a blue wave. A single donation of $3 might sound like a drop in the bucket compared to millions from a super PAC. But when you chip in, someone else reading this email might decide to as well. These contributions add up in a big way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! I hate to be the bearer of bad news, friend. But last night, we fell short of our critical mid-month fundraising goal.
**Now, I have to make the difficult decision to lower our overall fundraising goal for the month. **
I won't sugarcoat this – if we keep needing to lower our fundraising goals, we'll be in danger of turning Colorado over to a Republican governor.

Once our numbers go public, everyone with skin in the game will look to see if we have the resources and grassroots momentum to hit the ground running in the new year – or, if we'll be on the back foot entering the 2026 election cycle.

name: The Democrats
subject: 3 reasons to give $3
body:
---
Derek, we’d like to share 3 good reasons to chip in $3 to the Democratic Party before the end of the year. 1️⃣ **Democrats mobilized and organized _across the country_ to win big in the 2025 elections.** After overperforming or winning nearly every special election throughout the year, Democrats won major statewide victories in Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania last month. It’s crucial we continue this momentum into 2026. 2️⃣ **Democrats are in striking distance of _taking back the House._** By flipping just _three seats_ in the House, Democrats can take back control of Congress and use their power to stand up for working families and stop Trump’s agenda in its tracks. 3️⃣ **Now is the _best_ time to make a donation to the DNC.** When you donate to the DNC, you’re giving us the ability to start building campaign infrastructure in _every_ state, to give Democrats everywhere the support they need to mobilize their communities and stand up for working people. [**If you’ve been waiting for the best time to give to the DNC, now is it, Derek. clean_body: Derek, we’d like to share 3 good reasons to chip in $3 to the Democratic Party before the end of the year. 1️⃣ Democrats mobilized and organized across the country to win big in the 2025 elections. After overperforming or winning nearly every special election throughout the year, Democrats won major statewide victories in Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania last month. It’s crucial we continue this momentum into 2026. 2️⃣ Democrats are in striking distance of taking back the House. By flipping just three seats in the House, Democrats can take back control of Congress and use their power to stand up for working families and stop Trump’s agenda in its tracks. 3️⃣ Now is the best time to make a donation to the DNC. When you donate to the DNC, you’re giving us the ability to start building campaign infrastructure in every state, to give Democrats everywhere the support they need to mobilize their communities and stand up for working people. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: Will you personally endorse James?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
We know the race for U.S. Senate in Texas was just shaken up.
It makes this a critical moment for us to demonstrate the depth of grassroots support for James. One way we’re trying to do that is by building a list of personal endorsers.
**[If you agree that James is the best candidate to take back Texas, will you add your name to endorse our movement for the U.S. Senate? We are looking to have as many people as possible show their support today.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/em-251216-personalendorse?source=em251216-1-ak&refcode2=320.1347274.4tFIA2&t=1&akid=320%2E1347274%2E4tFIA2)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/em-251216-personalendorse?source=em251216-1-ak&refcode2=320.1347274.4tFIA2&t=2&akid=320%2E1347274%2E4tFIA2)
It may seem like this is a small action, but it has a big impact.
The primary is 11 weeks away, and the first ballots will be mailed out in January. We need to prove that we have the depth of grassroots support required to win a state as big and diverse as Texas.
Pulling off such a historic feat requires building the largest grassroots movement that Texas has ever seen.
We’re well on our way. James has held massive rallies in dozens of communities — covering every corner of Texas. Nobody gets taken for granted in this campaign.
It’s important to know you’re with us too. Each person who adds their name helps us send an unmistakable message about the strength of this movement.
**[Will you please add your name to personally endorse James Talarico? It would mean a lot to him to know you have his back, especially today with all eyes on Texas.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/em-251216-personalendorse?source=em251216-1-ak&refcode2=320.1347274.4tFIA2&t=3&akid=320%2E1347274%2E4tFIA2)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/em-251216-personalendorse?source=em251216-1-ak&refcode2=320.1347274.4tFIA2&t=4&akid=320%2E1347274%2E4tFIA2)
Team Talarico

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=6&refcode2=320_1347274_4tFIA2&akid=320%2E1347274%2E4tFIA2)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=320%2E1347274%2E4tFIA2).

---
Peter,
This is it. One seat. One election. One chance to stop Democrats in Richmond from locking in permanent power.
As you know, Ghazala Hashmi was elected Lieutenant Governor, leaving her Senate seat open. On **January 6** , **John Thomas** , our Republican nominee, will fight to replace her in the Virginia Senate.
We need all hands on deck right now. No more sidelines. No more excuses.
Here’s why this race is so critical: C**onstitutional Amendments require a majority of all Senators elected.** That means if the Senate is split **20 to 20** , the amendment **fails.** No tie. No workaround. A deadlock stops the gerrymandering amendment in its tracks.
---
---

Democrats are openly coming for our congressional maps, and they want a delegation that looks like **10 Democrats to 1 Republican.** That puts **Rob Wittman, Jen Kiggans, John McGuire, and Ben Cline** in the crosshairs.
A lot of folks are still frustrated about November. We get it. But frustration doesn’t stop them. **Action does.**
So here’s the question: will you sit back and relax, or will you step up and help stop the insanity before they turn **Virginia into California**?

clean_body: | | | | The fight to REPLACE HASHMI. Peter, This is it. One seat. One election. One chance to stop Democrats in Richmond from locking in permanent power. As you know, Ghazala Hashmi was elected Lieutenant Governor, leaving her Senate seat open. On January 6 , John Thomas , our Republican nominee, will fight to replace her in the Virginia Senate. We need all hands on deck right now. No more sidelines. No more excuses. Here’s why this race is so critical: Constitutional Amendments require a majority of all Senators elected. That means if the Senate is split 20 to 20 , the amendment fails. No tie. No workaround. A deadlock stops the gerrymandering amendment in its tracks. | Democrats are openly coming for our congressional maps, and they want a delegation that looks like 10 Democrats to 1 Republican. That puts Rob Wittman, Jen Kiggans, John McGuire, and Ben Cline in the crosshairs. A lot of folks are still frustrated about November. We get it. But frustration doesn’t stop them. Action does. So here’s the question: will you sit back and relax, or will you step up and help stop the insanity before they turn Virginia into California? | \- The Republican Party of Virginia == \- PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

## The rise of anti-semitism on the left...
Anti-semitism has been a problem for centuries.
There's nothing new under the sun.
In the last 10 years, it's found its latest resurgence in the Democrat party.
From violent takeovers of college buildings to despicable comments made on social media, anti-semitism has gotten a firm hold on the left.
It's not just the radicals at the end of the political spectrum either.
Anti-semitism has become a mainstream position among those on the left.
In fact, it's not just a tolerated position, in many circles it's the "cool" opinion to hold.
It's a sad and disturbing development, but it's what we're facing.
So how did anti-semitism get such a foothold on the left?
Let's break it down...

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

Here’s what’s coming up in the new year:

🇺🇸 **November’s midterm elections** will be our first BIG chance to fight back against the Trump administration and take back power in Congress and build governing power in the states. We’ve already endorsed 32 Democratic pro-choice women running for U.S. House seats and two running for U.S. Senate seats – with more to come soon!

🤝 We’re right in the middle of our **2026 Early Bird Membership Drive!** Electing Democratic pro-choice women to office requires year-round dedication, and EMILYs List members are able to pledge their support early in the races that matter most.

We’ve already endorsed 32 Democratic pro-choice women running for U.S. House seats and two running for U.S. Senate seats – with more to come soon! 🗳️ Amanda Edwards’ runoff election for Texas’ 18th Congressional District is on January 31, and we’re working hard to power her to the finish line and restore Houston’s voice in Congress! 🤝 We’re right in the middle of our 2026 Early Bird Membership Drive! Electing Democratic pro-choice women to office requires year-round dedication, and EMILYs List members are able to pledge their support early in the races that matter most. In order to start the new year strong, we set a goal of activating 10,000 early bird members by Wednesday night. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks and happy holidays, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, Federal and Gubernatorial, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:

Peter, Tennessee’s special election should’ve been a slam dunk. Instead, Republicans _barely_ held the seat, with just a 9-point win in a district President Trump carried by nearly 20. **That’s a wakeup call. And if we don’t listen, we’ll lose.** I went on Fox News and laid out, step-by-step, what we need to do to win in 2026.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c5abe2d3c7054576859730b1fe683540&_e=lq3ZGO6vm-W3TSSM9Bgb153OOsEvcur3l6NsoPsMV-g58-2RmkzoStG5jcHEifRC5wQE62z7nyVb8WCI7fABWnlLAmKX_aoQttco6rSgpCZrm3byFcnFI9JQUGC17d6yUGB8QsrJniUDR3qZxIsonHVhlPY7_g2VN2R5L0zXIVMCljk0peagsCwAXBsy6grq5-jnhfqLm_15XUepmyWIrjmFaDr8eioDTp8JeFnFGXoqEshYG2K35Uod46il_8T2s7nI4bUu0c452xQfT1oYt29EvP4WOIGYdx_Ku_aaDLXD_bMjSL-wctRV3xtrrezqDSUuulYDSyJo65qrjmh63fIFhoM68dYh9UuGdAm-awgYGQMRGl9po2xvRJ1hCF7DQU32Ony5q33wHUgOdD943MdybSEKqmUVMGY7RUAHDFUG61XmYJ1efX9gMiFdXmKHWHdiQ3XcSOvOkKwnUzcZzQiZ9HhQJsLZN7eQFtuOTjDdL68ngbi-f1qObhkwPLzKj4kZEpd7xkFyNzqmvlijBLQbWgVGMoUszl1D_X2co3MoGuXK3I6i-Y-I7qUIh51sr9vFNqPwMw2t4dvGMVJQhtRaEzmokYIvodRqsACUAB1bye0EUWVFGKhkMAgeLn53ua1tKj0FQt8fNF4STow27mzhsx7ZNgM9fO29cHqmQ4G0mSNmK1xohIMz09Rym3k3wq4ah2-xTlCRrQUE-N0QSZ7Yq1WFCimn7tiQkImjW8iofaHuTpdpBW4dHmEoTYY2gGCovRj1z-Rhl6yil3aF-R4-puVnEkixok8cGC9myymGdRUzQx-Eano5iI6GMsPrrrDfM4iB-L_wUWSefeF0ZA%3D%3D)

Here’s the issue we face: Some of the voters who show up for President Trump don’t show up when he’s not on the ballot. But here’s the good news: **It doesn’t have to be that way.** We overcame it in Florida in 2022. This state was a purple battleground. Remember, we were winning by one point just a few years ago. But in 2022, we won by 1.5 million votes...a **20-point margin**. It was the biggest Republican victory in the state’s history. **How?** We didn’t run on pale pastels. We ran on **bold colors**. We drew sharp contrasts. We stuck it to the Left every single day, and we delivered real results. **If Republicans want to win, we need to give voters something to believe in, not just something to vote against.** **[That’s why I launched RON PAC.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c5abe2d3c7054576859730b1fe683540&_e=lq3ZGO6vm-W3TSSM9Bgb153OOsEvcur3l6NsoPsMV-g58-2RmkzoStG5jcHEifRC5wQE62z7nyVb8WCI7fABWnlLAmKX_aoQttco6rSgpCZrm3byFcnFI9JQUGC17d6yUGB8QsrJniUDR3qZxIsonHVhlPY7_g2VN2R5L0zXIVMCljk0peagsCwAXBsy6grq5-jnhfqLm_15XUepmyWIrjmFaDr8eioDTp8JeFnFGXoqEshYG2K35Uod46il_8T2s7nI4bUu0c452xQfT1oYt29EvP4WOIGYdx_Ku_aaDLXD_bMjSL-wctRV3xtrrezqIxEQ4t8AKhzi2wR585-QDDgspDnenp-fjt6juhd_L0s8JKK0Jc9alOUbVT0-SLEyPxf6WPQkshgjiNKjFFIAwVVb8kvaQ70HMw0_YGIiXM6nYICuYykwDf2XPaHb0f0IOpOwlPzFYe5aYzLovRuDyyTYiEq4_PnDeJXlH9pNrv5d1SDm8RJ12XcnilrfdnNqfzR8qCLtFMGESwa7VvvMe-p_6clZHd6qvPOjJO_oQR682TC9Bgh8scFLXkS3sN6SqzOto-iOAeOHQJu3KjnIEDotMsy7o2dNkjcQbqUIdNNVi7jm3vRduJRVmWNUKNB7cEPePdlF2heJJMsRb8UFvjOHZ0p7JxFn2FtIRDcGFAQaIszch_Zp4OspzfpKUM4vf14HWeKJpz6KeMHF1lZL1g9fMUzeCKVl0IdDQBxRnBuBm3NiVLYPQXDqN9tVo52t77nmNPSQqbRWMzWdkydmeneohnu09wtulKZne3IIQfWHl62xlotqWXCUx-kxYCUPxAYpwKh-KfTf1Q1-MfwZLA%3D%3D)** We’re electing bold conservatives across the country who don’t flinch, don’t fold, and don’t back down. Leaders who will stand up for parents' rights, border security, economic sanity, and American strength, just like we’ve done in Florida.
---

name: James Carville
subject: It's time to get serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss the Senate majority goodbye.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥 Before you read another word, chip in $10 or whatever you can to help Chris Pappas fight back right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251216_1_carville.v9IC6_&refcode=em20251216-1&t=1&akid=4051%2E582294%2EvHserz)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the right-wing’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Rush a contribution to Chris Pappas today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251216_1_carville.v9IC6_&refcode=em20251216-1&t=2&akid=4051%2E582294%2EvHserz)**
**[Chip in Now »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251216_1_carville.8-11QV&refcode=em20251216-1&t=3&akid=4051%2E582294%2EvHserz)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.

body:
Both President Trump and Elon Musk are warning about something that could send the market down 50%, real estate down 40% and savings accounts down 30%. | | | [-](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=114a73f4a99c41209e017ff0de0a6abd&_e=x9FMUUBk7-IJ8QsfpPdoPG6sTdKE3i9kZtR3kydawbIySEkAfDrbZnSFoiOVVQzHIHofQU_79FN3wIEw2SxhlcZDXTiIhuKtHR1r41KMWB826WnJqqdlY9PN2tJ-K9RTqNelRPUyOCcMYwwtHuzBmWEZHN6Eqgg_GBGGbQU5HVPLvvYeBbKzrwe-O5DxQicbGdugu_JDYijEso5kgqXhy4alwV_Ad6nPIohFMUb5dl4%3D)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]
