---
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

This photo says all you need to know about Joe Lombardo and why he has to go. | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT1IBVfzOrqxt30R4iT-GDafBJDvuHpAgsW6tC74mUNP7rWLVyd4iU-05Wni3bF5N8F5djM19nRZatTJpPPpbTpe9tr4x727oKaKzIiDg_0BA4_T370uNJEiigr4RVFFNSCI_crMaexaS5mfuLo-akP5Xd3aSWRo95wrWNpbZQa6oE5wIzv8pOxLomcn35vk-DZpl3yGs1erGE0rMxREM2MhTzs_lLiBhYyWiZ32P_1OAt8-BsnvMe-IDd_k96ufnq_5EhhQ-yWxsLjYFSd0Qey7OCYtz0taVNPB8upF_smgLf6NOkK7zefhP2qMfhs6GO/4mh/RY5m5B9IT0mX57DqhQs2ww/h0/h001.8k3oaijtd92l8Zel6CCVipBG8OOs4wjf3Vxi5_t32pw)

clean_body: We need to give voters something to believe in| | | Friend, Tennessee’s special election should’ve been a slam dunk. Instead, Republicans barely held the seat, with just a 9-point win in a district President Trump carried by nearly 20. That’s a wakeup call. And if we don’t listen, we’ll lose. I went on Fox News and laid out, step-by-step, what we need to do to win in 2026. Here’s the issue we face: Some of the voters who show up for President Trump don’t show up when he’s not on the ballot. But here’s the good news: It doesn’t have to be that way. We overcame it in Florida in 2022. This state was a purple battleground. Remember, we were winning by one point just a few years ago. But in 2022, we won by 1.5 million votes...a 20-point margin. It was the biggest Republican victory in the state’s history. How? We didn’t run on pale pastels. We ran on bold colors. We drew sharp contrasts. We stuck it to the Left every single day, and we delivered real results. If Republicans want to win, we need to give voters something to believe in, not just something to vote against. We’re electing bold conservatives across the country who don’t flinch, don’t fold, and don’t back down. Leaders who will stand up for parents' rights, border security, economic sanity, and American strength, just like we’ve done in Florida. Help us take the Florida Blueprint nationwide! This moment demands action. Not next year. Not next summer. Right now. 2026 is right around the corner , and if we’re going to build a winning majority, we’ve got to get in the fight today. Don’t wait. Help us recruit, support, and elect battle-ready conservatives across the country. Onward, Onward, Gov. Ron DeSantis | | | | | | Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC). Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee. www.ronpac.com | PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 |

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -| | | | | Patriot, I just met with President Trump at the White House to discuss our major policy wins and keep fighting to fix our country after 4 disastrous years under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. But I also want to tell you about another White House meeting we had -in which every single Republican member was asked to attend! Please read my post-White House briefing prepared for your viewing.[[link]]() Thank you, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | id: 2025-03-20-13:14:10:229t |

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Still Time to Support Our Work Heading Into 2026

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Hi Peter,
Thank you to everyone who joined us for our Annual Holiday Reception last night. It was a wonderful opportunity to come together, reflect on the year behind us and look ahead to the important work to come.
If you weren’t able to attend but would still like to support our work, we invite you to contribute using the link below. As we head into 2026, a pivotal election year, we rely on the continued support of committed Democrats like you to organize, mobilize and win across the Commonwealth.
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday2025?refcode=follow-up]
Or, paste this link into your browser: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday2025?refcode=follow-up [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday2025?refcode=follow-up]

Steve Kerrigan

name: George Whitesides
subject: This is missing from Congress today
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121405687/589346454/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmE5YWMwOS1iMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIlObdaDAcKRPgl7Sp4IgPVkLPJdVbznfm5JglZuh2E=)
Peter, As we approach the end of the year, I’m reflecting on my first year serving CA-27 in Washington -- and how the divided Congress is hurting those we swore to serve. It doesn’t have to be this way. Back in 2009, I was chosen by President Obama to lead NASA as Chief of Staff. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121405688/589346455/148511826?refcode=em-12.16.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmE5YWMwOS1iMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIlObdaDAcKRPgl7Sp4IgPVkLPJdVbznfm5JglZuh2E=) At NASA, we put petty partisan politics aside to work toward the mission that brought us together: moving the country forward in space and science. Self-interest and ego went out the door because our work demanded it. **That’s what is missing in Congress today -- we should be working together to do better for American families.** During the historically-long government shutdown, my GOP colleagues refused to play ball to secure affordable healthcare. Time and again they have put the wants of the Trump Administration ahead of everyday Americans. I decided to run for Congress to bring real results back to our communities. Right now, the Republican majority is refusing to work with us -- and refusing accountability. **[The good news is that flipping the House majority is within reach if we keep CA‐27 blue. If you’re with me, will you chip in $3 to end the year with strength and stand for what’s right?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121405689/589346456/148511826?refcode=em-12.16.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmE5YWMwOS1iMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIlObdaDAcKRPgl7Sp4IgPVkLPJdVbznfm5JglZuh2E=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121405691/589346458/148511826?refcode=em-12.16.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmE5YWMwOS1iMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIlObdaDAcKRPgl7Sp4IgPVkLPJdVbznfm5JglZuh2E=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121405692/589346459/148511826?refcode=em-12.16.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmE5YWMwOS1iMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIlObdaDAcKRPgl7Sp4IgPVkLPJdVbznfm5JglZuh2E=)****

clean_body: | = Peter, As we approach the end of the year, I’m reflecting on my first year serving CA-27 in Washington -- and how the divided Congress is hurting those we swore to serve. It doesn’t have to be this way. Back in 2009, I was chosen by President Obama to lead NASA as Chief of Staff. = At NASA, we put petty partisan politics aside to work toward the mission that brought us together: moving the country forward in space and science. Self-interest and ego went out the door because our work demanded it. That’s what is missing in Congress today -- we should be working together to do better for American families. During the historically-long government shutdown, my GOP colleagues refused to play ball to secure affordable healthcare. Time and again they have put the wants of the Trump Administration ahead of everyday Americans. I decided to run for Congress to bring real results back to our communities. Right now, the Republican majority is refusing to work with us -- and refusing accountability. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

data

Justice Department sues 4 more states for access to detailed voter
data
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78363&L=36685&F=T&&hash=d2105a2704c7ef03cad930e631ddc847f7a729ebe5ae6dc327674b130ca12454]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78363&L=36685&F=T&&hash=d2105a2704c7ef03cad930e631ddc847f7a729ebe5ae6dc327674b130ca12454]

The Justice Department is suing four more states as part of its
effort to collect detailed voting data and other election
information across the country. The department filed federal lawsuits
against Colorado, Hawaii, Massachusetts and Nevada.

Judicial Watch lawsuits allege that both California and Illinois
violated the National Voter Registration Act, which requires states
to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to
remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible
voters” who have died or changed residence.

registration lists has led to lawsuits and legal actions under
the National Voter Registration Act that have resulted in the removal
of five million names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen states and
localities over the last several years.

clean_body: Background on Justice Department suing four more states for voter data [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Justice Department sues 4 more states for access to detailed voter data [] Source: Associated Press [] The Justice Department is suing four more states as part of its effort to collect detailed voting data and other election information across the country. The department filed federal lawsuits against Colorado, Hawaii, Massachusetts and Nevada. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] July 31, 2025 Federal Courts in California and Illinois Advance Judicial Watch Lawsuits to Clean Up Dirty Voter Rolls [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch lawsuits allege that both California and Illinois violated the National Voter Registration Act, which requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] April 03, 2025 More than Five Million Names Cleaned from Voter Rolls Nationwide [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch announced that its analysis and use of voter registration lists has led to lawsuits and legal actions under the National Voter Registration Act that have resulted in the removal of five million names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen states and localities over the last several years. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] November 06, 2025 Judicial Watch, Allied Educational Foundation Ask Supreme Court to Allow Access to Voter Records [] Source: Judicial WAtch [] Judicial Watch and the Allied Educational Foundation asked the Supreme Court to reverse the Third Circuit’s decision denying the Public Interest Legal Foundation standing to sue for voter information guaranteed under the National Voter Registration Act. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Tell Ken Paxton: Leave Texas women ALONE!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-paxton?refcode=121625_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-paxton?refcode=121625_2]
A Texas woman, Tierra Walker, had multiple health complications early in her pregnancy. Fearing for her life, she asked her doctors for an abortion.
They were terrified after Roe v. Wade was overturned and sent her home.
A couple of weeks later her son found her dead. She lost her life to pregnancy complications.
Tierra was the FOURTH Texas woman to die as a result of the Texas abortion ban.
And now in 2025, Texas women have even fewer rights than they did before.
How does Trump reward Texas A.G. Ken Paxton for this loyal work? By giving his new campaign for US Senate the MAGA stamp of approval.
Peter. we’re building a warchest now to stop Paxton before his campaign gets momentum. But, we’re running out of time. Join our fight to stand against Paxton’s vision to bring the Handmaid’s Tale to DC >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-paxton?refcode=121625_2]

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: It’s Stephany Rose’s birthday! 🎂
body:
Today’s the day — sign her card!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ff2a89ad997f/tockcw1cwy-223?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=b5dd7e58c8&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | **🎂 Today is the day—Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose’s birthday!**
We’re asking our whole movement to come together and show her how much her leadership means.
If you haven’t already, [will you take a moment to sign her birthday card?](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=a91b2d08b2&e=81ab29c4d2) Your message will mean the world to her.
---
| [Sign Stephany Rose’s Card](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=c909fb6c18&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | **Stephany Rose has dedicated her life to fighting for justice.** She has stood with communities in crisis, called out those in power who are failing vulnerable families, and helped shape a movement that centers on everyday people.
Today, we get to say: Thank you.
After you sign, we hope you’ll consider [honoring her birthday with a special donation of $12.16, $47, or $19.78](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=d837669db1&e=81ab29c4d2). Your support keeps our organizing strong and fuels the work that Stephany Rose gives so much of herself to lead.
---
| | _If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly._
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [DONATE $12.16](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=1426754eda&e=81ab29c4d2)

---

---
| | [ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=b00a8d04de&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | Let’s fill this card with the same gratitude, joy, and love she brings to this movement every day.
Add your name and join the celebration. Happy Birthday, Stephany Rose!
---
| |
_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_

name: James Carville
subject: I’m fuming — and you should be too
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning in New Hampshire.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251216-9837&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9837%2E614464%2E2ODfy7)
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — just jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥Before you read another word, split $10 or whatever you can between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to help Chris fight back right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251216-9837&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9837%2E614464%2E2ODfy7)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the far-right’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Split a contribution between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251216-9837&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9837%2E614464%2E2ODfy7)**
**[Split a donation now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251216-9837&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9837%2E614464%2E2ODfy7)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251216-9837&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9837%2E614464%2E2ODfy7)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=6&akid=9837%2E614464%2E2ODfy7).

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
This is the only toss-up district in New York. National Republicans see it as their fastest path to holding the House and they’re already raising staggering sums to flip this seat.

---
| Peter,

We’re halfway through the month and we’re already feeling the pressure.

We are just weeks away from closing out the last quarter before 2026 begins and we’re still short of where we need to be to stay competitive.

**Here’s the truth:**

This is the only toss-up district in New York. National Republicans see it as their fastest path to holding the House and they’re already raising staggering sums to flip this seat.

And now my opponent from last cycle is moving toward running again.

If we don’t finish this quarter strong, we’ll enter 2026 already behind. We cannot afford that. Not in a district this competitive and not when control of the House could come down to us.

clean_body: This is the only toss-up district in New York. National Republicans see it as their fastest path to holding the House and they’re already raising staggering sums to flip this seat. | Peter, We’re halfway through the month and we’re already feeling the pressure. We are just weeks away from closing out the last quarter before 2026 begins and we’re still short of where we need to be to stay competitive. | = Here’s the truth: This is the only toss-up district in New York. National Republicans see it as their fastest path to holding the House and they’re already raising staggering sums to flip this seat. And now my opponent from last cycle is moving toward running again. If we don’t finish this quarter strong, we’ll enter 2026 already behind. We cannot afford that. Not in a district this competitive and not when control of the House could come down to us. | | = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me, Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. body:
Trump’s attacks on the First Amendment are escalating!

| _**We have good news:**_ The Corporation for Public Broadcasting agreed to fulfill a multi-year contract with NPR after Trump pulled funding! **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121406572/589349313/-318400792?refcode=NDCAF_20251216_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2MwZGJlZS1iNGRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGFLTi4Zrg6K_R-4WWOHMQnh35hAe5V1hM30jDBU2gA=&emci=e4978ba5-b0da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5cc0dbee-b4da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=48524772)** | [DEFEND PUBLIC BROADCASTING: ADD YOUR NAME NOW! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121406574/589349315/-318400792?refcode=NDCAF_20251216_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2MwZGJlZS1iNGRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGFLTi4Zrg6K_R-4WWOHMQnh35hAe5V1hM30jDBU2gA=&emci=e4978ba5-b0da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5cc0dbee-b4da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=48524772)

**_The bad news:_ This contract is only temporary. **Trump’s public broadcasting cuts are still under legal review and his attacks on the First Amendment are escalating!

He’s pressuring and threatening public outlets to silence all journalism that exposes the corruption of his administration and disagrees with it.

**New Dems are fighting back in Congress, but we’re asking top Democrats like you to join us in support of the First Amendment by standing up for critical media watchdogs like NPR!**

**[Can we count on you to add your name to our “Defend Public Broadcasting” petition now? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121406576/589349317/-318400792?refcode=NDCAF_20251216_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2MwZGJlZS1iNGRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGFLTi4Zrg6K_R-4WWOHMQnh35hAe5V1hM30jDBU2gA=&emci=e4978ba5-b0da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5cc0dbee-b4da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=48524772)**

Trump’s public broadcasting cuts are still under legal review and his attacks on the First Amendment are escalating! He’s pressuring and threatening public outlets to silence all journalism that exposes the corruption of his administration and disagrees with it. New Dems are fighting back in Congress, but we’re asking top Democrats like you to join us in support of the First Amendment by standing up for critical media watchdogs like NPR! | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. name: Team Cori
subject: Our new radio ad is live!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?refcode=x_251216_radioad_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?refcode=x_251216_radioad_act]
Hi Peter,
Our opponent’s dark money allies are ALREADY putting up ads in St. Louis to mislead voters, and you know we had to step up and respond.
We deserve more. We need a leader who is bringing about a better future for our district.
This week, we launched our first ad of the election to say just that.
Voters are already hearing Cori’s holiday message of hope across St. Louis, and it’s all about what matters most: us, showing up for our community, every single day.
Take a listen, and if you can, consider contributing an average donation of $25 or whatever you can afford to help us keep it on the air. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?refcode=x_251216_radioad_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?refcode=x_251216_radioad_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?refcode=x_251216_radioad_act]
This holiday season, Cori is reminding us how we’ve supported each other through tough times, how we’ve lifted up our neighbors, and our focus on addressing rising costs and hardships.
She’s running for Congress again to fight for relief, lift burdens, and finish the work we started in Missouri’s 1st District.
We’re letting the whole district know we’re fighting to protect their wallets. But running radio ads isn’t cheap, and we need your help to keep Cori’s message on the airwaves.
Every dollar you give ensures we can reach more voters with the truth about who shows up and who doesn’t.
Chip in $5, $10, or $25 today to make sure our radio ad keeps running, and our movement keeps growing. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?refcode=x_251216_radioad_act&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_251216_radioad_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_251216_radioad_act]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_251216_radioad_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_251216_radioad_act]
With gratitude and determination,
— Team Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?refcode=x_251216_radioad_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_holidayradioad?refcode=x_251216_radioad_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Reminder: Hope to see you Thursday! MassGOP Christmas Party & Straw Poll 🎁
body:
Make your voice heard & celebrate the year...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PMwFKLUhYDnthVv1UGRiS47P420kXAn3D8F8iucR4lZxPQ4eLxlokV-5E_gHossFszedL0X7eQWgeVLKfr5eaI-hHEAqz9vwTTy_WajDsdKBw6EOmAxygD1PSJcUfpGJhAXvMNUhL1vHxb8900hXRw==&c=ZDtAs3OaOBYooj6ObzJw8oeqXXRJWWUsF5qP6odNdvlqY4SnO39uIw==&ch=wDJceFM_fXn63DrZ0ndz2baB4vhaUggT5wIoY8g4BdsSs9tBrNQEpw==)
---
| Dear Peter,
As we approach the close of the year, I warmly invite you to join the Massachusetts Republican Party for a festive evening celebrating the season and our collective wins this year.
This Thursday, December 18, in Boston, the MassGOP will gather to reflect on our shared successes, enjoy good company, and look ahead to the opportunities before us in 2026. Please, join us! The evening will also feature a straw poll for Governor, to be conducted in person. Your personal invitation and RSVP details are included below.
---

Peter, We’re already halfway through December. **_Somehow._** And that means three big things are coming up fast:
* Our**end-of-month** fundraising goal
* Our **end-of-year** fundraising goal
* And our**final quarter before 2026** , when election season really starts to heat up

We have to cut to the chase and be honest though because right now, **we’re $4,000 behind where we need to be to close out the year.** **[So, we have to ask...If you’re able to chip in today, even a small amount, it will go a long way toward making sure Becca has the resources she needs heading into 2026. Can you click here to help us close this $4,000 gap before the end of the year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121407387/589352095/1883248398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTNhMTYwZS1iOGRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M4qk9I5SdQR6ZJJo90_CpQy7nf_z26YMOn4c4tKzMZg=)** **Here’s why this moment matters so much.** 2026 is the year we fight to take back the House and the Senate. That fight doesn’t start next year—**it starts now** , with the work we put in before the attacks begin. **Becca Balint has shown that she is exactly the kind of leader we need for this moment.** She doesn’t just show up when it’s easy. She shows up everywhere— _**even in Republican districts**_ , holding town halls where others won’t, listening to people who feel ignored, and reminding them that democracy works best when everyone is heard. ---
Becca is ready to turn out voters not just in Vermont, but across the country. She’s ready to fight back against Donald Trump and stand up for our communities.**And she’s ready to lead the charge when it matters most.**
But she can’t do it alone.
**Becca is the first woman and the first LGBTQ+ person to represent Vermont in Congress**. That’s not something we can take lightly—especially in the Trump era. We know the attacks are coming.**The question is whether we’ll be ready _before_ they start.**
[**That’s why hitting this goal is so important. If you can, please click here and make a donation today to help us crush our end-of-month and end-of-year goals.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121407390/589352098/1883248398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTNhMTYwZS1iOGRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M4qk9I5SdQR6ZJJo90_CpQy7nf_z26YMOn4c4tKzMZg=)
Let’s make it unmistakably clear that anyone who tries to take Becca down will be up against an**army of supporters** who have her back.
Thanks for being part of this team and for believing in what’s possible when regular people show up together. We’re so close—and with your help, we can finish this year strong!
**Proud to be in this fight with you,**
— Team Balint

The House majority could be **won** or **lost** in Michigan, and Republicans know it. What are we doing about it??

There are 322 days until the midterms and I’m not wasting a SINGLE. ONE.

I’m rolling up my sleeves and getting to work. There’s no way in hell I’ll play scared heading into 2026.

I’m going to fight to re-take the House majority, **starting right here in Michigan.**

But to win, we need resources. We need a strong, organized campaign – people on the ground knocking doors, making calls, running ads, and mobilizing voters across the state. And we need grassroots support like yours to make it happen.

My FEC filing deadline is at the end of this month. That means we need to show strength now to prove we have the grassroots support to compete with the wall of GOP cash in Michigan.

clean_body: I’m rolling up my sleeves and getting to work. | = | You don’t need me to tell you what’s at stake – you’re paying attention. The Republican majority is targeting Michigan because some of the most competitive races in the country are happening right here, on our home soil. | = The House majority could be won or lost in Michigan, and Republicans know it. What are we doing about it?? There are 322 days until the midterms and I’m not wasting a SINGLE. ONE. I’m rolling up my sleeves and getting to work. There’s no way in hell I’ll play scared heading into 2026. I’m going to fight to re-take the House majority, starting right here in Michigan. But to win, we need resources. We need a strong, organized campaign – people on the ground knocking doors, making calls, running ads, and mobilizing voters across the state. And we need grassroots support like yours to make it happen. My FEC filing deadline is at the end of this month. That means we need to show strength now to prove we have the grassroots support to compete with the wall of GOP cash in Michigan. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. – Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: I wrote you a quick letter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P
body:
| | | __If you wish to unsubscribe, click here__
---
[](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=cb710a3d759847f0bec3ac5c25840c4c&_e=dghSaOmygGB6q62uXb8YzgbiCLzrjPTcAAIf032am4Y13ZwSCVWQG3HIiPY9X6GayXaxtYkR0QEtp1uvTYy5TIvxUWtpO9Zel01GACXqRHnp4ZHkvdBQn7m-2AlTu1TvOYNE6SRCfCro_juRMEJh_DNxHsUVRBTWlitjf8ZKmYlusPzkOqcZH0tUh_urHN0DeR8ndutKVh-ngpkxX6rPVkxZRqc6RGb01LsAgcS_zqW29BtsgFqq6K7NZJiJYwfR6K9z0FXfEdU47Mti2TayVYuEWc7b0P8D_IIc2G25W01k_5sn6ZXvJ6gTwB37B99bOYnt9P4tL9J41YO6Vgqx8UcVxCSxefHF1ZkT19EJ97cQ28eTveLgUjybtZpPqJHv3p6ORTnw3wh_K-GpWVrgx8TWXmfwCZis3fCT9CxwjOCjgaODxaAY53tsK0Y8Uq7bWegQAKRd-DUoker3udzQp-MT-yMHLG3RFgXV9KLdR5yJRRlTacBwQJMDBqIZZYKG2EykP_QcNxIHEDkC4kVtpd9OSubcf1rpllhKgP4BvhFg6YsT1SlJrkA-nkvbdCdLbUfudgSL19q29wwSkPUqPL3N8SVSN08JMMu2wW2ORRTP_pPFdWe-Ag8UIIYfqUBD69avQNmslAI1hcfX-mwbyR-5RM55__viEgXt7uuZcGk%3D)
---
Dear Peter,

I wanted to write a personal note to you. I hear your concerns about the bottom-of-the-barrel politics in America right now. But as Alaskans, we know that **real leadership** and **selfless service** can bring us together to achieve great things.
---
I've never shied away from a tough fight, but I'd much rather keep focused on the priorities that bring us together - _like defending our personal freedoms, keeping the Alaska promise alive for our children and grandchildren, and of course, making life a little easier._ I'm proud of the relationships I've built in Juneau, working with great leaders like Mike Dunleavy to break the partisan logjam and achieve results for our state. Serving you and Alaska as Lieutenant Governor has been the honor of a lifetime.
---
I'm running for governor to continue this great progress, not disrupt the system for the sake of making noise. We need an experienced leader, not "my way or the highway" attitudes. Join my team today and help me break what's left of the gridlock in Juneau and bring thousands of disillusioned Alaskans off the sidelines. **We have our end-of-year deadline approaching, and I hope you can send at least $1 to add your name to our list. $1 is all we need to show our strength as a team.** **[https://secure.anedot.com/nancy-dahlstrom-for-governor/](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=cb710a3d759847f0bec3ac5c25840c4c&_e=dghSaOmygGB6q62uXb8YzgbiCLzrjPTcAAIf032am4Y13ZwSCVWQG3HIiPY9X6GayXaxtYkR0QEtp1uvTYy5TIvxUWtpO9Zel01GACXqRHnp4ZHkvdBQn7m-2AlTu1TvOYNE6SRCfCro_juRMEJh_DNxHsUVRBTWlitjf8ZKmYlusPzkOqcZH0tUh_urHN0DeR8ndutKVh-ngpkxX6rPVkxZRqc6RGb01LsAgcS_zqULEBcROhQ-0Gm6pzUlefFSpjWk1nZTloQ6QlzTHg_FqLUYxQMWDJmS85Ggb2J-lvWeUFWbTs7k62Nm_vAMnrSaatBTv1HvvR-Wr__XfVz2njYHJShB-yKFPQ0NI-_2OL9ir2JbgcgW0eBH04qaJiDYp2vUih1yHlVLZCAOj1sAxJHXWm1B7NnF_A0RjgpKh89WoPQA3H5j8a2qRtimg2XFZa3Mspbrp7PEtPEP0b9RoQr7TNcODS8swos6rG4sT2VWvPOxit1A0dcijNa94rHlMFGcWLq2TmwSCVz1N96qyjP6tFA9cdeZEJYgX8nCIccYQPAflHRSXBvo4HjbpwJwRNdSVCoibRd81d73i25vz2viMnwYBmaRd3f0yEFRfKGr5XGyNNnsj06eBnlQmNQYIQKs6dpeRG0hJ4xY6EFmfzEwPpUjbljbB1Y5VmZN44U%3D)** _Let's keep Alaska moving forward._ Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | If you wish to unsubscribe, click here Dear Peter, I wanted to write a personal note to you. I hear your concerns about the bottom-of-the-barrel politics in America right now. But as Alaskans, we know that real leadership and selfless service can bring us together to achieve great things. I've never shied away from a tough fight, but I'd much rather keep focused on the priorities that bring us together - like defending our personal freedoms, keeping the Alaska promise alive for our children and grandchildren, and of course, making life a little easier. I'm proud of the relationships I've built in Juneau, working with great leaders like Mike Dunleavy to break the partisan logjam and achieve results for our state. Serving you and Alaska as Lieutenant Governor has been the honor of a lifetime. I'm running for governor to continue this great progress, not disrupt the system for the sake of making noise. We need an experienced leader, not "my way or the highway" attitudes. Join my team today and help me break what's left of the gridlock in Juneau and bring thousands of disillusioned Alaskans off the sidelines. We have our end-of-year deadline approaching, and I hope you can send at least $1 to add your name to our list. $1 is all we need to show our strength as a team. Let's keep Alaska moving forward. Sincerely, Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor and 2026 Republican candidate for governor | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P.O.Box 770725,Eagle River, Alaska 99577

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A few thoughts for you, if you have a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire. |
---
Peter, it’s been a weird couple weeks. In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire. If you had told me before one of those missions that 35 years later the President of the United States would call for me to be hanged, I would have said you were crazy. But that’s exactly what happened last Wednesday. Sadly, this is the kind of thing we’ve come to expect from this president. He’s a person who can live through the same year we have — rising political violence, escalating tensions, assassinations — and go on to wish death upon sitting members of Congress. Yes, it was concerning, but more than anything, it’s incredibly sad. I served 25 years in the Navy, launched into orbit 4 times, and ran for Senate because I love this country. To me, there is nothing more American than standing up for our Constitution. Donald Trump will never understand that. He’ll never understand putting service to this country before yourself. He’s made billions of dollars off his presidency while millions of people are wondering how they’ll afford their health care, or how to feed their kids. He just doesn’t get it, and he never will. But that makes it even more important that people who do get it — people like you — stick together. That’s how we’ll get through this. There’s no telling what’s ahead of us. This is uncharted territory for me, for my family, for my team, and we have to be ready for anything. I wish I didn’t need to ask you to do any more than you already have, but today, that’s what I need to do. [**Can you split a donation between me and Yassamin Ansari to help raise the resources we’ll need to stand against Trump and anything he throws at us?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121409149/589358034/1933629171?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDhhOGQzOC1iYmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfblwz1DvnMekpn7wAp5yK1PEM4lOPzVZW2pN8xkX8s=) | [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121409150/589358035/1933629171?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDhhOGQzOC1iYmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfblwz1DvnMekpn7wAp5yK1PEM4lOPzVZW2pN8xkX8s=)
---
Again, I can’t thank you enough. It really means the world to me.
Mark

* * *
Yassamin Ansari for Congress
PO Box 13524
Phoenix, AZ 85002
United States ****[yassaminforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121409151/589358036/1625509068?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDhhOGQzOC1iYmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfblwz1DvnMekpn7wAp5yK1PEM4lOPzVZW2pN8xkX8s=&emci=b2ed230a-fbd9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b48a8d38-bbda-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=45157234) ** | [info@yassaminforcongress.com](mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com)** | **Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.**

name: Aimee Prudhomme
subject: I’ve been where you are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240542%2E444211%2EIUuWSI)
Hi,
**My name is Aimee, and I’m honored to be Powered by People’s new Executive Director.** Before I tell you where we’re going next, I want to tell you how I got here, because my story starts where many of you have been.
After the 2016 election, I woke up with a pit in my stomach and the sense that I hadn’t done enough—that our democracy was more fragile than I had realized, and that my complacency may have gotten us there. I made a decision that morning: _I would never let that feeling happen again._
Feeling upset isn’t a strategy. I had two choices—be paralyzed by fear, or turn it into action. I chose action. I started volunteering: registering voters, block walking, working elections, joining local Democratic clubs. But I still craved more impact and real human connection.
**That search led me to Powered by People.** Here, I saw my volunteer work translate into real relationships with voters, and critically, real results. Showing up consistently and personally changes not just elections, but people. That’s the transformation I want for every supporter of Powered by People: channeling your commitment into the most effective organizing work in Texas.
In today’s political system, voters are often treated like transactions: mass texts, AI-driven outreach, impersonal mailers. People get written off.
We reject that. Powered by People is built on human-to-human relationships—on conversations, trust, and consistency. That’s how we achieved 79% youth turnout last year. We’re not just registering voters; we’re staying in touch with them in order to build lifelong, engaged participants in our democracy.
That success gives us a mandate to go bigger. As Executive Director, my job is to match volunteer passion with a clear, winning strategy. We’re moving away from running as fast as we can to executing a deliberate roadmap with ambitious goals:
* Expanding our reach from **30,000 voters in 2024 to more than 100,000 voters by November 3, 2026**
* **Flipping Congressional districts, defeating Greg Abbott,** and **winning that U.S. Senate race**
* **Building power year-round,** not just during “big” elections

This is our pre-season—training leaders, sharpening our tools, and building the infrastructure to win big. Local races, like the special elections in Senate District 9 in Tarrant County and Congressional District 18 in Harris County, could be decided by just a handful of votes. Starting next year strong is not optional. It's essential. And every contribution helps us train and support volunteers year-round, invest in the relational tools that actually move voters, build the data and infrastructure needed to scale, and compete in the tightest races in Texas.
[**If you believe, like I do, that action is the antidote to despair, I’m asking you to make a contribution today to help Powered by People start 2026 strong and put us in a position to win.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251216.vR4tVM&refcode=ema20251216-240542&t=3&akid=240542%2E444211%2EIUuWSI)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251216.vR4tVM&refcode=ema20251216-240542&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240542%2E444211%2EIUuWSI)**
I’m looking forward to working alongside you in the days and months ahead.
Thank you,
Aimee Prudhomme
Executive Director, Powered by People

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20251216-240542-footer&t=23&refcode2=240542_444211_IUuWSI&akid=240542%2E444211%2EIUuWSI)

Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240542%2E444211%2EIUuWSI), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
clean_body: Hi, My name is Aimee, and I’m honored to be Powered by People’s new Executive Director. Before I tell you where we’re going next, I want to tell you how I got here, because my story starts where many of you have been. After the 2016 election, I woke up with a pit in my stomach and the sense that I hadn’t done enough—that our democracy was more fragile than I had realized, and that my complacency may have gotten us there. I made a decision that morning: I would never let that feeling happen again. Feeling upset isn’t a strategy. I had two choices—be paralyzed by fear, or turn it into action. I chose action. I started volunteering: registering voters, block walking, working elections, joining local Democratic clubs. But I still craved more impact and real human connection. That search led me to Powered by People. Here, I saw my volunteer work translate into real relationships with voters, and critically, real results. Showing up consistently and personally changes not just elections, but people. That’s the transformation I want for every supporter of Powered by People: channeling your commitment into the most effective organizing work in Texas. In today’s political system, voters are often treated like transactions: mass texts, AI-driven outreach, impersonal mailers. People get written off. We reject that. Powered by People is built on human-to-human relationships—on conversations, trust, and consistency. That’s how we achieved 79% youth turnout last year. We’re not just registering voters; we’re staying in touch with them in order to build lifelong, engaged participants in our democracy. That success gives us a mandate to go bigger. As Executive Director, my job is to match volunteer passion with a clear, winning strategy. We’re moving away from running as fast as we can to executing a deliberate roadmap with ambitious goals: Expanding our reach from 30,000 voters in 2024 to more than 100,000 voters by November 3, 2026 Flipping Congressional districts, defeating Greg Abbott, and winning that U.S. Senate race Building power year-round, not just during “big” elections This is our pre-season—training leaders, sharpening our tools, and building the infrastructure to win big. Local races, like the special elections in Senate District 9 in Tarrant County and Congressional District 18 in Harris County, could be decided by just a handful of votes. Starting next year strong is not optional. It's essential. And every contribution helps us train and support volunteers year-round, invest in the relational tools that actually move voters, build the data and infrastructure needed to scale, and compete in the tightest races in Texas. I’m looking forward to working alongside you in the days and months ahead. Thank you, Aimee Prudhomme Executive Director, Powered by People

Peter –
It’s hard to believe, but tonight we’re kicking off the last mid-month fundraising deadline of 2025.
This moment matters, and I’ll tell you why. Starting next month, we’re launching our Fighting For Colorado Listening Tour! Getting out on the trail and hearing directly from Coloradans is my top priority. I can’t wait to get started, but to ensure we have the resources to get it off the ground, we have to reach our mid-month fundraising goal now.
Can you chip in $25 to help us reach $10,000 by the end of the next three days and fund our 2026 listening tour? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251216-email&amount=25]
Every deadline we’ve hit this year has helped build the momentum we need going into 2026, the year Colorado elects its next Attorney General. And the truth is: the stakes have never been higher for our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy.
I’m running for Attorney General because Colorado needs someone who will always fight to protect your vote, stand up to extremists, defend our freedoms, and keep our communities safe. But I can’t do it alone.
Can you chip in to help us reach our final mid-month goal and help us fund our listening tour? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251216-email]

name: LeftNet
subject: Americans are wondering if they can keep their health insurance or not
body:
Families are being left in limbo about whether the premium tax credits that made coverage affordable will be extended or not.
#
We’ve seen this before.
Washington is arguing about the future of the Affordable Care Act. Except this time, it’s happening right in the middle of open enrollment, and families are being left in limbo about whether the premium tax credits that made coverage affordable will be extended or if they’re going to see an increase in their health insurance costs.
For a lot of people, that uncertainty is already showing up, making folks consider new, higher monthly premiums, higher deductibles, and harder choices about whether they can stay covered at all.
If you’re willing to share, we want to hear from you. **[Will you take our quick, three-question survey and tell us how rising health care costs are affecting you and your family?](https://act.leftnet.org/survey/health-care-cost-survey/?source=em20251216-1405&t=1&akid=1405%2E2118727%2E28cPvE)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.leftnet.org/survey/health-care-cost-survey/?source=em20251216-1405&t=2&akid=1405%2E2118727%2E28cPvE)**
Thanks for sharing.
— LeftNet

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1405%2E2118727%2E28cPvE)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1405%2E2118727%2E28cPvE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leftnet.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1405%2E2118727%2E28cPvE)

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

Peter,
Lauren Boebert just crawled ever deeper into the MAGA fringe.
Her latest embrace is MAGA activist Scott Presler, founder of the super PAC Early Vote Action. If that name sounds harmless, the money behind it isn't.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W5rFbDZhG9XNNtv-1Eq9sfeTj2wrOvIbOVz6UiXn-vANChP2OvSZvH7qvdQDra2QPIOELTgCJiVN5dn3Am4XvQcFkllsPOBTZR15KBJXA2lfMj43fh93gxBbp1DpMCPJEfPowkZGF_EXxiAyVfdiG7RNI_8C4B4Fhv91MNQu1sGUe5Lc4nnHS9_4_xACqRl6FV4mvX1lVyTeQ2x0_y8sgaoQFREKbnNU&c=EEuNVd7pxO3uiJlaRtQj1LQhAehmjb2nLTSp6w9AR__MY6L-Zk5Efg==&ch=rmb2kNcqBoqhWhchtaCOPN7Ukmz21yZH4S3oYYTH93FWDe2Fy1hw4A==)
---
The PAC is bankrolled by a who's-who of the MAGA fringe--including Elon Musk, who dropped one million dollars, Turning Point USA, and groups tied to Micheal Flynn, the same circle that helped push Q-anon conspiracies and political extremism to the mainstream.
But it gets worse.
One of the PAC's repeat donors is Tristan Tate, brother of "masculinity" influencer Andrew Tate. Both were arrested last year on rape, torture, and human-trafficking charges connected to an alleged international trafficking operation.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W5rFbDZhG9XNNtv-1Eq9sfeTj2wrOvIbOVz6UiXn-vANChP2OvSZvH7qvdQDra2QPIOELTgCJiVN5dn3Am4XvQcFkllsPOBTZR15KBJXA2lfMj43fh93gxBbp1DpMCPJEfPowkZGF_EXxiAyVfdiG7RNI_8C4B4Fhv91MNQu1sGUe5Lc4nnHS9_4_xACqRl6FV4mvX1lVyQpKVdE9KsGesgsLDCNI-gX&c=EEuNVd7pxO3uiJlaRtQj1LQhAehmjb2nLTSp6w9AR__MY6L-Zk5Efg==&ch=rmb2kNcqBoqhWhchtaCOPN7Ukmz21yZH4S3oYYTH93FWDe2Fy1hw4A==)
---
Those are the kinds of dollars now flowing into Boebert's political orbit. Voters see it. That's why she is unpopular. And it's why she's more vulnerable than ever.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And the last time Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her, our campaign delivered the best Democratic performance in this district's history, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points.
The window for Democrats to finally end Lauren Boebert's career is wide open. But we have to take it.
[Our campaign doesn't have MAGA billionaires or extremist PACs. We have people like you. If you're ready to shut the door on Boebert's chaos and corruption, will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare and help Trisha finish the job?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W5rFbDZhG9XNNtv-1Eq9sfeTj2wrOvIbOVz6UiXn-vANChP2OvSZvH7qvdQDra2Q3f6JW9cZulV3v_URnsDsWEmhSPsQiC4MxVJeSqemXa7TDZM9mS4ftONhlhSE-LrmcPqKlTFsLCl6LRe8d6mz6O4w2In4YWaK1OU2YqTdge7aQN1B2bcCL0aOWS8VCHjTj4FZoYhJkLHEM43SD6cpkiuUsf7r1i0q_l8ypVtg_20=&c=EEuNVd7pxO3uiJlaRtQj1LQhAehmjb2nLTSp6w9AR__MY6L-Zk5Efg==&ch=rmb2kNcqBoqhWhchtaCOPN7Ukmz21yZH4S3oYYTH93FWDe2Fy1hw4A==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert just crawled ever deeper into the MAGA fringe. Her latest embrace is MAGA activist Scott Presler, founder of the super PAC Early Vote Action. If that name sounds harmless, the money behind it isn't. | == The PAC is bankrolled by a who's-who of the MAGA fringe--including Elon Musk, who dropped one million dollars, Turning Point USA, and groups tied to Micheal Flynn, the same circle that helped push Q-anon conspiracies and political extremism to the mainstream. But it gets worse. One of the PAC's repeat donors is Tristan Tate, brother of "masculinity" influencer Andrew Tate. Both were arrested last year on rape, torture, and human-trafficking charges connected to an alleged international trafficking operation. | == Those are the kinds of dollars now flowing into Boebert's political orbit. Voters see it. That's why she is unpopular. And it's why she's more vulnerable than ever. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And the last time Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her, our campaign delivered the best Democratic performance in this district's history, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points. The window for Democrats to finally end Lauren Boebert's career is wide open. But we have to take it. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | The door is open. name: Team Wes Moore
subject: It’s a fact.
body:
We’re turning values into action.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1072%2E1086043%2EBzW5nI)
Wes said it first: **Service is not selfish._Service is selfless._**
It’s more than just a saying, it’s fact. And **it’s never been more important than right now.**
Peter, people are hurting because of the actions of the Trump administration and Republicans in Washington. But in response, Wes Moore is turning values into action:
* Standing with federal workers,
* Expanding resources for students and teachers,
* Strengthening community safety efforts,
* And building protections that help shield Maryland families from the chaos coming out of Washington.

Here’s the thing, **we can only continue this work with a strong grassroots team by our side.**
**[Your donation helps us organize faster, respond stronger, and make sure no one gets left behind. Please, Peter, chip in $5 to help us get Wes reelected.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251216-1.ID4wSI&refcode=em-20251216-1&t=2&akid=1072%2E1086043%2EBzW5nI)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251216-1.ID4wSI&amount=5&refcode=em-20251216-1&t=21&akid=1072%2E1086043%2EBzW5nI)**
Together, we will reelect Wes and continue this record of excellence in public service. But with Republicans already in the race, we can’t waste any time.
Your contribution today directly powers our work — making a real impact on Maryland's future. **[So, will you chip in $5 today to join our movement?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251216-1.ID4wSI&refcode=em-20251216-1&t=22&akid=1072%2E1086043%2EBzW5nI)**
Thank you,
Team Wes Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251216-1&t=23&refcode2=1072_1086043_BzW5nI&akid=1072%2E1086043%2EBzW5nI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=1072%2E1086043%2EBzW5nI)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1072%2E1086043%2EBzW5nI)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

# Fun Fact of the Month
---
It sounds like a Russian oil company, but _petrichor_(PEHT-ruh-kor) actually means the smell of rain hitting the ground. On your next rainy redwoods ramble, don’t forget to stop and smell the petrichor.Discover more [delights of the rainy season](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121409849/589360418/-2098337946?utm_campaign=rm-2025-12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ea-rm&sourceid=1168299&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1NjhhYWFlLWJkZGEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U5OUfnTgOMpQZzn_CYulmzGKZ6x53y8VoUUMxip5aho=&emci=3228aa70-bfd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=4568aaae-bdda-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1504551).

clean_body: Redwood Matters: News and stories from Save the Redwoods| | | | | | | Redwood Matters December 16, 2025 RESTORATION Salmon haven returns After five years of tenacious work on the ground—and in the water—our Prairie Creek partnership has restored a crucial salmon nursery on the North Coast. | | | . | TREE ID Coast redwood or giant sequoia? Telling these two giants apart can be tricky. From bark color to cone size, we've got easy tips to help ID these trees. | | Hope for campers seeking sites A new CA law could usher in low-impact camping areas, making more people's camping dreams a reality. | | | Photo by . | Defend the finned, furry, and feathered New attacks on the Endangered Species Act threaten creatures and their habitats, including redwood forests. We have until Dec. 21 to raise our voices. | | | Fun Fact of the Month It sounds like a Russian oil company, but petrichor(PEHT-ruh-kor) actually means the smell of rain hitting the ground. name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: This was a difficult decision
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ry3fiI8JWxNi9FxqMS2qt9MZggjo1CkCa_eIhz3O4TlVz0YD9mFcIbu-5EgWuhtr_xaFl3LwTRBulPTUZtzfncnvKe3f1Tp06DQmmkaDmnuSUo8T0TwiCgvAONcTbIaYC4zAdQrzc7exPWjIuNtuk-JWQfTZqX3BbKImMFuzVuEMlj6eZhOtMXB4zFZUVLxwUdPkOzkFLeJdH9lkVsg-oLKVH7cU-14cqjD-yFKD_C4=&c=-Rrxlj_hMnzHDY2aSwGWHk8NQgzaA4XcdJp2lRyAwGoQucyGM85tEg==&ch=YGiXr_miiSLwdwNJPuy86SapwdHFBgBNJqEED5KQ5uYgFWW6IPoxFA==)
---
|
Peter,
I didn't make this decision lightly, but after discussions with our team, we officially had to make the difficult call to pull our canvassers off the streets.
Winter has officially hit Chicago and it's off to a brutal start. The snow has been nonstop and the wind chill is dangerous. We have a massive dedicated team of volunteers who would walk through fire for our movement, but I'm not going to ask them to walk through ice.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ry3fiI8JWxNi9FxqMS2qt9MZggjo1CkCa_eIhz3O4TlVz0YD9mFcIbu-5EgWuhtr_xaFl3LwTRBulPTUZtzfncnvKe3f1Tp06DQmmkaDmnuSUo8T0TwiCgvAONcTbIaYC4zAdQrzc7exPWjIuNtuk-JWQfTZqX3BbKImMFuzVuEMlj6eZhOtMXB4zFZUVLxwUdPkOzkFLeJdH9lkVsg-oLKVH7cU-14cZp5rnr9f1xw=&c=-Rrxlj_hMnzHDY2aSwGWHk8NQgzaA4XcdJp2lRyAwGoQucyGM85tEg==&ch=YGiXr_miiSLwdwNJPuy86SapwdHFBgBNJqEED5KQ5uYgFWW6IPoxFA==)
---
|
But here is the hard reality: Election day is only a few months away.
We cannot afford a single "snow day." If we lose a day of voter contract now, we might not make it up in time.
So we have to change tactics immediately.
We are shifting our resources from field to paid communications. If we can't knock on voters' doors, we need to land in their mailbox, on their social media feeds, or on their phones.
This pivot costs money we didn't plan to spend in December and we desperately need your support to keep up our momentum.
[Please, will you rush a donation of $25, $15, or whatever is meaningful to you to help us keep reaching voters?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ry3fiI8JWxNi9FxqMS2qt9MZggjo1CkCa_eIhz3O4TlVz0YD9mFcIbu-5EgWuhtrhJx8Ps77kmJmq8IJUntmOXfS1C8cx152g-bGnbbSnMqrEgxBalpm_djxvhQIyvCRX9tEtCUlpof2B3HINfysRtmJ1Hjx6Sd23vlk1qp2vPT-ti-dycnTGGR5xnyknHNt8JcHMIpg9-_gbNWsgsJzGqz3BAswKGzfGfj5_h-LpJo9MjPvKEmOfQ==&c=-Rrxlj_hMnzHDY2aSwGWHk8NQgzaA4XcdJp2lRyAwGoQucyGM85tEg==&ch=YGiXr_miiSLwdwNJPuy86SapwdHFBgBNJqEED5KQ5uYgFWW6IPoxFA==)

| Peter,

Before I ever earn your vote, I want to earn your trust. That means hearing from you before we make any decisions about where this campaign goes next.

Subject: Now is the time to weigh in [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121410127/589361249/-135137706?ms=em25_251216_Surv2_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em25_251216_Surv2_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em25_251216_Surv2_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251216_Surv2_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=XAjTEhXIk/YtXaObG8H07/nptU7pAot/n1l18nLyqr2hhTdsqPH8O3+Sb9hIHy4mEvO1pj6CQU3i1KAyVjITha137MghQwXv6evDu39RooO6jKplVGs/X2CX1Islw4N7E4ieCNZKisRmikQ97ypSaM5xXcSTJPbCErfJz3odvl0=&refcode2=382c6545-beda-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODJjNjU0NS1iZWRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qx3x5QCAmj1GMtbunK9cpsqLGJsRxmxRh8aTPGmu9TU=&emci=ca19133a-92da-f011-8196-000d3a1d5afe&emdi=382c6545-beda-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=13891890) Team —

Christina isn't waiting for Election Day to start doing the work Iowans need. She believes our government can only succeed when leaders listen, not just after they win, but every step of the way.

Since launching this campaign, Christina has been out in the district talking with farmers, teachers, nurses, families, small business owners, and neighbors who are tired of being ignored by their representative in Washington. And as we move into the election year, she's making sure this campaign reflects your priorities, not a party agenda or special-interest talking points.

That starts with hearing directly from you. Before we close out the year, **[Christina wants your voice to help her shape the road ahead. subject: We’ll keep this quick:

body:
#

Hey, Peter. Thank you for opening this email. We’ll keep this quick:
We know we’ve been emailing you quite a bit about our mid-month fundraising deadline but we had to reach out before it expires at midnight just one last time.
The truth is, we’re still behind on our goal. _And, frankly, we’re getting nervous._
See, our mid-month target is a critical benchmark for our team to gauge if we’re on track to meet our critical end-of-quarter public filing goal. And if we fall short now, we’ll have a hard time getting back on track later in the month.
**[Peter, before our mid-month deadline at midnight, will you chip in $10 to Jon Ossoff’s campaign? $10 — or any amount you can give — would help us reach our goal so we can report the best numbers possible at the end of the month.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251216-2-subs-a&t=1&akid=1282%2E5691347%2E9vr_ro)

body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ceYQ_pTYaZIe-69iBuSORfRTXwh25tuv1Y1TTi1fYXba6n5fxwTIQlP5ZBy-6Mx13jUw-lVJb3ALW9PwX92xbGVCw5pnZiIf_oQ9IncTl9bf4e21xR7xgIBJIuzas2Lg4PSXVYA2RxVbS9I4TDKhZ3sm7_0R0ILfiHa_meASghMZC3Dkdj6Fc6N_Mb4n8seQepXPQh395xo0zJKlvWvn0ALwkXJf7UK0&c=dMfNB0RjdbN55SgJ-iMexrMdfjtqE__OqniXj7SBu9G7ANF9RtO-MA==&ch=pNypkKWGA1ls-mq8gRRyfOrlFoKk56eeFCDh1BbaSKid9dJrQc8VyA==)

|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert just crawled ever deeper into the MAGA fringe.
Her latest embrace is MAGA activist Scott Presler, founder of the super PAC Early Vote Action. If that name sounds harmless, the money behind it isn't.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ceYQ_pTYaZIe-69iBuSORfRTXwh25tuv1Y1TTi1fYXba6n5fxwTIQlP5ZBy-6Mx13jUw-lVJb3ALW9PwX92xbGVCw5pnZiIf_oQ9IncTl9bf4e21xR7xgIBJIuzas2Lg4PSXVYA2RxVbS9I4TDKhZ3sm7_0R0ILfiHa_meASghMZC3Dkdj6Fc6N_Mb4n8seQepXPQh395xqIjucFICd4TCDVmKR2RNYF&c=dMfNB0RjdbN55SgJ-iMexrMdfjtqE__OqniXj7SBu9G7ANF9RtO-MA==&ch=pNypkKWGA1ls-mq8gRRyfOrlFoKk56eeFCDh1BbaSKid9dJrQc8VyA==)
---
The PAC is bankrolled by a who's-who of the MAGA fringe--including Elon Musk, who dropped one million dollars, Turning Point USA, and groups tied to Micheal Flynn, the same circle that helped push Q-anon conspiracies and political extremism to the mainstream.
But it gets worse.
One of the PAC's repeat donors is Tristan Tate, brother of "masculinity" influencer Andrew Tate. Both were arrested last year on rape, torture, and human-trafficking charges connected to an alleged international trafficking operation.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ceYQ_pTYaZIe-69iBuSORfRTXwh25tuv1Y1TTi1fYXba6n5fxwTIQlP5ZBy-6Mx13jUw-lVJb3ALW9PwX92xbGVCw5pnZiIf_oQ9IncTl9bf4e21xR7xgIBJIuzas2Lg4PSXVYA2RxVbS9I4TDKhZ3sm7_0R0ILfiHa_meASghMZC3Dkdj6Fc6N_Mb4n8seQepXPQh395xqehs3d2Hm58PB_Iz6kXpNu&c=dMfNB0RjdbN55SgJ-iMexrMdfjtqE__OqniXj7SBu9G7ANF9RtO-MA==&ch=pNypkKWGA1ls-mq8gRRyfOrlFoKk56eeFCDh1BbaSKid9dJrQc8VyA==)
---
Those are the kinds of dollars now flowing into Boebert's political orbit. Voters see it. That's why she is unpopular. And it's why she's more vulnerable than ever.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And the last time Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her, our campaign delivered the best Democratic performance in this district's history, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points.
The window for Democrats to finally end Lauren Boebert's career is wide open. But we have to take it.
[Our campaign doesn't have MAGA billionaires or extremist PACs. We have people like you. If you're ready to shut the door on Boebert's chaos and corruption, will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare and help Trisha finish the job?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ceYQ_pTYaZIe-69iBuSORfRTXwh25tuv1Y1TTi1fYXba6n5fxwTIQlP5ZBy-6Mx1kMdDuO_9Wa2MohKMVWx1MQ4qB39CXY0yjtGg1yCZHNSY_yzz4HGjwS00QjvmvNnERd9AwrZTmGEH1ZNTd2vj0V0HD8z0LxonJsc4Ivgcaeh_1f4-8iIzZudUsOTg3csoKD3tBdFPeumt0LkVkfNp679GfG3o_dK3PQeoScXCIE0=&c=dMfNB0RjdbN55SgJ-iMexrMdfjtqE__OqniXj7SBu9G7ANF9RtO-MA==&ch=pNypkKWGA1ls-mq8gRRyfOrlFoKk56eeFCDh1BbaSKid9dJrQc8VyA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert just crawled ever deeper into the MAGA fringe. Her latest embrace is MAGA activist Scott Presler, founder of the super PAC Early Vote Action. If that name sounds harmless, the money behind it isn't. | == The PAC is bankrolled by a who's-who of the MAGA fringe--including Elon Musk, who dropped one million dollars, Turning Point USA, and groups tied to Micheal Flynn, the same circle that helped push Q-anon conspiracies and political extremism to the mainstream. But it gets worse. One of the PAC's repeat donors is Tristan Tate, brother of "masculinity" influencer Andrew Tate. Both were arrested last year on rape, torture, and human-trafficking charges connected to an alleged international trafficking operation. | == Those are the kinds of dollars now flowing into Boebert's political orbit. Voters see it. That's why she is unpopular. And it's why she's more vulnerable than ever. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And the last time Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her, our campaign delivered the best Democratic performance in this district's history, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points. The window for Democrats to finally end Lauren Boebert's career is wide open. But we have to take it. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | The door is open. Let's slam it shut on Boebert and her orbit of MAGA extremists, traffickers, and conspiracy theorists. That’s not a gimmick. That’s the power of this grassroots team.
While our extreme opponent is relying on right-wing special interests to prop up her campaign, we rely on thousands of people stepping up when it matters most, like right now.

**\-----------------Forwarding message from Dr. Raul Ruiz-----------------**
Democrats are building momentum.
We saw this in November across the country, and we saw this earlier in the month in Tennessee’s special election when Republicans narrowly avoided a huge upset.
This is good news. But it’s too early to celebrate, especially here in our district.
**Because while Democrats are turning out in higher numbers across America,** **our district here is shifting red.**
And with Republicans feeling immense pressure to maintain their House majority, there’s no doubt that they’ll double down on attacks where they see any signs of vulnerability.
Recently, **Mike Johnson reinforced the national Republicans’ efforts with $6 million** — money that will fuel attack ads against me to hurt my reputation and discourage voters with misinformation.
This is the time to show the strength of our grassroots advantage and prepare to fight back. [**The December Federal Election Commission (FEC) end-of-quarter deadline is the most critical opportunity to do that, which is why I’m asking for your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121410297/589361854/936185492?amount=10&source=RR_EM_FR_121625_B1_MM2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGIxYTU4NWYtYmZkYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=27ME7ANcd_4ZvtlFjpIWPQuPkOMpiytM-08eSpp08Vc=)
What we raise by the filing deadline will be publicly available for everyone to see early next year, and it’ll be what our opponents use to gauge my reelection campaign.
I’ve set an ambitious goal for the month to send a strong message, and I need your help to stay on target this week.
[**Can you chip in $10 toward our $5,000 weekly goal and let Republicans know our district is not up for grabs?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121410298/589361855/936185492?amount=10&source=RR_EM_FR_121625_B1_MM2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGIxYTU4NWYtYmZkYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=27ME7ANcd_4ZvtlFjpIWPQuPkOMpiytM-08eSpp08Vc=)
