name: Roy Cooper
subject: We can win this race
body:
You can make the difference.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing the people of my home, Peter. Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So [**when I ask you to donate to our campaign, it’s because your contribution**](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2743?t=7&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-) could make the difference between victory and defeat. **Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win.** That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead. **[I am asking you to contribute just $5 or another amount that fits in your budget today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, give what you can today.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2742?t=8&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)** | **[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2742?t=9&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)**
---
**[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2743?t=10&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)**
---
I deeply appreciate all your support,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2743?t=11&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=12&akid=178%2E124072%2E7a1qo-)

“score settling.”

Prosecutions

a White House consumed by conspiracy theories, and an attorney general who
"completely whiffed” critical responsibilities.

It’s impossible to deny now that Trump is wielding the Department of
Justice as a tool of retribution against his political enemies. There’s no
precedent for this. We’re at an inflection
point.

This is exactly why Demand Justice PAC exists. We’re leading the fight to
stop Trump and his allies from openly abusing the rule of law — including
pressuring every single Senate Democrat to vote NO on Trump judicial
nominees who evade the truth about the 2020 election.

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Photos from the last few weeks 📷
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40576%2E3422442%2E2qDXb4)
Peter,
Katie’s been hitting the road to meet with voters and join events to help spread her lower costs vision for California. Take a look:
Katie joined the Orange County Employees Association to support their incredible members! These dedicated workers—public health nurses, social workers, and peace officers—are the backbone of Orange County.

She toured the Cherry Avenue interim housing community. San Jose is proof: unsheltered homelessness IS solvable.

Katie joined the California State Association of Counties for a panel. As governor, Katie will be a warrior against Donald Trump’s gutting of Medi-Cal, CalFresh, and emergency disaster aid.

UC-Merced students recently shared their thoughts with Katie on our state’s direction and how Donald Trump’s decisions are hurting their classmates and campus. Our students are California’s future—our nurses, engineers, scientists, teachers, and more.

Katie Porter is counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this campaign. Unlike her billionaire opponent, Katie can’t self-fund by writing a massive check.
**[Will you donate $5 right now to help keep Katie on the road, meeting with voters?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251216_1_ak.gBm-Y3&refcode=em20251216-40576&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40576%2E3422442%2E2qDXb4)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251216_1_ak.gBm-Y3&refcode=em20251216-40576&t=22&akid=40576%2E3422442%2E2qDXb4)
Thank you so much,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251216-40576&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40576_3422442_2qDXb4&akid=40576%2E3422442%2E2qDXb4)**

If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! I recently had the opportunity to have a sit-down interview with Ioan Grillo, a British reporter who has been covering the cartel wars in Mexico for 25 years.
He is someone who I trust to provide a good view of what is happening in the ongoing and complicated battles between different cartels, the Mexican government, and the corruption that surrounds it all.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ab580a53-6aee-4daa-8980-6bff8a7acb21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**Piece continued below ...**_
* * *
**[Together with Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/d24d43c8-0338-4100-9fb6-2da1d0ef73b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[MAHA M.D. proves the"PLANDEMIC" is REAL](https://substack.com/redirect/d24d43c8-0338-4100-9fb6-2da1d0ef73b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7eae9f27-d998-4bcf-ac94-5a97b04ab503?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear truth-seeking American,
This MAHA doctor's **[viral video](https://substack.com/redirect/d24d43c8-0338-4100-9fb6-2da1d0ef73b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** not only confirms the COVID pandemic was built on lies...
But he's holding undeniable proof the next "PLANDEMIC" is starting now.
Before it comes for your family **[SEE HIS MESSAGE HERE.](https://substack.com/redirect/d24d43c8-0338-4100-9fb6-2da1d0ef73b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
P.S. The new "Plandemic" will kill 600,000 mostly older Americans in 2026. **[View the 2 signs of disease- and how to protect yourself here.](https://substack.com/redirect/d24d43c8-0338-4100-9fb6-2da1d0ef73b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/d24d43c8-0338-4100-9fb6-2da1d0ef73b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**Piece continued ...**_
During our conversation, Ioan told me he believes the cartels are still expanding within the United States in spite of the tough crackdown by the Trump administration.
He pointed to how certain parts of Mexico that are now war-ravaged were not always like that, becoming unsafe a little bit at a time before suddenly becoming a major hotspot for violence.
"So I would say one thing, learning from this, and you see how things can get a bit bad, a bit bad, and you see there's different cities around Mexico, different states. Things seem okay, then they're a bit bad, a bit bad, a bit bad, then they're terrible," Ioan said.
"But you've got to be inside the United States, like, look, these are cartels, very present, very established networks, and don't wait...gets a bit bad, bad, bad, and then suddenly it gets terrible, and it's very hard to deal with. So it's like, you know...worry about the cartel activity on U.S. soil. That's a big concern I'll be worried about," he continued.
**[You can watch the interview here:](https://substack.com/redirect/81629ae5-c0f0-429b-88dd-a81cf6b955fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

13 days ago * 11 likes * 1 comment * Julio Rosas
Ioan's warning was a necessary, even if unpalatable, reminder that while the Trump administration is putting much more pressure on cartels in Latin America, something drastic needs to change if this issue is ever to be solved.
Looking at Venezuela, I believe the risk calculus is that if the United States can successfully lower the flow of drugs leaving that country through military intervention, then it can go to other Latin American countries and give them an option: Either take actual steps to stop drug gangs and cartels or be next to get Hellfire missiles.
As always, these things are easier said than done.
Yes, the United States is the number one consumer for these drugs, which Latin America points to regularly, but I would argue the fault ultimately lies within Latin America. We're not talking about Americans buying a T.V. or microwave, they're buying highly addictive narcotics because they are plagued with severe addiction. In fact, it's so addicting that people morph into frozen zombies in the streets after taking these drugs before going back for more. That is not a normal product.
It is true that the current "rule" is for cartel networks in the United States to lie low because we have better law enforcement, but it's a national security threat that these vast networks have a foothold in the first place, because political leadership and discretion could change.
Regardless, President Trump closing Biden's open border on day one of his second term dealt a huge blow to the Mexican cartels' human smuggling profits, but they remain very profitable in their other endeavors.
We will have to wait and see if the United States' new and aggressive stance will turn the tide.

body:
We want to share with you what our campaign will be up to on December 31st. |
For most people, December 31st is about throwing parties with loved ones and watching the ball drop in Times Square. For us, December 31st marks the _most important_ deadline we've faced this cycle — our final public fundraising deadline. After the 31st, our numbers will go public for national Republicans to see — and they'll know whether we have the momentum to take back the Senate in the midterms, or whether we're lagging behind. That's why we're sending you this email to explain why we're asking for our supporters to chip in $10 or anything they can before the year ends. **_[We hope that when you're done reading, you understand why the stakes are so high to raise at least $50,000 by 12/31.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121415355/589379835/-31663778?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.16_OTS-FEC-Deadlines_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNkZDlmNy1kMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlBTbtZOIvq6MokCeF5MNKAYRW1M9oMlx7HRIMo8xn8=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121415357/589379837/-31663778?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.16_OTS-FEC-Deadlines_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNkZDlmNy1kMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlBTbtZOIvq6MokCeF5MNKAYRW1M9oMlx7HRIMo8xn8=) **

Here's why this deadline matters so much:
🔷 12/31 is the last FEC fundraising deadline for this year before we start the final sprint toward the midterm elections.
🔷 After 12/31, we will publicly disclose how much money we raised — and Republicans will be gauging our strength.
🔷 When 2026 kicks off, we need to immediately make investments in important battleground states to continue reaching out to voters, building ads programs and organizing on the ground. This all requires significant resources that we don't have yet.
🔷 Republicans have already reported historically high fundraising numbers — so we need to be prepared to fight against hundreds of millions that will be spent on attack ads.
🔷 Our organization doesn't rely on billionaires or special interests to fund our organizing work — we rely on grassroots donors like you.
**That's why it's critical we grow our fundraising momentum TODAY. Everyone will be watching us on December 31st and we can't afford to show any sign of weakness.**

clean_body: We want to share with you what our campaign will be up to on December 31st. | For most people, December 31st is about throwing parties with loved ones and watching the ball drop in Times Square. For us, December 31st marks the most important deadline we've faced this cycle — our final public fundraising deadline. After the 31st, our numbers will go public for national Republicans to see — and they'll know whether we have the momentum to take back the Senate in the midterms, or whether we're lagging behind. That's why we're sending you this email to explain why we're asking for our supporters to chip in $10 or anything they can before the year ends. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = Here's why this deadline matters so much: 🔷 12/31 is the last FEC fundraising deadline for this year before we start the final sprint toward the midterm elections. 🔷 After 12/31, we will publicly disclose how much money we raised — and Republicans will be gauging our strength. 🔷 When 2026 kicks off, we need to immediately make investments in important battleground states to continue reaching out to voters, building ads programs and organizing on the ground. This all requires significant resources that we don't have yet. 🔷 Republicans have already reported historically high fundraising numbers — so we need to be prepared to fight against hundreds of millions that will be spent on attack ads. 🔷 Our organization doesn't rely on billionaires or special interests to fund our organizing work — we rely on grassroots donors like you. That's why it's critical we grow our fundraising momentum TODAY. Everyone will be watching us on December 31st and we can't afford to show any sign of weakness. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Let's do this, – Off the Sidelines PAC © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

I’m reaching out to gently bump my earlier request for you to chip in $1 to help New Dems build on our victories from November so we can elect a Democratic Majority in 2026. Let me start by saying thank you — Democrats couldn’t have swept November’s elections without grassroots supporters like you! = = November was the first major referendum on Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress, and we couldn’t have shown a more unified front to fight against their agenda. – We won historic governor’s races in NJ and VA. – We PASSED Prop 50 in California, ruining Trump’s gerrymandering plan. – We made incredible strides in districts that overwhelmingly voted for Trump last year. With these major wins under our belt, experts are predicting major victories for Democrats in 2026! But we can’t get too comfortable. name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: I usually don’t ask this early, but…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:
The media and the haters in Sacramento are praying for us to fail on December 31. Help me prove them wrong, hit our fundraising goals, and show the entire country that a Sheriff can win in California. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ga-sept24?refcode2=33cdd9f7-d2da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ga-sept24?refcode2=33cdd9f7-d2da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]
Dear Friend,
Last Tuesday , we won a critical special election and picked up a new seat in the Georgia House —moving us from needing 11 seats to the majority to just 10 .
And we’re not finished. There’s still another election ahead with a House race headed to a runoff , and we need to be ready to win again.
If you’re able, please make a contribution today to help us keep organizing, supporting strong candidates, and building the resources it takes to win these close races and protect our democracy.
Thank you for standing with us,
Leader Carolyn Hugley
Georgia House Democratic Caucus
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/grassrootsghdc?refcode=12.12.2510seats]
Can you help us keep fighting for voting rights, reproductive freedoms, common-sense gun safety legislation, high-quality healthcare, affordable housing, and world-class public education? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/grassrootsghdc?refcode=12.12.2510seats]
https://www.facebook.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-facebook [https://www.facebook.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-facebook] https://www.instagram.com/gahousedems/?refcode=footer-instagram [https://www.instagram.com/gahousedems/?refcode=footer-instagram] https://x.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-twitterX [https://x.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-twitterX] https://www.youtube.com/@georgiahousedemocrats [https://www.youtube.com/@georgiahousedemocrats]
The Georgia House Democrats are fighting to make Georgia more affordable and to protect our democracy for every community across the state. We are working to lower costs for working families, strengthen public schools, expand access to healthcare, and defend the freedom to vote and be heard. State legislatures are the frontline in pushing back against Donald Trump and others—through effective policy, responsible lawmaking, and real solutions that protect Georgians. In a closely divided House, every seat matters, and together we’re building the majority needed to deliver lasting progress.

The American people deserve better.

Will you join her and be the change we need?

name: Mark Lamb
subject: Something bigger is broken.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS
body:
When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. |
---

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8027945fe380421b96f5e918ef8785e8&_e=IKYphBHwpdUG5dFHkAU0Bn5waGa2MuG9yBMCe-D5Uf1J12HhByswX-AH7wVyt9EJVGKLZ0QHymPuFLlYELSJYhrwZWsKUXlXaRXtVkZtFrMzzwamblZF9RyuYVcTsMj0AE81o1AnfRCuqFOBMf10WLa7bOA64rKPKSwskD355qL1SM-g_Qmkf57It-Z7UmIOLVevZloIxCek8Xt-F0O4rz_GRRkFS7oufHBg5dE6x-lyQhhg2_Ll2XcjW6XHTdK-EJ1xtxqyxXq-wXK4k8FkBkBDbhKC1SNYGIr8nibO8lpl1SFDEWHp3ZKm4A2Sl7lC44HmoLVx0hkQ2Jx0XjxOVwhTEse3V5epwaE-BKOVHsPk98kBihwtzGkaHtrvYT107eYMPoNsnoYXP95KCc2uytUxqwL7NwXOQ2VH750gX9Vyb0eMljB6pLp9PQYQFWthTrgL_4T2SP3sHSN0W-MFvPp87tvirSDdY2D4ffeLjUXnbud3kMnl35PYKGrTtQ981HaBrziiiLkQkYguLlqbMJ5VrXAjJGWCQe8yaaCyNnNeANonlUMPnvqlr54vuxbUOc7VuPas1EwJL_uQqJZ8DHB6Uh4mCOLBLoAIb4fmBH8QY1WP_4gQ61T1lisIc2aibgj7Kct5rAdQfDOwfnOe6t2FsjT2Ne9WKzSDYHsrTtc%3D)

Peter,

Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself:

When something is broken, you don't complain - _you fix it._

That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient.

But today, something bigger is broken.

Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. _The people_.

The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom.

They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough.

**That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it.** To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone.

If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - **[I'm asking you to join this mission.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8027945fe380421b96f5e918ef8785e8&_e=IKYphBHwpdUG5dFHkAU0Bn5waGa2MuG9yBMCe-D5Uf1J12HhByswX-AH7wVyt9EJVGKLZ0QHymPuFLlYELSJYhrwZWsKUXlXaRXtVkZtFrMzzwamblZF9RyuYVcTsMj0AE81o1AnfRCuqFOBMf10WLa7bOA64rKPKSwskD355qL1SM-g_Qmkf57It-Z7UmIOLVevZloIxCek8Xt-F0O4rz_GRRkFS7oufHBg5dE6x-nyDBy7edL8qY5CUmf8zfG-FH57GmJ5wqM3VoOnhu_eAHafadNF4zvzMp-tbblpfqbX9F4rpY2oCVJdBYzuZOAmoQ_CTcFolcE5SdOjYO4Uh8nr0m4Qgv7cgEggcH7iiRml0mLNsUx033C_5fkS8fqFOIDvl3RWGXG_bQQJiNQ8E6Pi4yftlS3CAfduyw1pp8Ms9p_wBJ37Hyyd_Rz_RtllzB702ygIcfhv7xXTo7-C9AD4xQwSo4jWIj2yNl1LzP2DKeKuOZlskf8CZENWoi0ro5ZSNQGK2pNowQwkO2qmgrcOLi61MCZyThRHN3lPzKmotspTSWpLuo2r064wQsY9sWcuukvDhCiayfy7lGV8ADOx0UMpxnIvl2r21lm6H8eWrZhPNeYA7v_qGQrAXqgvbpb8Xr-TdOOQDoZCQ36cyvRlDeo8pgkTbIGHkVJVyzM%3D)**

**[Grassroots supporters are the backbone of this campaign. clean_body: When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. | Peter, Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself: When something is broken, you don't complain - you fix it. That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient. But today, something bigger is broken. Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. The people. The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom. They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough. That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it. To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone. If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - Thank you for being in this fight, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Some tough news out of Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
ACA subsidies are expiring at the end of the month.
| **Hi there, we’ve got some tough news coming out of Washington.** Thanks to Republicans like my opponent Tom Tiffany and Speaker Mike Johnson, Affordable Care Act subsidies will expire at the end of the month. That means that health premiums for more than 20 million Americans will soar – and **313,000 Wisconsinites** will now have to pay exponentially more at a time when household budgets are already stretched far too thin. If you’re sick and tired of Republican leadership increasing costs for the rest of us, and if you’re ready to support leadership laser-focused on making it easier for working families to make ends meet, **[I hope you’ll consider supporting my campaign today with a contribution of any amount that is meaningful to you.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121625_B1_ACA&t=2&akid=5717%2E196590%2EX-sh6H)** Families in lower-income households will now be forced to spend over 40% of their monthly income on healthcare. And frankly, that’s just unacceptable. We all deserve better than a broken healthcare system. I have always stood for expanding BadgerCare and ensuring access to quality, affordable healthcare. We’re at a crisis moment, and I’m ready to step in and protect Wisconsinites from the chaos and harmful policies coming out of Washington. **[Please join me in rejecting the Washington Way and coming together behind the Wisconsin Way.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121625_B1_ACA&t=3&akid=5717%2E196590%2EX-sh6H)** – Mandela Barnes
---

| | [ CONTRIBUTE NOW » ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6525?source_code=&t=1&akid=5717%2E196590%2EX-sh6H)
---

Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
P.O. Box 90541
Milwaukee, WI 53209
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Can I count on you, Peter?
body:
$15, Peter.
That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to help us reach our $25,000 goal and win in Ohio. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3] Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $X you ever spent?
I know that $15 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Molly Cook passed seven bills into law in her first legislative session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need to continue supporting candidates like Molly Cook.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251216-1&t=1&akid=2950%2E587540%2Ecw0GmP)
Hi Peter,
If you want to understand why Leaders We Deserve empowers bold, progressive young voices who fight for their community, look no further than **Texas State Senator Molly Cook.**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251216_1_molly.jg2q4X&refcode=em20251216-2950&amount=5&t=2&akid=2950%2E587540%2Ecw0GmP)
Molly’s constituents are taking notice of her leadership. Just last month, while David was knocking doors for Christian Menefee, our endorsed candidate who is running for Congress in Houston, Molly was out with them canvassing. At the very first door they knocked, the voter immediately recognized Molly and said, “Oh my God, are you Senator Molly Cook?” The voter then went on at length about how much she loved Molly.
That kind of recognition is not accidental. It’s how she won by 62 votes last election and it's why she has built a year-round organizing program, supported in part by Leaders We Deserve, that is constantly engaging constituents, asking what she can do for them, and figuring out how to help in real, concrete ways.
**Here’s how she’s delivering:**
In her first legislative session, Molly passed seven bills into law, including a bipartisan maternal-healthcare reform that will save lives. Using her experience as a nurse, she advanced critical legislation to help the Texas Maternal Mortality and Morbidity Review Committee review cases faster and make timely recommendations — a life-saving step in a state with some of the worst maternal health outcomes in the nation. Yes you read that right. Molly got a maternal healthcare bill passed in TEXAS.
This is exactly the kind of leadership Texas and other states across the nation deserve, Peter, and exactly why we must continue to uplift candidates just like Molly.
**[Can you split a contribution of $5 between Molly Cook and Leaders We Deserve to help support her work in the Texas Senate?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251216_1_molly.jg2q4X&refcode=em20251216-2950&amount=5&t=3&akid=2950%2E587540%2Ecw0GmP)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251216_1_molly.jg2q4X&amount=5&refcode=em20251216-2950&t=22&akid=2950%2E587540%2Ecw0GmP)**
Here are more wins that Molly helped deliver in her first year:
* $54 million for flood mitigation
* $40 million for community health centers
* Millions more for workforce training, infrastructure, parks, and maternal-child health improvements
* Consumer protections in health insurance
* Safeguards to keep kids safe from predatory vape marketing
* A statewide council to strengthen Texas’ healthcare workforce

**All while maintaining a _100% voting record on nearly 4,500 votes._**
That’s how real power is built. It’s through having a backbone to not take corporate money AND using your power to help your constituents instead of the special interests harming them.
If we want more leaders like Molly — young, bold, progressive, experienced, and grounded in their community — we have to show up for her now, before the attacks escalate.
**[Will you chip in $5 split between Molly Cook and Leaders We Deserve to defend Molly and lift up the next generation of leaders like her?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251216_1_molly.jg2q4X&refcode=em20251216-2950&amount=5&t=23&akid=2950%2E587540%2Ecw0GmP)**
Thank you for standing with Molly and our mission to help elect a new generation of leaders,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251216-1&t=24&refcode2=2950_587540_cw0GmP&akid=2950%2E587540%2Ecw0GmP)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=2950%2E587540%2Ecw0GmP)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2950%2E587540%2Ecw0GmP)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Deb Haaland
subject: The places I’ve rocked my mocs [photos inside]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Wearing our moccasins helps us honor our ancestors, whose shoulders we stand on.

| | |
---
Friend,
In a minute, I’m going to ask you to make [**your first-ever $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign for New Mexico.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2520?t=1&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk) But first, I hope you’ll let me show you some of the places where I’ve **rocked my mocs.**
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2511?t=2&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)
_My child Somáh was my biggest cheerleader on the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior._
On the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior, I decided to wear my white moccasins and a handmade ribbon skirt adorned with butterflies, stars and corn. No matter where I go, I am a proud Pueblo woman first — including at the Department of the Interior.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2511?t=3&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)
_I even rocked my mocs at the White House Tribal Nations Summit._
When I wear my mocs, I'm reminded of how powerful our traditional clothing is to our shared heritage. On the first day of the White House Tribal Nations Summit in 2021, I wore my beaded moccasins in solidarity with our Indigenous people across the country. I am incredibly grateful that together, our Administration made extraordinary accomplishments for Indian Country — enduring progress that would make our ancestors proud.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2511?t=4&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)
_I sported my moccasins and ribbon skirt at a shiprock parade!_
From my ancestral homelands here in New Mexico to the halls of Congress and now on the campaign trail, I rock my mocs to honor the people whose shoulders I stand on. History has shown us there’s nothing we can’t accomplish when we work together, which is why I’m counting on the support of people like you as we fight for a New Mexico that works for everyone.
**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor.[Will you chip in $5 so we can build a strong campaign capable of winning this race and making history again?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2520?t=5&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2533?t=6&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)
---
| | [Donate $35 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2534?t=7&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)
---
| | [Donate $50 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2535?t=8&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)
---
| | [Other Amount >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2511?t=9&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)
---
I am so grateful for your support. Thank you for being by my side,

Deb 🩵
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2537?t=10&akid=6278%2E400544%2EfS3tMk)
---

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c272fb1c2cd644de98212f99d234f3b9&_e=cxIGfYM4CCco7O-iudt_m9nl4gGWdBvP5S7ScCebbV3H4RLbybbS_j4rq64EJ818Vp8OuITfjczUdf_sXjxrXa-6qWtqQojx-s4jHikkj6dlIbvFpbXMpV4DksI20S6hnzklxI7wfvWlBjRUysQFwTCmaNk2RI8YlTxdq2edR0tcjpw_Lw705wBcRIKtlqtqTNx4NkKjXbUPvjhFc_1XnptvRNbpHdKoqibanJ-pcEu79Khe4nQWM0oWWnyuXcgVlJ-yMB7vbQuxO8HUztY3o9a0_HbyItqYRmt17kbrROfUK6odb_TLKG-CUV86HE4vI-pJ539XzXeF37X3xhyTQqqkdpZbv3BnBimS-MeFhagUb9ZwhwsL4TLGl67KWlscCyRmcVBxEFk9YEYaPRhN0P9T3cL3J_boqktwLb3xzcNSh4leNR54KBd1D2BavuZzgeeGOjfIdt_X5qJQz-CAV-6ZO0BJgaESfph9gg8PX3lwzUpGKqO_NxEPrhfGzt-9-yqZt4L3qePKsl_lzghUrPGXukfoENCkMPPkrNQKvN_I0mxRJxvP2YYY5zp4dpeJ)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0789ec23-ec86-452c-9b2d-23f64ad521f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
_**by Ellie Leonard**_
_**Trigger Warning: This article contains discussion of sexual assault**_
For those of us who have finished reading Virginia Giuffre's new best-seller _Nobody 's Girl: A Memoir of Surviving Abuse and Fighting for Justice_, there is a general consensus on the section of the book that hit the hardest, found in chapter 15: _A Bridge Too Far_.
Giuffre stated that in 2002, when she was about 18 years old, Jeffrey Epstein flew her out to Little St. James (known later as "Epstein's Island"), where hundreds of underaged girls would be trafficked in and out from all over the world for Epstein and his friends. On this occasion, however, he brought in a "well-known Prime Minister," who "raped [Virginia] more savagely than anyone had before." The man choked her until she passed out, then let go until she came to, over and over again. "He wanted violence," she remembered, and laughed at her when she pleaded with him to stop, taking "pleasure in seeing [her] in fear for [her] life." She says she came away bleeding from her mouth and private area, front and back, and for days struggled to breathe and swallow. When she begged Epstein never to see the man again, he said coldly, "You'll get that sometimes."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Virginia Giuffre in 1999 or 2000, as printed in her book
This would forever be the day that changed Virginia's life, despite the many times she had been trafficked to other men from as early as 13 years old, and for at least two years with Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell. It was the moment when she knew she might never leave this life, and die at the hands of a rich older man, flying somewhere above New York, or Palm Beach, Paris or the Virgin Islands.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Virginia doesn't name the Prime Minister, but it doesn't take a lot of digging to narrow it down. Of the nearly 90 different countries with prime ministers in 2002, only two landed in the pages of Epstein's Black Book, U.K. Prime Minister Tony Blair, and Israel's Ehud Barak. And after a little research, I concluded that not a single one of the other 88 had ever come in contact with Jeffrey Epstein.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tony Blair allegedly met Epstein for the first time at his home at 10 Downing Street in May 2002, as arranged by Peter Mandelson, a close political ally. Mendelson, former U.K. ambassador to the U.S., was fired for his relationship with Epstein when the notorious Birthday Book became public, in which Mendelson heaps praises on his "intelligent, sharp-witted" friend, Jeffrey Epstein.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Peter Mendelson and Jeffrey Epstein, from the pages of The Birthday Book
Initially Blair met with Epstein via his connection to Bill Clinton, hoping to use Epstein as a scientific resource and potential financial benefactor.
> #### "I think TB would be interested in meeting Jeffrey, who is also a friend of mine, because Jeffrey is an active scientific catalyst/entrepreneur as well as someone who has his finger on the pulse of many worldwide markets and currencies." \- Peter Mandelson
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tony Blair, 2002 - Wikimedia Commons
Other than the initial meeting with Epstein, there is no other documentation to suggest the two men spent any more time together, whether traveling on Epstein's planes or to any of his homes, for business or pleasure. There are no sexual allegations against Blair, and though there were rumors of an affair with Wendi Deng in 2013, he has maintained his innocence.
* * *
Support new talent like Ellie Leonard; subscribe now!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.uZA5-gbSWjUmAgntbV-IL-PK3c7dlbCzhhyfI6jK5gc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=181759506)
* * *
Ehud Barak, on the other hand, knew Jeffrey Epstein well, and has been seen several times going in and out of Epstein's Manhattan home, his apartment buildings, and has visited Little Saint James at least once. And while he claims only to have met Epstein around "10 times," and "never in the company of women or young girls," flight logs, visitor logs, and Epstein's personal schedules would show that the two men met at least 30 times between 2013 and 2017, including two flights on Epstein's private jet and at least one trip to the island.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f212c61e-d5e6-478a-834e-0ffeedfb5bea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ehud Barak is seen going into Epstein's New York house in January 2016, followed by [Jennifer Kalin](https://substack.com/redirect/a5824c5b-5e6e-4c9d-9696-ca4437bf220c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Karyna Shuliak, Svetlana Pozhidaeva, and Julia Stepanova - The Daily Mail
Records indicate that Barak and Epstein met sometime in 2002, introduced by former Israeli President Shimon Peres. However, Barak was the head of the Israeli Military Intelligence Directorate (Aman) from 1983 to 1985, and was Chief of the General Staff of the Israel Defense Forces starting in 1991. Robert Maxwell, Ghislaine Maxwell's father, was deeply connected to both, and likely knew Barak, though there is no public record of their interactions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Barak visited most of Epstein's properties, and despite claiming to have a strict business-only relationship with him, emails between the men leaked by the hacker group Handala in May 2025 painted a different picture of their relationship. Barak relied heavily on Epstein for larger key decisions, such as the Israeli-Mongolian security deal, and arranging meetings with people like Peter Thiel and Victor Vekelsberg, a Russian oligarch. And despite claims that Barak rarely traveled anywhere without security, the letters indicate that he didn't bring his team to Little Saint James.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Virginia Giuffre did not expressly name Ehud Barak in her memoir as the "well-known prime minister," but did in court filings from sometime prior to 2015. Her allegations would later be made public by attorney Alan Dershowitz, when he unsealed her original statement in his defamation case against her (after also being accused by Giuffre). In November 2022, both parties dismissed their lawsuits without a settlement. But the damage had been done, and Giuffre named Ehud Barak as one of the men she was forced to have sex with, along with former New Mexico Governor Bill Richardson and hedge fund manager Glenn Dubin.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So of the nearly 90 countries and their 90 prime ministers, Virginia Giuffre could only be talking about two men, one of whom is documented as having met with Epstein for one 30-minute meeting, and the other who is alleged to have slept with her and taken dozens of trips to meet Jeffrey Epstein at his homes all over the world.
Only one man left an 18-year-old girl unconscious over and over again, bleeding out her "mouth, vagina, and anus," and unable to breathe well or swallow for days.
On November 12th, Jeffrey Epstein's personal estate handed over nearly 23,000 documents to the House Oversight Committee, including more than 2,000 emails between Epstein and his friends. This included at least 28 documented emails between Epstein and Barak, and further discussion about Barak's trips to Epstein's house in Palm Beach and staying at the 301 66th Street apartments in New York City.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Two days prior to the release of the estate documents, the _New York Times_ announced its DealBook Summit speaker lineup. I have worked at the DealBook every year since 2017 as a panel transcriber for the top CEOs and biggest names in industry and entertainment, including Bob Iger, Elon Musk, Prince Harry, Kim Kardashian, Jeff Bezos, Bill Clinton, Kamala Harris, and Volodymyr Zelenskyy, to name a few. It's vacuum of money and power and influence--the biggest people in the world speaking to a room full of the biggest people in the world.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Andrew Ross Sorkin and Elon Musk, 2023 - The NY Times
But this year they invited none other than the former Prime Minister of Israel, Ehud Barak. He'd be speaking with Nicholas Kristof about the armed conflict in Gaza, a necessary conversation. But of all the qualified, experienced, knowledgeable people to cover such an important topic, _why_ would the _Times_ bring in a well-known player in the Epstein files saga? I asked the organizer, Andrew Ross Sorkin.
_" I have to admit, I was surprised to see the former Prime Minister on this year's list for the DealBook, considering the controversial role he holds not only as Jeffrey Epstein's close friend, but also the allegations against him,"_ I said, hoping Sorkin might give me a call and hash it out, like he's done in the past. I laid out my reasons, everything the _New York_ _Times_ certainly already knew about Barak, Epstein, and Virginia Giuffre. Ninety minutes later, I got my response.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I'll say here that I think Andrew Ross Sorkin is one of the smartest people I know. He worked his way up from an unpaid high-school intern, and never forgets a face (or your entire life story). And Nick Kristof has long been a champion against child sex abuse, namely by giving Dylan Farrow a platform to speak out against her father, Woody Allen. So the decision to bring Ehud Barak, a man alleged to have viciously sexually abused an 18-year-old girl on Jeffrey Epstein's island, to the DealBook Summit to speak, not only confused me, but made me very, very angry.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The _New York Times_ DealBook
I reached out to every person I thought could talk some sense into the _Times_ , make them rethink their decision and pull Barak from the lineup. I got little response. But finally _Politico_ reached out, first to me, and then to the _New York Times_ , publishing the story in a small newsletter at the bottom of the page
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It wasn't nothing, but after talking with sources close to Giuffre who confirmed it was, indeed, Barak who had attacked her, I dug deeper into the files to understand why the _New York Times_ would make such a statement in the middle of a high-profile investigation.
_And then I found it._
Sometime around 1976, just after Jeffrey Epstein was fired by the Dalton School for poor performance as a math and physics teacher, he was offered a job at Bear Stearns, a major investment firm that would later collapse in the 2008 Financial Crisis. He'd caught the eye of Dalton father, Ace Greenberg, who brought Epstein into the fold of high finance. But before he did, Epstein was offered one more deal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to a 2014 unpublished draft from Michael Wolff found in the latest Epstein files, Jeffrey Epstein was recruited by none other than Arthur Ochs "Punch" Sulzberger, publisher of the _New York Times_. Punch had taken over the role from his brother-in-law, and would eventually hand it off to his son, "Pinch" (Arthur Jr.), in 1992, who passed it down to his son, A.G. Sulzberger, in 2018. So the man in charge of the the DealBook Summit was the grandson of the man who tried to hire Jeffrey Epstein, with zero journalism experience, to work for the _New York Times_.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e140d3de-07ca-4b63-84d2-6a609846346d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I wasn't able to stop Ehud Barak from speaking on December 3rd. But I don't think I needed to. On October 20th, when we all read the first pages of Virginia Giuffre's book, we knew who the "well-known Prime Minister" was. And the _New York Times_ ' decision to give Barak a platform amidst one of the biggest, all-encompassing investigations in U.S. history, may well cement their place in time.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/450fb3ec-cfee-45c2-97cd-82e3c93eae2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And as more files are released, with names, and pictures, and most importantly receipts, we all have the ability to choose the side of history on which we stand, as journalists, and as souls.
My little pen and I will continue to stand on the side with survivors.
_After contacting the New York Times, I was not invited back to work for the DealBook Summit_
_Ellie is an author, editor, and owner of[Red Pencil Transcripts](https://substack.com/redirect/fe27717b-635b-4da0-ae7a-809a05196998?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and works with filmmakers, podcasts, and journalists all over the world. She lives with her family just outside of New York City._

Of the nearly 90 different countries with prime ministers in 2002, only two landed in the pages of Epstein's Black Book, U.K. Prime Minister Tony Blair, and Israel's Ehud Barak. And after a little research, I concluded that not a single one of the other 88 had ever come in contact with Jeffrey Epstein. | | ---|---|--- Tony Blair allegedly met Epstein for the first time at his home at 10 Downing Street in May 2002, as arranged by Peter Mandelson, a close political ally. Mendelson, former U.K. ambassador to the U.S., was fired for his relationship with Epstein when the notorious Birthday Book became public, in which Mendelson heaps praises on his "intelligent, sharp-witted" friend, Jeffrey Epstein. | | ---|---|--- Peter Mendelson and Jeffrey Epstein, from the pages of The Birthday Book Initially Blair met with Epstein via his connection to Bill Clinton, hoping to use Epstein as a scientific resource and potential financial benefactor. #### "I think TB would be interested in meeting Jeffrey, who is also a friend of mine, because Jeffrey is an active scientific catalyst/entrepreneur as well as someone who has his finger on the pulse of many worldwide markets and currencies." \- Peter Mandelson | | ---|---|--- Tony Blair, 2002 - Wikimedia Commons Other than the initial meeting with Epstein, there is no other documentation to suggest the two men spent any more time together, whether traveling on Epstein's planes or to any of his homes, for business or pleasure. There are no sexual allegations against Blair, and though there were rumors of an affair with Wendi Deng in 2013, he has maintained his innocence. Support new talent like Ellie Leonard; subscribe now! Ehud Barak, on the other hand, knew Jeffrey Epstein well, and has been seen several times going in and out of Epstein's Manhattan home, his apartment buildings, and has visited Little Saint James at least once. And while he claims only to have met Epstein around "10 times," and "never in the company of women or young girls," flight logs, visitor logs, and Epstein's personal schedules would show that the two men met at least 30 times between 2013 and 2017, including two flights on Epstein's private jet and at least one trip to the island. | | ---|---|--- Ehud Barak is seen going into Epstein's New York house in January 2016, followed by , Karyna Shuliak, Svetlana Pozhidaeva, and Julia Stepanova - The Daily Mail Records indicate that Barak and Epstein met sometime in 2002, introduced by former Israeli President Shimon Peres. However, Barak was the head of the Israeli Military Intelligence Directorate (Aman) from 1983 to 1985, and was Chief of the General Staff of the Israel Defense Forces starting in 1991. Robert Maxwell, Ghislaine Maxwell's father, was deeply connected to both, and likely knew Barak, though there is no public record of their interactions. | | ---|---|--- Barak visited most of Epstein's properties, and despite claiming to have a strict business-only relationship with him, emails between the men leaked by the hacker group Handala in May 2025 painted a different picture of their relationship. Barak relied heavily on Epstein for larger key decisions, such as the Israeli-Mongolian security deal, and arranging meetings with people like Peter Thiel and Victor Vekelsberg, a Russian oligarch. And despite claims that Barak rarely traveled anywhere without security, the letters indicate that he didn't bring his team to Little Saint James. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Virginia Giuffre did not expressly name Ehud Barak in her memoir as the "well-known prime minister," but did in court filings from sometime prior to 2015. Her allegations would later be made public by attorney Alan Dershowitz, when he unsealed her original statement in his defamation case against her (after also being accused by Giuffre). In November 2022, both parties dismissed their lawsuits without a settlement. But the damage had been done, and Giuffre named Ehud Barak as one of the men she was forced to have sex with, along with former New Mexico Governor Bill Richardson and hedge fund manager Glenn Dubin. | | ---|---|--- So of the nearly 90 countries and their 90 prime ministers, Virginia Giuffre could only be talking about two men, one of whom is documented as having met with Epstein for one 30-minute meeting, and the other who is alleged to have slept with her and taken dozens of trips to meet Jeffrey Epstein at his homes all over the world. Only one man left an 18-year-old girl unconscious over and over again, bleeding out her "mouth, vagina, and anus," and unable to breathe well or swallow for days. On November 12th, Jeffrey Epstein's personal estate handed over nearly 23,000 documents to the House Oversight Committee, including more than 2,000 emails between Epstein and his friends. This included at least 28 documented emails between Epstein and Barak, and further discussion about Barak's trips to Epstein's house in Palm Beach and staying at the 301 66th Street apartments in New York City. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Two days prior to the release of the estate documents, the New York Times announced its DealBook Summit speaker lineup. I have worked at the DealBook every year since 2017 as a panel transcriber for the top CEOs and biggest names in industry and entertainment, including Bob Iger, Elon Musk, Prince Harry, Kim Kardashian, Jeff Bezos, Bill Clinton, Kamala Harris, and Volodymyr Zelenskyy, to name a few. It's vacuum of money and power and influence--the biggest people in the world speaking to a room full of the biggest people in the world. | | ---|---|--- Andrew Ross Sorkin and Elon Musk, 2023 - The NY Times But this year they invited none other than the former Prime Minister of Israel, Ehud Barak. He'd be speaking with Nicholas Kristof about the armed conflict in Gaza, a necessary conversation. But of all the qualified, experienced, knowledgeable people to cover such an important topic, why would the Times bring in a well-known player in the Epstein files saga? I asked the organizer, Andrew Ross Sorkin. " I have to admit, I was surprised to see the former Prime Minister on this year's list for the DealBook, considering the controversial role he holds not only as Jeffrey Epstein's close friend, but also the allegations against him," I said, hoping Sorkin might give me a call and hash it out, like he's done in the past. I laid out my reasons, everything the New York Times certainly already knew about Barak, Epstein, and Virginia Giuffre. Ninety minutes later, I got my response. | | ---|---|--- I'll say here that I think Andrew Ross Sorkin is one of the smartest people I know. He worked his way up from an unpaid high-school intern, and never forgets a face (or your entire life story). And Nick Kristof has long been a champion against child sex abuse, namely by giving Dylan Farrow a platform to speak out against her father, Woody Allen. So the decision to bring Ehud Barak, a man alleged to have viciously sexually abused an 18-year-old girl on Jeffrey Epstein's island, to the DealBook Summit to speak, not only confused me, but made me very, very angry. | | ---|---|--- The New York Times DealBook I reached out to every person I thought could talk some sense into the Times , make them rethink their decision and pull Barak from the lineup. I got little response. But finally Politico reached out, first to me, and then to the New York Times , publishing the story in a small newsletter at the bottom of the page | | ---|---|--- It wasn't nothing, but after talking with sources close to Giuffre who confirmed it was, indeed, Barak who had attacked her, I dug deeper into the files to understand why the New York Times would make such a statement in the middle of a high-profile investigation. And then I found it. Sometime around 1976, just after Jeffrey Epstein was fired by the Dalton School for poor performance as a math and physics teacher, he was offered a job at Bear Stearns, a major investment firm that would later collapse in the 2008 Financial Crisis. He'd caught the eye of Dalton father, Ace Greenberg, who brought Epstein into the fold of high finance. But before he did, Epstein was offered one more deal. | | ---|---|--- According to a 2014 unpublished draft from Michael Wolff found in the latest Epstein files, Jeffrey Epstein was recruited by none other than Arthur Ochs "Punch" Sulzberger, publisher of the New York Times. Punch had taken over the role from his brother-in-law, and would eventually hand it off to his son, "Pinch" (Arthur Jr.), in 1992, who passed it down to his son, A.G. Sulzberger, in 2018. So the man in charge of the the DealBook Summit was the grandson of the man who tried to hire Jeffrey Epstein, with zero journalism experience, to work for the New York Times. I wasn't able to stop Ehud Barak from speaking on December 3rd. But I don't think I needed to. On October 20th, when we all read the first pages of Virginia Giuffre's book, we knew who the "well-known Prime Minister" was. And the New York Times ' decision to give Barak a platform amidst one of the biggest, all-encompassing investigations in U.S. history, may well cement their place in time. | | ---|---|--- And as more files are released, with names, and pictures, and most importantly receipts, we all have the ability to choose the side of history on which we stand, as journalists, and as souls. My little pen and I will continue to stand on the side with survivors. After contacting the New York Times, I was not invited back to work for the DealBook Summit Ellie is an author, editor, and owner of, and works with filmmakers, podcasts, and journalists all over the world. She lives with her family just outside of New York City. Read more Blue Amp Media! | | , , and 2 others| | ---|---|--- | Dec 16 | | | and | | ---|---|--- | Dec 14 | * | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

null, Trump’s Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is facing increased criticism from both sides of the aisle – and for good reason:
* A Pentagon watchdog says Hegseth may have **endangered U.S. troops** by leaking classified military strike plans via a messaging app.

* Hegseth ordered a strike that killed 9 people at sea, and then a second strike **killed unarmed survivors** clinging to the wreckage – potentially committing a serious war crime.

* **Hegseth kicked journalists out of the Pentagon** and replaced them with MAGA influencers. Now, _The New York Times_ is suing him over unconstitutional media restrictions.

Some Republicans in Congress are questioning whether Hegseth can stay in his role.

**Now, we need grassroots supporters like you to weigh in. We're looking for 100 responses from 18326 before midnight, null.**_[Tell us where you stand:](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/10236?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1602%2E49239%2E5f2dWg)_

name: GOTV PAC
subject: 2026 will not be like 2018 and here’s why:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
There’s a comforting myth circulating right now – that if voters swing hard enough, the House will simply fall back into Democratic hands.
But the data says otherwise.
Thanks to aggressive gerrymandering, the 2026 House map looks nothing like the 2018 map, where Democrats rode a blue wave. There are fewer competitive districts and far less margin for error. Democrats could post a bigger national swing than they did in 2018 – and still end up with a slimmer majority, or none at all.
That’s by design.
Republicans have carved the map, so wave elections don’t work the way they used to. Winning now requires flipping nearly every true swing seat, holding all our vulnerable districts, and expanding the battlefield early enough to catch Republicans off guard.
At GOTV PAC, we don’t wait for a wave to carry us. We build turnout operations strong enough to push voters across the line in races decided by hundreds of votes.
If control of the House comes down to three seats, losing even one winnable race could cost everything.
If you’re able, will you chip in today to help GOTV PAC do the hard, necessary work of winning in a shrinking battlefield? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12162025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12162025]
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Your last chance to grab a ticket:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I couldn’t ask for a better way to spend my 88th birthday.

My dear friends, do you have plans for tomorrow, Wednesday, December 17? **Ted Danson and some of my closest friends are throwing me a Roast and Toast, and this is one of your LAST opportunities to grab a ticket before we’re live!** **[You can use this link or the button below to RSVP. And as a thank you, I’ll send you one of my favorite holiday cocktail (or mocktail!) recipes!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121416982/589384896/1820297183?refcode=ea.a941558b-dada-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.a941558b-dada-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NDE1NThiLWRhZGEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9LvXpr9yFiUq6P4S1oVIal3LKq7Uf-I-1O6ZfUf75P0=)** | [**🎟️ Get your ticket →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121416983/589384897/1820297183?refcode=ea.a941558b-dada-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.a941558b-dada-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NDE1NThiLWRhZGEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9LvXpr9yFiUq6P4S1oVIal3LKq7Uf-I-1O6ZfUf75P0=)

Big Polluters are hoping we’re too tired, too intimidated, and too disorganized to show up and fight back in 2026. _I’m ready for us to prove them wrong._
I can’t wait to spend an hour laughing with you (and I hope my friends take it easy on me during the roast portion of the night!), and for you, to meet some of our incredible JanePAC-endorsed candidates like Naren Briar, John McAuliff, and Representative Adelita Grijalva.
**Truly, I couldn’t ask for a better way to spend my 88th birthday.**
[**🎟️ Join us tomorrow night →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121416985/589384899/1820297183?refcode=ea.a941558b-dada-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.a941558b-dada-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NDE1NThiLWRhZGEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9LvXpr9yFiUq6P4S1oVIal3LKq7Uf-I-1O6ZfUf75P0=)

subject: Trump DESTROYS Social Security?? (please sign!!)
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) [ **Look, it’s with a heavy heart that we email you today... **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=3&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) [**WE TOLD YOU:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=4&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) 64 million Americans rely on Social Security — especially Seniors.

[**WE TOLD YOU:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=5&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) Donald Trump is making good on his promise to make billions of dollars in cuts to our Social Security benefits to support his MAGA agenda. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=6&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) [**WE TOLD YOU:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=7&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) The only way to PROTECT Social Security once and for all is to DEMAND Congress take action to SAVE IT!!!!

But, the deadline to sign our petition to SAVE Social Security came and went, [**_and we never saw your signature._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=8&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) [ **LAST CHANCE FOR YOU: Sign onto our petition before midnight to DEMAND Congress protect Social Security from Trump’s cuts >>** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=9&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS) | [SIGN ON NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=10&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS)
---
This issue is too important to ignore, so we’re reactivating our petition temporarily — until 11:59 PM to ensure that every single Democrat in your area has a chance to sign!

Please, we CANNOT let Trump and his Republicans dismantle Social Security any further.

Every second that we ignore this issue, millions of Americans are at risk.
[ **So please, don’t miss the opportunity to sign our petition and DEMAND Congress protect Social Security from Trump’s cuts >>** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=11&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS)
[SIGN ON NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71040?t=12&akid=23736%2E4449941%2EpyA7BS)
---
Awaiting your signature,

Fight for Reform
